text: Ɔɔ waa amo̱‑ɔ bo̱ ye̱ra nsu pɛɛɛ ne̱e̱, na a kaapo̱ ane̱ŋ ne̱ oo su ane̱ se̱ bwe̱e̱tɔ, na ane̱ŋ ne̱ ɔ kpa ane̱ ne̱ ane̱ bo̱ mò̱ ko̱ko̱we̱bɛɛ‑ɔ‑rɔ‑ɔ ase̱ŋ bwe̱e̱tɔ‑ɔ.

ref: You were saved by faith in God, who treats us much better than we deserve. This is God's gift to you, and not anything you have done on your own.
text: Oo su ane̱ se̱ bwe̱e̱tɔ ne̱e̱ se̱, ne̱ saŋ ne̱ ane̱ a kɔɔre̱ Kristoo gyi‑o, ne̱ ɔɔ mo̱rɔwe̱ ane̱. Ane̱ ko̱kɔɔre̱ mò̱ gyi‑o gbaa maa le̱e̱ ane̱ fɔŋfɔŋ ke̱yaale̱ŋ se̱. Wuribware̱ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ ɔ sa ne̱ ane̱ e̱ kɔɔre̱ ane̱ i gyi.

ref: God planned for us to do good things and to live as he has always wanted us to live. This is why he sent Christ to make us what we are. United by Christ
text: Mò̱ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ ɔɔ twe̱e̱ ane̱, ne̱ ɔɔ bo̱rɔ Kristoo Yeesuu si be̱e̱ lɔŋŋɔ ane̱, na ane̱ taare̱ waa itimaa ne̱ oo lee ane̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ waa‑ɔ. Kristoo ya waa Yudaa awuye na bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ mo̱ŋ gye̱ Yudaa awuye‑o ase̱sɛ ko̱ŋko̱

ref: Christ has made peace between Jews and Gentiles, and he has united us by breaking down the wall of hatred that separated us. Christ gave his own body
text: Kristoo fɔŋfɔŋ ya baa kaye̱e̱yuri Yudaa awuye na bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ mo̱ŋ gye̱ Yudaa awuye‑o mbo̱ŋtɔ‑rɔ. Amo̱‑ɔ du ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mò̱ a bwee kideŋbee ne̱ ke̱ bo̱ Yɛro̱salɛm maŋ‑nɔ, ne̱ ki i kuŋ bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ mo̱ŋ gye̱ Yudaa awuye‑o na bo̱ ma nya lwee Wuribware̱ suŋkpa‑ɔ‑rɔ‑ɔ.

ref: to destroy the Law of Moses with all its rules and commands. He even brought Jews and Gentiles together as though we were only one person, when he united us in peace.
text: Saŋ ne̱ Kristoo a wu‑o, ɔɔ te̱ŋ mbraa pɛɛɛ ne̱ ŋ ya sa ne̱ Yudaa awuye na bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ mo̱ŋ gye̱ Yudaa awuye‑o i kisi abɛɛ‑ɔ‑rɔ. Ɔɔ waa ane̱ŋ ne̱e̱ na ase̱sɛ ntuŋ ŋnyɔ amo̱ nya kii ase̱sɛ ko̱ŋko̱, na bo̱ waa mò̱ ase̱sɛ, na bo̱ nya kye̱na kaye̱e̱yuri‑ro.

ref: On the cross Christ did away with our hatred for each other. He also made peace between us and God by uniting Jews and Gentiles in one body.
text: Kristoo a wu kiyii kpare̱-abɛɛ‑rɔ‑ɔ se̱ ne̱e̱ bo̱ lee ndo̱ŋ ne̱ m bo̱ ase̱sɛ ntuŋ ŋnyɔ amo̱ ke̱bo̱ŋtɔ‑rɔ‑ɔ. Ne̱ ɔɔ ba bamo̱ bo̱ tii abɛɛ se̱, ne̱ baa kii ko̱ko̱ŋko̱, ne̱ ɔɔ lɔŋŋɔ bamo̱ pɛɛɛ na Wuribware̱ ke̱bo̱ŋtɔ‑rɔ.

ref: Christ came and preached peace to you Gentiles, who were far from God, and peace to us Jews, who were near God.
text: Ne̱ ɔɔ bo̱ tɔwe̱ abware̱se̱ŋ gywii mo̱ne̱ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ aa Wuribware̱ ke̱bo̱ŋtɔ‑rɔ bo̱ e̱fɔ‑ɔ, na ane̱ Yudaa awuye ne̱ ane̱ te ane̱ be̱ne̱ Wuribware̱‑ɔ fe̱yɛ ane̱ ase̱sɛ ntuŋ ŋnyɔ mɔ kye̱na kaye̱e̱yuri‑ro.

ref: And because of Christ, all of us can come to the Father by the same Spirit.
text: Ɔɔ waa mfaanɛɛ ne̱e̱ na ane̱ ase̱sɛ ntuŋ ŋnyɔ mɔ nya bo̱rɔ mò̱ se̱ kii ase̱sɛ ko̱ŋko̱ ne̱ ane̱ bɔ Wuribware̱ a kufwiiŋe timaa‑o si ane̱ e̱ yɔ Wuribware̱ ase̱‑ɔ.

ref: You Gentiles are no longer strangers and foreigners. You are citizens with everyone else who belongs to the family of God.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ mo̱ne̱ mo̱ŋ lɛɛ mo̱ne̱ gye̱ afɔ. Mo̱ne̱ tii bamo̱ ne̱ Wuribware̱ e̱ te̱e̱ bamo̱ fe̱yɛ mò̱ ase̱sɛ‑ɔ se̱, ne̱ mo̱ne̱ be̱e̱ mo̱ne̱ tii Wuribware̱ a ko̱ko̱we̱bɛɛ‑ɔ se̱, ne̱ mo̱ne̱ pɛɛɛ a kii Wuribware̱ a maŋ‑ɔ‑rɔ awuye.

ref: No one knew about this mystery until God's Spirit told it to his holy apostles and prophets.
text: Saŋ‑ɔ Wuribware̱ mo̱ŋ lee atɔ kwe̱e̱rɔsɛ mɔ bo̱ kaapo̱ se̱sɛ dimaadi. Amaa mbe̱yɔmɔ fe̱raa Wuribware̱ a ba mò̱ kufwiiŋe‑o bo̱ lee amo̱ bo̱ kaapo̱ mò̱ ayaa‑rɔ aye̱re̱po̱ na mò̱ akyaamɛɛ‑ɔ.

ref: And the mystery is this: Because of Christ Jesus, the good news has given the Gentiles a share in the promises God gave to the Jews. God has also let the Gentiles be part of the same body.
text: Ke̱tɔ ne̱ oo lee bo̱ kaapo̱‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ mo̱ŋ gye̱ Yudaa awuye‑o a bo̱ tii Yudaa awuye‑o si, ne̱ bamo̱ pɛɛɛ a kii ase̱sɛ ko̱ŋko̱. Na bo̱ nya nya ŋyure ne̱ Wuribware̱ e̱ sa‑ɔ na ke̱tɔ ne̱ Wuribware̱ a tɔwe̱ bo̱ be̱ya fe̱yɛ ɔ bo̱rɔ Kristoo Yeesuu si na ɔ bo̱ sa mò̱ ase̱sɛ‑ɔ.

ref: I am the least important of all God's people. But God was kind and chose me to tell the Gentiles that because of Christ there are blessings that cannot be measured.
text: Hare̱e̱ mo̱ a gye̱ Wuribware̱ a ase̱sɛ‑ɔ‑rɔ kayaagyi‑o gbaa ooo, mo̱ ne̱ ɔɔ sa ŋyure, na ŋ nya tɔwe̱ ase̱ŋ timaa‑o gywii bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ mo̱ŋ gye̱ Yudaa awuye‑o. Ke̱tɔ ne̱ ɔ yɛ n tɔwe̱‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ Kristoo kuŋu si ase̱ŋ timaa kyɔ bwe̱e̱tɔ, ne̱ n gye̱ amo̱ pɛɛɛ ne̱ ane̱ e̱ taare̱ a ane̱ nu kaase̱‑ɔ.

ref: God did this according to his eternal plan. And he was able to do what he had planned because of all Christ Jesus our Lord had done.
text: Ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu Kristoo si ne̱ Wuribware̱ a bo̱rɔ bo̱ waa ke̱tɔ ne̱ ɔ fa mò̱ mfɛɛre̱ saŋ ke̱maa fe̱yɛ ɔ waa‑ɔ.

ref: Christ now gives us courage and confidence, so we can come to God by faith.
text: Kristoo ne̱ ane̱ e̱ kɔɔre̱ mò̱ ane̱ i gyi‑o si, ne̱ ane̱ e̱ nya ŋkpo̱nɔ ane̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ Wuribware̱ atɔ, na kufu mo̱ŋ de ane̱.

ref: God is wonderful and glorious. I pray that his Spirit will make you become strong followers
text: Ke̱tɔ ne̱ mo̱ e̱ gye̱ ŋkpɛɛ mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ sa mo̱ne̱ le̱e̱ mò̱ kapo̱tɛɛ dabe̱‑ɔ‑rɔ‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ ɔ bo̱rɔ mò̱ kufwiiŋe timaa‑o si bo̱ sa mo̱ne̱ wɔre̱.

ref: I pray that you and all God's people will understand what is called wide or long or high or deep.
text: Na mo̱ne̱ aa Wuribware̱ a ase̱sɛ ne̱ baa saŋ‑ɔ nya ba kpa mɔ se̱ bo̱ nya e̱le̱ŋ bo̱ ŋu ane̱ŋ ne̱ Kristoo a ke̱kpa‑ɔ kyɔ‑ɔ. Mò̱ ke̱kpa‑ɔ kyɔ bwe̱e̱tɔ bwe̱e̱tɔ, hare̱e̱ gbaa ane̱ mo̱ŋ nyi ke̱mo̱ kanɔ.

ref: I want you to know all about Christ's love, although it is too wonderful to be measured. Then your lives will be filled with all that God is.
text: Hare̱e̱ ane̱ a ma taare̱ a ane̱ nu Kristoo a ke̱kpa‑ɔ kaase̱ lo̱we̱ gbaa ooo, mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ɔ sa a mo̱nꞌ ŋu ane̱ŋ a ke̱kpa‑ɔ, na ŋkee mò̱ fɔŋfɔŋ ke̱yaale̱ŋ nya kɔɔre̱ mo̱ne̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ.

ref: As a prisoner of the Lord, I beg you to live in a way that is worthy of the people God has chosen to be his own.
text: Mo̱ ne̱ baa kperi kusuŋ ne̱ mo̱ e̱ waa mo̱ e̱ sa ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu‑o si tii mo̱‑ɔ e̱ ko̱re̱ mo̱ne̱ ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ, Wuribware̱ a te̱e̱ mo̱ne̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ kye̱na kakye̱na timaa‑o si‑o, mo̱nꞌ le̱ŋ e̱ye̱e̱ kye̱na ane̱ŋ.

ref: Always be humble and gentle. Patiently put up with each other and love each other.
text: Mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ baa mo̱ne̱ e̱ye̱e̱ kaase̱, na mo̱nꞌ bu atɔ, na mo̱nꞌ nya kanyite. Mo̱ne̱ a kpa abɛɛ ase̱ŋ‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ nyite abɛɛ.

ref: Try your best to let God's Spirit keep your hearts united. Do this by living at peace.
text: Mo̱nꞌ le̱ŋ e̱ye̱e̱ sa a kaye̱e̱yuri ba mo̱ne̱ kakye̱na‑rɔ, na mo̱nꞌ nya waa kanɔ ko̱ŋko̱ ne̱ Wuribware̱ a kufwiiŋe timaa‑o a sa mo̱ne̱‑ɔ.

ref: All of you are part of the same body. There is only one Spirit of God, just as you were given one hope when you were chosen to be God's people.
text: A le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ kayo̱wɔre̱ ko̱ŋko̱ e̱ bo̱‑rɔ. Kamo̱ e̱ gye̱ asɔre̱e̱‑ɔ. Ne̱ Wuribware̱ a kufwiiŋe timaa‑o ko̱ŋko̱ mɔ kpeŋ e̱ bo̱‑rɔ. Ane̱ŋ dɛɛ ne̱ Wuribware̱ se̱ ne̱ ane̱ de te̱maa fe̱yɛ ane̱ e̱ yɔ‑ɔ gye̱ ɔko̱ŋko̱ ne̱e̱ kpeŋ.

ref: There is one God who is the Father of all people. Not only is God above all others, but he works by using all of us, and he lives in all of us.
text: Wuribware̱ gye̱ ɔko̱ŋko̱ kpeŋ ne̱e̱, ɔke̱maa mɔ mò̱ se̱ ne̱e̱. Ane̱ ne̱ o de ɔ waa mò̱ kusuŋ, ne̱ o te ane̱ ɔke̱maa mɔ kakpo̱nɔ‑rɔ.

ref: As the Scriptures say, “When he went up to the highest place, he led away many prisoners and gave gifts to people.”
text: Fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ baa kyo̱rɛɛ waa abware̱se̱ŋ wo̱re̱‑ɔ‑rɔ‑ɔ, “Mò̱ a yɔ Wuribware̱ se̱ so̱so̱‑ɔ, ɔɔ taa ado̱ŋ ne̱ ɔɔ kra‑ɔ bo̱ yɔ. Ne̱ ɔɔ sa ɔke̱maa na ke̱tɔ ne̱ o nyi e̱waa nɛɛnɛɛ‑ɔ.”

ref: When it says, “he went up,” it means that Christ had been deep in the earth.
text: Mbe̱yɔmɔ, “ɔɔ yɔ so̱so̱” mɔ kaase̱ e̱ gye̱ e̱me̱ne̱? Kaase̱ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ pwɛɛ ne̱ ɔɔ dɛɛ yɔ so̱so̱‑ɔ, ɔɔ ba swe̱e̱re̱ na swe̱e̱re̱ kaase̱ gbaa.

ref: This also means that the one who went deep into the earth is the same one who went into the highest heaven, so he would fill the whole universe.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ ɔko̱ ne̱ ɔɔ ba swe̱e̱re̱‑ɔ se̱ dɛɛ ya yɔ so̱so̱ so̱so̱ so̱so̱ awo̱re̱‑rɔ kamɛɛ yɔ Wuribware̱ se̱, na ɔ taare̱ yɔ ke̱bare̱ ke̱maa kaye̱‑rɔ pɛɛɛ.

ref: This will continue until we are united by our faith and by our understanding of the Son of God. Then we will be mature, just as Christ is, and we will be completely like him.
text: Mfaanɛɛ ne̱ ane̱ pɛɛɛ e̱ nya a ane̱ waa kanɔ ko̱ŋko̱ Wuribware̱ mò̱ gyi‑o ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi‑o‑ro. Na ane̱ be̱e̱ waa kanɔ ko̱ŋko̱ gyii mò̱. Na ane̱ kii ase̱sɛ ne̱ baa nya Kristoo ke̱yaale̱ŋ‑ɔ.

ref: We must stop acting like children. We must not let deceitful people trick us by their false teachings, which are like winds that toss us around from place to place.
text: Na ane̱ ma lɛɛ kii ŋyaagyi ne̱ ase̱sɛ de kaye̱ba ba pe̱nna bamo̱ kanyiase̱ŋ‑nɔ, ne̱ ba sa ne̱ bamo̱ mfɛɛre̱ e̱ yɔ mfe̱e̱, na m ba mfe̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ afwii e̱ da yɔ mfe̱e̱ na a ba mfe̱e̱, ne̱ a sa ne̱ alaŋkpare̱ e̱ da a yɔ ke̱bare̱ ke̱maa se̱.

ref: But this isn't what you were taught about Jesus Christ. He is the truth, and you heard about him and learned about him.
text: Amaa ŋ nyi fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ fe̱raa mo̱ne̱ mo̱ŋ suye amo̱‑ɔ ko̱ko̱ le̱e̱ Kristoo ase̱, saŋ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a nu mò̱ ase̱ŋ, ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a le̱e̱ ke̱gya mò̱ se̱‑ɔ, ne̱ baa kaapo̱ mo̱ne̱ mò̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ ase̱ŋ‑ɔ.

ref: You were told that your foolish desires will destroy you and that you must give up your old way of life with all its bad habits.
text: Ke̱tɔ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a nu‑o e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ yɔwe̱ mo̱ne̱ kakye̱na de̱daa‑ɔ na ke̱nare̱gyi bɔye̱‑ɔ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ kayo̱rɔwe̱ bɔye̱ maa lɔŋŋɔ mo̱ne̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ‑rɔ.

ref: and make you into a new person. You were created to be like God, and so you must please him and be truly holy. Rules for the New Life
text: Na mo̱nꞌ sa a Wuribware̱ sa mo̱ne̱ mfɛɛre̱ po̱pwɛɛ, na mo̱nꞌ kii ase̱sɛ po̱pwɛɛ ne̱ bamo̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ‑rɔ a fwiiri, ne̱ ba waa itimaa kase̱ŋtiŋ si fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱‑ɔ.

ref: We are part of the same body. Stop lying and start telling each other the truth.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ ɔke̱maa yɔwe̱ mò̱ bɛɛko̱ ke̱pe̱nna, na mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ gyi abɛɛ kase̱ŋtiŋ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ pɛɛɛ gye̱ asɔre̱e̱ ko̱ŋko̱ ase̱sɛ ne̱e̱.

ref: Don't get so angry that you sin. Don't go to bed angry
text: Mo̱ne̱ iduŋ ya fwii gbaa ooo, mo̱ne̱ ma waa bɔye̱. Amaa mo̱nꞌ sa a mo̱ne̱ iduŋ yuri pwɛɛ na kyɔwe̱ dɛɛ twɛɛ.

ref: and don't give the devil a chance.
text: N gye̱ ane̱ŋ, mo̱ne̱ e̱ sa Ɔbɔnsam kpa na o lwee mo̱ne̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ‑rɔ.

ref: If you are a thief, quit stealing. Be honest and work hard, so you will have something to give to people in need.
text: Ɔko̱ ne̱ mò̱ e̱ gye̱ oyu, ɔ yɔwe̱ mò̱ kayu‑o, na ɔ le̱e̱ ba mò̱ asare̱e̱ bo̱ waa kusuŋ timaa ne̱ ki de kase̱ŋtiŋ‑o. Na mò̱ atanne̱ ne̱ ɔ nya‑ɔ‑rɔ, ɔ nya taare̱ lee amo̱‑rɔ ako̱ bo̱ sa atiripo̱.

ref: Stop being bitter and angry and mad at others. Don't yell at one another or curse each other or ever be rude.
text: Mo̱ne̱ ma lɛɛ waa nyaŋnyaŋ na kaduŋfwii, na mo̱ne̱ ma lɛɛ da atɔ me̱naŋ me̱naŋ, na mo̱ne̱ ma lɛɛ kpa e̱kɔ, na mo̱ne̱ ma lɛɛ kyii ase̱sɛ, ŋkee mo̱ne̱ ma lɛɛ kisi ase̱sɛ.

ref: Let love be your guide. Christ loved us and offered his life for us as a sacrifice that pleases God.
text: Mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ kpa abɛɛ ase̱ŋ mo̱ne̱ kakye̱na‑rɔ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ Kristoo a kpa ane̱ ase̱ŋ, ne̱ ɔɔ ba mò̱ fɔŋfɔŋ kayo̱wɔre̱ bo̱ lɔŋŋɔ ane̱ aa Wuribware̱ ke̱bo̱ŋtɔ‑rɔ, ne̱ Wuribware̱ akatɔ a gyi ane̱ŋ a ko̱lɔŋŋɔ‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ.

ref: You are God's people, so don't let it be said that any of you are immoral or indecent or greedy.
text: Amaa mo̱ne̱ a gye̱ Wuribware̱ ase̱sɛ‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, a mo̱ŋ bware fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ ɔko̱ waa kakye̱e̱kpa bɛɛɛ kanyare̱kpa bɛɛɛ kipurima bɛɛɛ o de nyase̱pee.

ref: Being greedy, indecent, or immoral is just another way of worshiping idols. You can be sure people who behave in this way will never be part of the kingdom that belongs to Christ and to God. Living as People of Light
text: Mo̱ i yii mo̱ne̱ se̱ fe̱yɛ ɔke̱maa ne̱ ɔ waa kakye̱e̱kpa bɛɛɛ kanyare̱kpa‑ɔ bɛɛɛ o puri‑o bɛɛɛ o de nyase̱pee‑o maa taare̱ a o tii Kristoo na Wuribware̱ a kuwure‑o si. Nyase̱pee du ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ se̱sɛ a yɔwe̱ Wuribware̱, ne̱ o suŋ ate̱tɔmo̱ŋta‑ɔ.

ref: Don't let anyone trick you with foolish talk. God punishes everyone who disobeys him and says foolish things.
text: Mo̱ne̱ ma sa a ɔko̱ ba aye̱ba bo̱ pe̱nna mo̱ne̱, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ duŋ i fwii ɔke̱maa ne̱ ɔ waa ane̱ŋ a e̱bɔye̱‑ɔ se̱, na ɔ ba bo̱ gyiiri mò̱ ke̱se̱bɔ.

ref: So don't have anything to do with anyone like that.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ mo̱ne̱ aa ane̱ŋ a ase̱sɛ‑ɔ ma nare̱.

ref: You used to be like people living in the dark, but now you are people of the light because you belong to the Lord. So act like people of the light
text: Saŋ ko̱‑ɔ a dɛɛ a du ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ kibugyii a bo̱ mo̱ne̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ‑rɔ‑ɔ. Amaa mbe̱yɔmɔ fe̱raa, a du ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ a ke̱laŋŋe̱rɔ‑ɔ a bo̱ mo̱ne̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ‑rɔ‑ɔ. Ne̱ ke̱ e̱ laŋŋe̱ ase̱sɛ akatɔ‑rɔ. Amo̱se̱‑ɔ mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ nare̱ fe̱yɛ ase̱sɛ ne̱ ba laŋŋe̱‑rɔ kaye̱ mɔ‑rɔ‑ɔ.

ref: and make your light shine. Be good and honest and truthful,
text: Ke̱laŋŋe̱rɔ e̱ bo̱ mo̱ne̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ‑rɔ, mo̱ne̱ e̱ waa itimaa na ke̱dame̱naŋsɛ, ne̱ mo̱ne̱ i gyi kase̱ŋtiŋ.

ref: as you try to please the Lord.
text: Na mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ buwi kpa atɔ ne̱ a pre̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu‑o.

ref: It is disgusting even to talk about what is done in the dark.
text: Kase̱ŋtiŋ si fe̱raa e̱bɔye̱ ne̱ ba waa ba kwe̱e̱rɔ‑ɔ mo̱ŋ bɔ pɛɛɛ. Ane̱ŋ se̱‑ɔ, e̱mo̱ ase̱ŋ ko̱tɔwe̱ gbaa de ipeere.

ref: These are evil times, so make every minute count.
text: Na mo̱nꞌ ba mo̱ne̱ saŋ bo̱ waa kusuŋ timaa, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mbe̱yɔmɔ fe̱raa e̱bɔye̱ dooo ya bo̱rɔ‑rɔ.

ref: Don't be stupid. Instead, find out what the Lord wants you to do.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ mo̱nꞌ gyii kanyiase̱ŋ, na mo̱nꞌ le̱ŋ e̱ye̱e̱ nu ke̱tɔ ne̱ Wuribware̱ e̱ kpa fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ waa‑ɔ kaase̱.

ref: Honor Christ and put others first.
text: Mo̱ne̱ pɛɛɛ, mo̱ne̱ a bu Kristoo‑o si‑o, mo̱nꞌ bu abɛɛ.

ref: A wife should put her husband first, as she does the Lord.
text: Mo̱ne̱ akye̱e̱ waare̱e̱po̱‑ɔ de̱e̱ bu mo̱ne̱ kuri‑ana fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ i bu ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu‑o.

ref: A husband is the head of his wife, as Christ is the head and the Savior of the church, which is his own body.
text: Mo̱ne̱ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ gye̱ akye̱e̱‑ɔ, mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ waa ane̱ŋ bo̱ le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ akuri e̱ bo̱ mo̱ne̱ ba de̱e̱re̱ mo̱ne̱ se̱, fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ dɛɛ ne̱ Kristoo e̱ bo̱ asɔre̱e̱‑ɔ ne̱ o kuŋ amo̱ ne̱ ɔ de̱e̱re̱ amo̱ se̱‑ɔ.

ref: Wives should always put their husbands first, as the church puts Christ first.
text: Amo̱se̱ se̱‑ɔ akye̱e̱‑ɔ de̱e̱ bu bamo̱ akuri ke̱tɔ ke̱maa‑rɔ, fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ asɔre̱e̱ awuye i bu Kristoo‑o.

ref: A husband should love his wife as much as Christ loved the church and gave his life for it.
text: Ŋkee mo̱ne̱ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ gye̱ anyare̱‑ɔ mɔ, mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ kpa mo̱ne̱ ka‑ana fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱, Kristoo a kpa asɔre̱e̱ awuye ase̱ŋ‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, ne̱ oo wu bo̱ sa bamo̱‑ɔ.

ref: He made the church holy by the power of his word, and he made it pure by washing it with water.
text: Kristoo a wu sa asɔre̱e̱ ne̱e̱ na ɔ nya taa amo̱ bo̱ waa mò̱ ɔko̱fɔ, na ɔ ba asuu ke̱bɔ bo̱ gyee ɔko̱fɔ kayo̱wɔre̱, na ɔ ba mò̱ abware̱se̱ŋ bo̱ kpɛɛ ɔko̱fɔ kakpo̱nɔ‑rɔ.

ref: Christ did this, so he would have a glorious and holy church, without faults or spots or wrinkles or any other flaws.
text: Na ɔ taa mò̱ yaa mò̱ aye̱, na o buŋ mò̱ atɔ timaa ne̱ a bo̱ daŋ‑ɔ, na nduwii na alɔpane̱ mo̱ŋ te mò̱ se̱, na mò̱ kayo̱wɔre̱ mo̱ŋ nyɔŋwe̱ nyɔŋwe̱, ne̱ mò̱ kakpo̱nɔ‑rɔ a fwiiri.

ref: In the same way, a husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself. A husband who loves his wife shows he loves himself.
text: Ane̱ŋ ne̱ ɔnyare̱ kpa mò̱ ka‑ɔ ne̱e̱. Ɔ kpa mò̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ ɔ kpa mò̱ fɔŋfɔŋ e̱ye̱e̱‑ɔ. Ɔko̱ ne̱ ɔ kpa mò̱ ka‑ɔ e̱ kpa mò̱ fɔŋfɔŋ e̱ye̱e̱ ne̱e̱.

ref: None of us hate our own bodies. We provide for them and take good care of them, just as Christ does for the church,
text: Ɔnyare̱ ko̱ bo̱‑rɔ ne̱ o kisi mò̱ fɔŋfɔŋ e̱ye̱e̱ aaa? Daabii daa! Ɔ be̱ra mò̱ fɔŋfɔŋ e̱ye̱e̱ ne̱e̱, ne̱ ɔ de̱e̱re̱ mò̱ fɔŋfɔŋ e̱ye̱e̱ se̱ nɛɛnɛɛ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ dɛɛ ne̱ Kristoo e̱ de̱e̱re̱ asɔre̱e̱‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ.

ref: because we are each part of his body.
text: Ane̱ e̱ gye̱ asɔre̱e̱‑ɔ, ne̱ asɔre̱e̱‑ɔ mɔ du ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ Kristoo kayo̱wɔre̱‑ɔ.

ref: As the Scriptures say, “A man leaves his father and mother to get married, and he becomes like one person with his wife.”
text: Ne̱ baa kyo̱rɛɛ waa abware̱se̱ŋ wo̱re̱‑ɔ‑rɔ fe̱yɛ, “Amo̱se̱‑ɔ ɔnyare̱ e̱ le̱e̱ mò̱ se̱ na mò̱ nyi lɔŋ‑nɔ, na ɔ waare̱e̱, na mò̱ aa mò̱ ka a waa kanɔ kye̱na kii ko̱ko̱ŋko̱.”

ref: This is a great mystery, but I understand it to mean Christ and his church.
text: Ase̱ŋ dabe̱ timaa ko̱ bo̱ ase̱ŋ mɔ ne̱ mo̱ a gye̱ ŋkpɛɛ tɔwe̱‑ɔ‑rɔ. Amaa Kristoo na asɔre̱e̱‑ɔ ase̱ŋ wo̱re̱ ne̱ mo̱ a tɔwe̱.

ref: So each husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself, and each wife should respect her husband.
text: Ke̱tɔ ne̱ mo̱ e̱ tɔwe̱‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ ɔnyare̱ ke̱maa de̱e̱ kpa mò̱ ka nɛɛnɛɛ, fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ ɔ kpa mò̱ fɔŋfɔŋ e̱ye̱e̱‑ɔ, na ɔkye̱e̱ mɔ de̱e̱ bu mò̱ kuri.

ref: Children, you belong to the Lord, and you do the right thing when you obey your parents. The first commandment with a promise says,
text: Mo̱ne̱ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ gye̱ ŋyaagyi‑o mɔ, mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ gya mo̱ne̱ ako̱we̱po̱ nnɔ se̱, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ a bware fe̱yɛ Kristoo awuye ŋyaagyi waa.

ref: Parents, don't be hard on your children. Raise them properly. Teach them and instruct them about the Lord. Slaves and Masters
text: Na mo̱ne̱ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ gye̱ ako̱we̱po̱‑ɔ mɔ, mo̱ne̱ ma waa ke̱tɔ ne̱ ki i fwii mo̱ne̱ agyi iduŋ‑o. Amaa mo̱nꞌ ba ke̱be̱ra timaa na ke̱kaapo̱ timaa ne̱ kaa le̱e̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu ase̱‑ɔ bo̱ kra bamo̱.

ref: Slaves, you must obey your earthly masters. Show them great respect and be as loyal to them as you are to Christ.
text: Mo̱ne̱ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ gye̱ anya‑ɔ mɔ, mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ gya mo̱ne̱ nyaŋpe̱‑ana ne̱ bo̱ bo̱ swe̱e̱re̱ mɔ se̱‑ɔ nnɔ se̱. Mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ se̱re̱ bamo̱, na mo̱nꞌ lee mo̱ne̱ mme‑ro suŋ bamo̱, fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ i suŋ mo̱ne̱ nyaŋpe̱ Kristoo‑o.

ref: Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. You are slaves of Christ, so with your whole heart you must do what God wants you to do.
text: Mo̱ne̱ ma suŋ bamo̱ akatɔ se̱ wo̱re̱. Mo̱nꞌ suŋ bamo̱ fe̱yɛ Kristoo anya a gye̱ mo̱ne̱, ne̱ mo̱ne̱ e̱ waa ke̱ke̱maa Wuribware̱ ke̱pre̱ se̱‑ɔ.

ref: Gladly serve your masters, as though they were the Lord himself, and not simply people.
text: Mo̱nꞌ pee akatɔ waa mo̱ne̱ kusuŋ fe̱yɛ n gye̱ se̱sɛ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ e̱ waa mo̱ne̱ e̱ sa‑ɔ, amaa ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu ne̱ mo̱ne̱ e̱ waa mo̱ne̱ e̱ sa‑ɔ.

ref: You know that you will be rewarded for any good things you do, whether you are slaves or free.
text: Mo̱nꞌ ŋu fe̱yɛ se̱sɛ e̱ gye̱ ke̱nya ooo bɛɛɛ mò̱ e̱ gye̱ ogyi ooo, ne̱ mò̱ ya waa itimaa, ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu e̱ ka mò̱ itimaa amo̱ ko̱kɔ ne̱e̱.

ref: Slave owners, you must treat your slaves with this same respect. Don't threaten them. They have the same Master in heaven that you do, and he doesn't have favorites. The Fight against Evil
text: Mo̱ne̱ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ gye̱ anya a anyaŋpe̱‑ɔ mɔ, mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ kra mo̱ne̱ anya ane̱ŋ dɛɛ, na mo̱nꞌ yɔwe̱ ke̱da bamo̱ kufu fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ i gyiiri bamo̱ ke̱se̱bɔ. Mo̱nꞌ nyiŋŋi si fe̱yɛ nyaŋpe̱ ko̱ŋko̱ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ aa bamo̱ de so̱so̱. Mò̱ fe̱raa, ɔ maa gyi ase̱ŋ ke̱kpa se̱. Mo̱nꞌ buŋ Wuribware̱ atɔ ne̱ a kuŋ mo̱ne̱ e̱ye̱e̱‑ɔ

ref: Finally, let the mighty strength of the Lord make you strong.
text: Ŋkee mo̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana, mo̱nꞌ sa a mo̱ne̱ ke̱yaale̱ŋ le̱e̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu a ke̱yaale̱ŋ dabe̱‑ɔ ase̱.

ref: We are not fighting against humans. We are fighting against forces and authorities and against rulers of darkness and powers in the spiritual world.
text: Mo̱nꞌ ŋu fe̱yɛ n gye̱ se̱sɛ dimaadi ne̱ ane̱ e̱ kɔ. Ane̱ e̱ kɔ bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ dɛɛ bo̱ gye̱ Wuribware̱ mbɔɔ, ne̱ mbe̱yɔmɔ bo̱ gya Ɔbɔnsam se̱‑ɔ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ bo̱ de ke̱yaale̱ŋ so̱so̱ ba sa ne̱ ase̱sɛ e̱ waa e̱bɔye̱ kibugyii a ŋke mɔ‑rɔ‑ɔ ne̱e̱.

ref: So put on all the armor that God gives. Then when that evil day comes, you will be able to defend yourself. And when the battle is over, you will still be standing firm.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ mo̱nꞌ buŋ atɔ pɛɛɛ ne̱ Wuribware̱ e̱ sa mo̱ne̱ a mo̱nꞌ buŋ bo̱ kuŋ e̱ye̱e̱‑ɔ. Na ɔdo̱ŋ ya tii mo̱ne̱, na mo̱nꞌ nya taare̱ kuŋ mo̱ne̱ e̱ye̱e̱, na mo̱nꞌ nya ye̱re̱ keŋkeŋ ya bo̱ fo̱ kɛɛ.

ref: Be ready! Let the truth be like a belt around your waist, and let God's justice protect you like armor.
text: Mo̱nꞌ ye̱re̱ keŋkeŋ. Mo̱nꞌ gyi kase̱ŋtiŋ. Amo̱ e̱ gye̱ mo̱ne̱ bre̱kaa ne̱ ɔ da mo̱ne̱ e̱laare̱‑rɔ‑ɔ. Mo̱nꞌ waa itimaa. E̱mo̱ e̱ gye̱ ke̱kyaŋse̱ kaare̱ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ e̱ bo̱ kuŋ mo̱ne̱ akaŋ‑nɔ‑ɔ.

ref: Your desire to tell the good news about peace should be like shoes on your feet.
text: Na mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ tɔwe̱ kaye̱e̱yuri ase̱ŋ timaa‑o. Amo̱ e̱ gye̱ mo̱ne̱ ase̱be̱ta.

ref: Let your faith be like a shield, and you will be able to stop all the flaming arrows of the evil one.
text: Ke̱tɔ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ e̱ kɔɔre̱ mo̱ne̱ i gyi‑o tiri bwe̱e̱tɔ. Ke̱mo̱ e̱ gye̱ akuŋe̱ye̱e̱tɔ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ de mo̱ne̱ asare̱e̱‑rɔ bo̱ duŋ Ɔbɔnsam a de̱e̱kpa aŋeŋgyi ne̱ ɔ twe̱e̱ mo̱ne̱‑ɔ.

ref: Pray that I will be given the message to speak and that I may fearlessly explain the mystery about the good news.
text: Na mo̱nꞌ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ sa ŋ gbaa mo̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ sa mo̱ kanɔ a n tɔwe̱ ase̱ŋ, na mo̱ ya lee ase̱ŋ timaa‑o kawu, kufu mo̱ŋ de mo̱.

ref: I was sent to do this work, and this is the reason I am in jail. So pray that I will be brave and will speak as I should. Final Greetings
text: Ane̱ŋ ne̱ Kristoo a lee mo̱ fe̱yɛ ŋ waa mò̱ ayaa‑rɔ ɔye̱re̱po̱‑ɔ se̱ ne̱ baa tii mo̱. Mo̱nꞌ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ sa mo̱ fe̱yɛ n taare̱ tɔwe̱ ase̱ŋ timaa‑o ane̱ŋ ne̱ a bware‑o, na kufu mo̱ŋ de mo̱. Kanɔka

ref: I pray that God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will give peace, love, and faith to every follower!
text: Ane̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana‑ɔ fe̱raa, mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ane̱ se̱ Wuribware̱ na ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu Kristoo ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ fe̱yɛ bo̱ sa mo̱ne̱ kaye̱e̱yuri na ke̱kpa na ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi.

ref: May God be kind to everyone who keeps on loving our Lord Jesus Christ.
text: M be̱e̱ mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ yure bamo̱ ne̱ ba kpa ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu Kristoo ase̱ŋ kase̱ŋtiŋ‑no‑o.

ref: From Paul and Timothy, servants of Christ Jesus. To all God's people who belong to Christ Jesus at Philippi and to all your bishops and deacons.
text: Mo̱, Pɔɔl, na Timotii ne̱ ane̱ gye̱ Kristoo Yeesuu ayaafɔre̱‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ ane̱ e̱ kyo̱rɛɛ wo̱re̱ mɔ ane̱ e̱ kyo̱ŋwe̱ mo̱ne̱ asɔre̱e̱ abre̱sɛ na akyarɔpo̱ na ase̱sɛ pɛɛɛ ne̱ bo̱ gya Kristoo Yeesuu si, ne̱ bo̱ te Filipii maŋ‑nɔ‑ɔ.

ref: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Paul's Prayer for the Church in Philippi
text: Mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ane̱ se̱ Wuribware̱ na ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu Kristoo ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ bo̱ sa mo̱ne̱ ŋyure na kaye̱e̱yuri. Ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ ne̱ Pɔɔl e̱ ko̱re̱ ɔ sa Filipii awuye‑o

ref: Every time I think of you, I thank my God.
text: Saŋ ke̱maa ne̱ mo̱ ya fa mo̱ne̱ mfɛɛre̱, amɔ mo̱ne̱ se̱‑ɔ mo̱ e̱ sa Wuribware̱ aŋsɛ.

ref: God is the one who began this good work in you, and I am certain that he won't stop before it is complete on the day that Christ Jesus returns.
text: Wuribware̱ a gye̱ ne̱ ɔɔ le̱e̱ kusuŋ timaa mɔ ko̱waa mo̱ne̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ‑rɔ‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, mo̱ e̱ kɔɔre̱ a n gyi fe̱yɛ ɔ sa a mo̱nꞌ kya se̱ ane̱ŋ bo̱ fo̱ kake ne̱ kusuŋ‑o e̱ fo̱ kɛɛ, ne̱ Yeesuu Kristoo i kiŋŋi a ɔ ba‑ɔ.

ref: You have a special place in my heart. So it is only natural for me to feel the way I do. All of you have helped in the work God has given me, as I defend the good news and tell about it here in jail.
text: Mo̱ne̱ ase̱ŋ bo̱ mo̱ kakpo̱nɔ‑rɔ saŋ ke̱maa. Ane̱ŋ se̱‑ɔ, a bware fe̱yɛ ŋ kpa mo̱ne̱ ase̱ŋ bwe̱e̱tɔ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ hare̱e̱ mo̱ a da tiikpa fe̱yɛ mo̱ a da mbe̱yɔmɔ, bɛɛɛ saŋ ne̱ mo̱ a dɛɛ nya mo̱ e̱ye̱e̱ ŋ ye̱re̱‑rɔ mo̱ e̱ kaapo̱ ase̱ŋ timaa‑o gbaa ooo, Wuribware̱ a sa mo̱ aa mo̱ne̱ kusuŋ na ŋyure ko̱ŋko̱ ne̱e̱.

ref: God himself knows how much I want to see you. He knows I care for you in the same way Christ Jesus does.
text: Wuribware̱ fɔŋfɔŋ nyi fe̱yɛ mo̱ ke̱kpa ne̱ mo̱ e̱ kpa mo̱ne̱‑ɔ a le̱e̱ Kristoo Yeesuu fɔŋfɔŋ ase̱ ne̱e̱, ne̱ a gye̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ.

ref: how to make the right choices. Then you will still be pure and innocent when Christ returns. And until that day,
text: Ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ e̱ taare̱, na mo̱nꞌ bo̱ ŋu ke̱tɔ ne̱ ke̱ gye̱ kitimaa‑o, na mo̱ne̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ‑rɔ nya fwiiri, na ɔko̱ ma taare̱ nya ko̱tɔko̱ ye̱re̱ se̱ bo̱ po̱rɔ mo̱ne̱ kake nsi ne̱ Yeesuu Kristoo i kiŋŋi a ɔ ba‑ɔ.

ref: Jesus Christ will keep you busy doing good deeds that bring glory and praise to God. What Life Means to Paul
text: Mfaanɛɛ dɛɛ ne̱ Yeesuu Kristoo e̱ sa a mo̱nꞌ waa asuŋ timaa. Mo̱ne̱ ke̱bo̱rɔgyi i bware ane̱ŋ, Wuribware̱ e̱ nya ke̱dabe̱ na nkyo̱rɔ. Pɔɔl yɛ ŋkpa ooo ɔ kpa, lowi ooo ɔ kpa

ref: My dear friends, I want you to know that what has happened to me has helped to spread the good news.
text: Mo̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana, mbe̱yɔmɔ mo̱ e̱ kpa a mo̱nꞌ ŋu fe̱yɛ ke̱tɔ ne̱ kaa waa mo̱ mfe̱e̱‑ɔ a sa ne̱ ase̱ŋ timaa‑o ko̱tɔwe̱ a yɔ akatɔ‑rɔ.

ref: But the ones who are jealous of us are not sincere. They just want to cause trouble for me while I am in jail.
text: Amɔ bamo̱ ne̱ ba kisi mo̱‑ɔ e̱ tɔwe̱ Kristoo ase̱ŋ ba kpa ke̱nyare̱ ba sa bamo̱ e̱ye̱e̱. Ne̱ ba fa ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ bamo̱ e̱ waa ane̱ŋ, ba sa a mo̱ kakpo̱nɔ‑rɔ nye̱ra bo̱ tii ase̱ŋ bwe̱e̱tɔ ne̱ mo̱ i ŋu tiikpa mfe̱e̱‑ɔ se̱.

ref: But that doesn't matter. All that matters is that people are telling about Christ, whether they are sincere or not. This is what makes me glad. I will keep on being glad,
text: Amaa a mo̱ŋ gye̱ ase̱ŋ ko̱ ne̱ a tiri‑o. Ke̱tɔ ne̱ ki tiri‑o e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ bamo̱ e̱ tɔwe̱ ase̱ŋ‑ɔ e̱kpa timaa si bɛɛɛ e̱bɔye̱ se̱, Kristoo ase̱ŋ ne̱ ba tɔwe̱. Ane̱ŋ bo̱ mo̱ kɔne̱.

ref: because I know that your prayers and the help that comes from the Spirit of Christ Jesus will keep me safe.
text: Amaa mo̱ akatɔ i gyi a bo̱ tii si, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ŋ nyi fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ e̱ ba mo̱ne̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱‑ɔ na Yeesuu Kristoo a kufwiiŋe timaa‑o na ɔ bo̱ lee mo̱ le̱e̱ tiikpa mfe̱e̱.

ref: If I live, it will be for Christ, and if I die, I will gain even more.
text: A le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ Kristoo wo̱re̱ kpeŋ ne̱ n te bo̱ sa. Ne̱ mo̱‑ɔ mo̱ ya wu, mo̱ e̱ nya ŋkpa so̱so̱ ne̱ m bware n kyo̱ŋ mfe̱e̱ a mmo̱‑ɔ.

ref: I don't know what to choose. I could keep on living and doing something useful.
text: Sɛɛ n kye̱na na n de̱e̱ waa kusuŋ sa Kristoo, na ŋ nya ase̱sɛ bwe̱e̱tɔ sa mò̱ ne̱e̱, bɛɛɛ ŋ wu ne̱e̱ ooo, mo̱ŋ nyi.

ref: It is a hard choice to make. I want to die and be with Christ, because this would be much better.
text: Ŋkpa ooo, lowi ooo, mo̱ e̱ kpa. Amaa mo̱ e̱ yo̱rɔwe̱ fe̱yɛ n le̱e̱ ŋkpa mɔ‑rɔ yɔ Kristoo ase̱. Amo̱ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ weetee a bware nɛɛnɛɛ.

ref: But I know that all of you still need me. This is why I am sure I will stay on to help you grow and be happy in your faith.
text: Ane̱ŋ ne̱ a bware bo̱ sa mo̱ne̱‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, mo̱ e̱ kɔɔre̱ a n gyi fe̱yɛ mo̱ e̱ kye̱na mo̱ne̱ ase̱ a m bo̱ yɔ, na ŋ nya kya mo̱ne̱‑rɔ a mo̱nꞌ daŋ ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi‑ro, na mo̱ne̱ akatɔ gyi Kristoo awuye kakye̱na‑ɔ‑rɔ.

ref: Then, when I visit you again, you will have good reason to take great pride in Christ Jesus because of me.
text: Ane̱ŋ se̱‑ɔ, mo̱ ya ba mo̱ne̱ ase̱, bo̱ le̱e̱ mo̱ se̱‑ɔ, mo̱ne̱ akatɔ i gyi, na mo̱nꞌ kyo̱rɔ Kristoo Yeesuu.

ref: You saw me suffer, and you still hear about my troubles. Now you must suffer in the same way.
text: Ɔɔ te̱e̱ mo̱ne̱ ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ bo̱ kɔ e̱kɔ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a dɛɛ ŋu fe̱yɛ n dɛɛ mo̱ e̱ kɔ, ne̱ mo̱ne̱ i nu fe̱yɛ n saŋ mo̱ e̱ kɔ e̱mo̱ mbe̱yɔmɔ‑ɔ.

ref: Instead he gave up everything and became a slave, when he became like one of us.
text: Ke̱tɔ ne̱ ɔɔ waa‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ ɔɔ baa mò̱ e̱ye̱e̱ kaase̱ ne̱e̱, ne̱ ɔɔ taa dimaadi ko̱yo̱wɔre̱gyi, ne̱ oo kii nyiŋkpasɛ, ne̱ ɔɔ waa fe̱yɛ ɔko̱ ke̱nya‑ɔ.

ref: Then God gave Christ the highest place and honored his name above all others.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ ne̱ Wuribware̱ a sa mò̱ ke̱dabe̱ ne̱ ko̱ kyɔ ke̱dabe̱ ke̱maa‑ɔ. Ne̱ ɔɔ sa mò̱ ke̱nyare̱ ne̱ ko̱ kyɔ ke̱ke̱maa‑ɔ.

ref: So at the name of Jesus everyone will bow down, those in heaven, on earth, and under the earth.
text: Ane̱ŋ se̱‑ɔ, bamo̱ ya nu Yeesuu ke̱nyare̱ se̱, amɔ ke̱tɔ ke̱maa na ɔke̱maa ne̱ ɔ bo̱ so̱so̱ na swe̱e̱re̱ mɔ se̱ na swe̱e̱re̱‑ɔ kaase̱‑ɔ i kpuni aŋurii mò̱ ayaa‑rɔ.

ref: And to the glory of God the Father everyone will openly agree, “Jesus Christ is Lord!” Lights in the World
text: Na bamo̱ pɛɛɛ faa‑rɔ tɔwe̱ fe̱yɛ Yeesuu Kristoo e̱ gye̱ bamo̱ nyaŋpe̱, na bo̱ kyo̱rɔ mò̱ se̱ Wuribware̱.” Mo̱ne̱ du ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ kiferi ne̱ ke̱ e̱ laŋŋe̱‑rɔ kibugyii‑ro‑o

ref: My dear friends, you always obeyed when I was with you. Now that I am away, you should obey even more. So work with fear and trembling to discover what it really means to be saved.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ, mo̱ anyare̱ timaa, a tiri fe̱yɛ hare̱e̱ mo̱ a mo̱ŋ bo̱ mo̱ne̱ ase̱‑ɔ gbaa, mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ kya se̱ bu mo̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a bu mo̱ saŋ ne̱ m bo̱ mo̱ne̱ ase̱‑ɔ. Mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ bu Wuribware̱, na mo̱nꞌ se̱re̱ mò̱, na mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ waa asuŋ keŋkeŋ sa mò̱, na mo̱nꞌ nya kaapo̱ fe̱yɛ ɔɔ kyɔ mo̱rɔwe̱ mo̱ne̱.

ref: Your faith in the Lord and your service are like a sacrifice offered to him. And my own blood may have to be poured out with the sacrifice. If this happens, I will be glad and rejoice with you.
text: Mo̱ne̱ Kristoo ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi ne̱ mo̱ne̱ de‑o du ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ a de kabo̱ mo̱ne̱ e̱ mɔɔ mo̱ne̱ e̱ lɔŋŋɔ Wuribware̱‑ɔ. Ne̱ Wuribware̱ e̱ kpa fe̱yɛ ŋ wu mfe̱e̱, a bo̱ mo̱ kɔne̱, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ ya wu, mo̱ ŋkpa du ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ nta ne̱ baa twiiri we̱e̱ kabo̱ ne̱ bo̱ de bo̱ lɔŋŋɔ Wuribware̱‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ.

ref: In the same way, you should be glad and rejoice with me. Timothy and Epaphroditus
text: Ane̱ŋ dɛɛ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ gbaa, mo̱nꞌ sa a a waa mo̱ne̱ kɔne̱, na mo̱ne̱ akatɔ gyi fe̱yɛ mo̱‑ɔ. Timotii na Ipafradiitus

ref: I want to be encouraged by news about you. So I hope the Lord Jesus will soon let me send Timothy to you.
text: N de te̱maa fe̱yɛ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu e̱ sa kpa na n suŋ Timotii mo̱ne̱ ase̱ ŋke mfe̱ne̱ mɔ‑rɔ, na ɔ nya bo̱ tɔwe̱ mo̱ne̱ ase̱ŋ gywii mo̱, na wɔre̱ nya nya mo̱.

ref: I don't have anyone else who cares about you as much as he does.
text: Mò̱ wo̱re̱ e̱ gye̱ se̱sɛ ne̱ mò̱ mfɛɛre̱ du fe̱yɛ mo̱ lee‑o. Ne̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ si mo̱ne̱ ase̱ŋ mɔ tiri mò̱ bwe̱e̱tɔ.

ref: The others think only about what interests them and not about what concerns Christ Jesus.
text: Amaa bamo̱ ne̱ baa saŋ‑ɔ fe̱raa, Yeesuu Kristoo ase̱ŋ mo̱ŋ tiri bamo̱, amɔ amo̱ ne̱ a gye̱ bamo̱ lee‑o wo̱re̱ kpeŋ.

ref: But you know what kind of person Timothy is. He has worked with me like a son in spreading the good news.
text: Ŋ nyi fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ fɔŋfɔŋ kyɔ mo̱ne̱ nyi ane̱ŋ ne̱ Timotii du‑o. Mo̱ aa mò̱ a waa ase̱ŋ timaa‑o ko̱tɔwe̱ kusuŋ ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ se̱sɛ na mò̱ gyi‑o.

ref: I hope to send him to you, as soon as I find out what is going to happen to me.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ, n de te̱maa fe̱yɛ mo̱ ya nu ke̱tɔ ne̱ ke̱ e̱ ba mo̱ se̱‑ɔ, mo̱ i suŋ mò̱ na m bo̱ kyo̱ŋwe̱ mo̱ne̱ ase̱.

ref: And I feel sure the Lord will also let me come soon.
text: Amaa mo̱ e̱ kɔɔre̱ a n gyi fe̱yɛ ke̱tɔ ma kyee, ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ e̱ sa mo̱ kpa fe̱yɛ m ba mo̱ne̱ ase̱.

ref: I think I ought to send my dear friend Epaphroditus back to you. He is a follower and a worker and a soldier of the Lord, just as I am. You sent him to look after me,
text: Mbe̱yɔmɔ mo̱ e̱ fa fe̱yɛ a tiri fe̱yɛ m ba ane̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ Ipafradiitus bo̱ kyo̱ŋwe̱ mo̱ne̱. Mo̱ aa mò̱ ya waa kusuŋ, ne̱ ane̱ gye̱ Kristoo kusuŋ‑o‑ro asoogyaa, ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a taa mò̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ kabɔɔ suŋ bo̱ kyo̱ŋwe̱ mo̱ ase̱, na ɔ de̱e̱ kya mo̱‑rɔ saŋ ke̱maa ne̱ a tiri mo̱‑ɔ.

ref: but now he is eager to see you. He is worried, because you heard he was sick.
text: Mbe̱yɔmɔ ke̱tɔ se̱ ne̱ n de mò̱ mo̱ e̱ kyo̱ŋwe̱ mo̱ne̱‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ o nyiŋŋi mo̱ne̱ bwe̱e̱tɔ. Aa tɔɔraa mò̱ bwe̱e̱tɔ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ a nu fe̱yɛ ɔɔ lɔ.

ref: In fact, he was very sick and almost died. But God was kind to him, and also to me, and he kept me from being burdened down with sorrow.
text: Kase̱ŋtiŋ si fe̱raa ɔɔ lɔ hare̱e̱ o dee a o wu. Amaa Wuribware̱ a ŋu mò̱ e̱wɛɛ na ŋ gbaa mo̱ e̱wɛɛ. Bo̱ le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ɔɔ dɛɛ wu ne̱e̱, weetee mo̱ i su a m bo̱ tii mo̱ awo̱re̱fɔɔ ne̱ mo̱ i gyi tiikpa mfe̱e̱‑ɔ se̱.

ref: Now I am more eager than ever to send Epaphroditus back again. You will be glad to see him, and I won't have to worry any longer.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ mo̱ akatɔ a gyi fe̱yɛ mo̱ a de mò̱ mo̱ e̱ kyo̱ŋwe̱ mo̱ne̱, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ ya be̱e̱ ŋu mò̱, mo̱ne̱ akatɔ i gyi, na bo̱ le̱e̱ ane̱ŋ se̱‑ɔ, a sa a mo̱ ase̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ i ŋu‑o kwaase̱.

ref: Be sure to give him a cheerful welcome, just as people who serve the Lord deserve.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ mo̱nꞌ kɔɔre̱ mò̱ kakatɔgyi‑ro, na mo̱nꞌ sa mo̱ne̱ nyaŋpe̱ Kristoo aŋsɛ na kusuŋ. Ane̱ŋ a ase̱sɛ ne̱ bo̱ du fe̱yɛ mò̱‑ɔ bware fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ bu bamo̱.

ref: Finally, my dear friends, be glad that you belong to the Lord. It doesn't bother me to write the same things to you that I have written before. In fact, it is for your own good.
text: Mo̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana, pwɛɛ na n dɛɛ tɔwe̱ mo̱ ase̱ŋ‑ɔ bo̱ gye̱ kɛɛ‑ɔ, mo̱ e̱ tɔwe̱ a n gywii mo̱ne̱ fe̱yɛ bo̱ le̱e̱ ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ gye̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ ase̱sɛ‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, mo̱nꞌ sa a mo̱ne̱ akatɔ gyi. Ke̱tɔ maa tɔɔraa mo̱ fe̱yɛ m be̱e̱ kyo̱rɛɛ ke̱tɔ ne̱ mo̱ a kyɔ kyo̱rɛɛ bo̱ kyo̱ŋwe̱ mo̱ne̱‑ɔ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ a kuŋ mo̱ne̱, na a lee mo̱ne̱ le̱e̱ e̱bɔye̱‑rɔ.

ref: Watch out for those people who behave like dogs! They are evil and want to do more than just circumcise you.
text: Mo̱ i yii mo̱ne̱ se̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ sa Yudaa awuye ko̱ ne̱ mo̱ e̱ te̱e̱ bamo̱ ɛ igyono na e̱bɔye̱ awaapo̱ na ŋyo̱wɔre̱ ate̱ŋŋe̱po̱‑ɔ se̱. Bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ yɛ a tiri fe̱yɛ bo̱ te̱ŋŋe̱ Kristoo awuye pɛɛɛ atwe̱e̱tu‑o ne̱ n de.

ref: although I could. Others may brag about themselves, but I have more reason to brag than anyone else.
text: N dɛɛ mo̱ e̱ kpa ne̱e̱, bo̱ le̱e̱ mo̱ kayo̱wɔre̱ se̱‑ɔ, mo̱ e̱ taare̱ a n kyo̱rɔ mo̱ e̱ye̱e̱, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ n de ke̱tɔ se̱ ne̱ n kyo̱rɔ mo̱ e̱ye̱e̱‑ɔ kyo̱ŋ se̱sɛ ke̱maa.

ref: I was circumcised when I was eight days old, and I am from the nation of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a true Hebrew. As a Pharisee, I strictly obeyed the Law of Moses.
text: Mo̱nꞌ nu. Bamo̱ a ko̱we̱ mo̱‑ɔ, kake buruwase̱po̱‑ɔ ne̱ baa te̱ŋ mo̱ ko̱twe̱e̱tu. Isireeliinyi e̱ gye̱ mo̱. Ne̱ mo̱ a le̱e̱ Bɛnyamiŋ a kasu‑o‑ro. Mo̱ ako̱we̱po̱ gye̱ Heebrii awuye kase̱ŋtiŋ ne̱e̱. Ne̱ mo̱ a gya ane̱ mbraa ne̱ Wuribware̱ a sa ane̱ Yudaa awuye‑o si fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ Farisii awuye‑o a gya se̱‑ɔ.

ref: And I was so eager I even made trouble for the church. I did everything the Law demands in order to please God.
text: Ne̱ mo̱ a kpa Wuribware̱ a mbraa amo̱ ase̱ŋ bwe̱e̱tɔ, hare̱e̱ mo̱ a waa asɔre̱e̱ awuye awo̱re̱fɔɔ. Ne̱ mo̱ a gya mbraa amo̱ se̱ pɛɛɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ ɔko̱ maa taare̱ a ɔ po̱rɔ mo̱ fe̱yɛ ma gya mmo̱ se̱‑ɔ.

ref: All I want is to know Christ and the power that raised him to life. I want to suffer and die as he did,
text: Ke̱tɔ ne̱ mo̱ e̱ kpa‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ n gyii Kristoo, na ŋ nya ke̱yaale̱ŋ ne̱ Wuribware̱ a ba bo̱ kyiŋŋi Kristoo le̱e̱ lowi‑ro‑o ko̱ko̱. Ne̱ mo̱ e̱ kpa a ŋ ŋu ase̱ŋ ne̱ Kristoo a ŋu‑o, na ŋ wu fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ oo wu‑o.

ref: so that somehow I also may be raised to life. Running toward the Goal
text: Na Wuribware̱ ya sure, na ɔ sa a ŋ gbaa n kyiŋŋi le̱e̱ lowi‑ro yɔ ŋkpa‑rɔ. Kristoonyi kakye̱na‑rɔ du ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mò̱ a se̱re̱ e̱naŋ‑ɔ

ref: I have not yet reached my goal, and I am not perfect. But Christ has taken hold of me. So I keep on running and struggling to take hold of the prize.
text: N gye̱ sa ne̱ ŋ yɛ mo̱ a kyɔ nya atɔ mɔ pɛɛɛ ne̱e̱ bɛɛɛ mo̱ a kyɔ kii se̱sɛ timaa lo̱we̱ ne̱e̱. Amaa m maa e̱naŋ se̱ keŋkeŋ, na ŋ nya gya atɔ mɔ pɛɛɛ kra, na a kii mo̱ lee fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ dɛɛ ne̱ Kristoo Yeesuu a kra mo̱, ne̱ ɔɔ sa ne̱ mo̱ a kii mò̱ se̱sɛ‑ɔ.

ref: I run toward the goal, so I can win the prize of being called to heaven. This is the prize God offers because of what Christ Jesus has done.
text: N se̱re̱ e̱naŋ se̱ mo̱ e̱ yɔ kɛɛ ne̱e̱, na ŋ ya nya ke̱tanne̱bu. Ke̱mo̱ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ te̱e̱ mo̱ fe̱yɛ m bo̱rɔ Kristoo Yeesuu si ya kye̱na mò̱ ase̱ so̱so̱.

ref: All of us who are mature should think in this same way. And if any of you think differently, God will make it clear to you.
text: To, ane̱ pɛɛɛ ne̱ ane̱ mo̱ŋ lɛɛ ane̱ gye̱ ŋyaagyi ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi‑o‑ro‑o sure ke̱tɔ ne̱ mo̱ a de̱ŋ tɔwe̱ mɔ‑ɔ se̱. Ne̱ ɔko̱ mɔ e̱ ma sure si, Wuribware̱ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ o lee‑ro, na ɔ bo̱ kaapo̱ mò̱.

ref: But we must keep going in the direction that we are now headed.
text: Kanɔ ŋke̱maa ooo, mo̱nꞌ sa a ane̱ de̱e̱ gya e̱kpa ne̱ ane̱ a kyɔ gya se̱ bo̱ fo̱ mbe̱yɔmɔ‑ɔ se̱.

ref: My friends, I want you to follow my example and learn from others who closely follow the example we set for you.
text: Mo̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana, mo̱nꞌ kase̱ mo̱‑rɔ. Na mo̱nꞌ kase̱ bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ gya ane̱ tɔkaapo̱ a e̱kpa‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ‑rɔ.

ref: that they are headed for hell! They worship their stomachs and brag about the disgusting things they do. All they can think about are the things of this world.
text: Bamo̱ ŋkpa kɛɛ‑ɔ, ba yɔ awo̱re̱fɔɔ de̱e̱kpa‑rɔ ne̱e̱. A le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ba kpa ateese bo̱ kyɔ ane̱ŋ ne̱ ba kpa Wuribware̱‑ɔ. Atɔ ne̱ weetee bo̱ peere‑o, ne̱ bamo̱ fe̱raa ba kaapo̱ e̱ye̱e̱ amo̱ se̱. Kaye̱ mɔ‑rɔ atɔ wo̱re̱ ase̱ŋ mfɛɛre̱ ne̱ bamo̱ fe̱raa ba fa.

ref: But we are citizens of heaven and are eagerly waiting for our Savior to come from there. Our Lord Jesus Christ
text: Amaa ane̱ fe̱raa ane̱ gye̱ Wuribware̱ se̱ agyi ne̱e̱, ne̱ ane̱ gywii ane̱ ɔmo̱rɔwe̱po̱ na nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu Kristoo ke̱le̱e̱ so̱so̱ ba‑ɔ.

ref: Dear friends, I love you and long to see you. Please keep on being faithful to the Lord. You are my pride and joy. Paul Encourages the Lord's Followers
text: Amo̱se̱ se̱‑ɔ, mo̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana ne̱ mo̱ e̱ kpa mo̱ne̱ ase̱ŋ bwe̱e̱tɔ, ne̱ mo̱ e̱ kpa mo̱ne̱ ke̱be̱e̱ŋu, ne̱ mo̱ne̱ kakye̱na‑rɔ bo̱ mo̱ kɔne̱, ne̱ ka sa ne̱ mo̱ e̱ kaapo̱ mo̱ e̱ye̱e̱‑ɔ, ŋ yɛ, mo̱nꞌ ye̱re̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ a ke̱be̱gya‑ɔ se̱ keŋkeŋ.

ref: Euodia and Syntyche, you belong to the Lord, so I beg you to stop arguing with each other.
text: Mbe̱yɔmɔ, mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ mo̱ne̱ akye̱e̱, fo̱ Yodiya na fo̱ Sintikee, ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ a tɛɛ mo̱ne̱ gye̱ se̱sɛ na mò̱ ko̱we̱bɛɛ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ a ko̱ko̱we̱bɛɛ‑ɔ‑rɔ se̱‑ɔ, mo̱nꞌ waa kanɔ.

ref: And, my true partner, I ask you to help them. These women have worked together with me and with Clement and with the others in spreading the good news. Their names are now written in the book of life.
text: Ne̱ m be̱e̱ mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ fo̱ Sisigoo fe̱yɛ fo̱ kya akye̱e̱‑ɔ‑rɔ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ baa waa kusuŋ keŋkeŋ sa ne̱ ase̱sɛ a nu ase̱ŋ timaa‑o. So̱so̱ ne̱ Wuribware̱ de wo̱re̱ ko̱ ne̱ ɔɔ kyo̱rɛɛ bamo̱ ne̱ ba nya ŋkpa na kukyure ne̱ a mo̱ŋ de kɛɛ‑ɔ anyare̱ waa‑rɔ. Akye̱e̱ amo̱ na Ke̱lɛmɛns na bamo̱ ne̱ mo̱ aa bamo̱ a waa kusuŋ‑o anyare̱ bo̱ wo̱re̱ amo̱‑rɔ.

ref: Always be glad because of the Lord! I will say it again: Be glad.
text: Mo̱nꞌ sa a mo̱ne̱ akatɔ gyi saŋ ke̱maa, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ gye̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Kristoo ase̱sɛ ne̱e̱. M be̱e̱ ŋ yɛ, mo̱nꞌ sa a mo̱ne̱ akatɔ gyi.

ref: Always be gentle with others. The Lord will soon be here.
text: Mo̱nꞌ sa a ɔke̱maa ŋu fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ a yuri mo̱ne̱ e̱ye̱e̱. A saŋ kafwe̱e̱, ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ i kiŋŋi a ɔ ba.

ref: Don't worry about anything, but pray about everything. With thankful hearts offer up your prayers and requests to God.
text: Mo̱ne̱ ma sa a ko̱tɔko̱ ase̱ŋ tɔɔraa mo̱ne̱. Saŋ ke̱maa ne̱ mo̱ne̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱‑ɔ, mo̱nꞌ sa Wuribware̱ aŋsɛ.

ref: Then, because you belong to Christ Jesus, God will bless you with peace that no one can completely understand. And this peace will control the way you think and feel.
text: Mo̱ne̱ ya waa amo̱‑ɔ, Wuribware̱ e̱ sa mo̱ne̱ mò̱ kaye̱e̱yuri. Mò̱ kaye̱e̱yuri‑o kyɔ bwe̱e̱tɔ hare̱e̱ gbaa ane̱ maa taare̱ a ane̱ nu kamo̱ kaase̱ lo̱we̱. Ka kye̱na mo̱ne̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ na mfɛɛre̱‑rɔ, na mo̱nꞌ nya kya se̱ kii Kristoo Yeesuu ase̱sɛ.

ref: Finally, my friends, keep your minds on whatever is true, pure, right, holy, friendly, and proper. Don't ever stop thinking about what is truly worthwhile and worthy of praise.
text: Mo̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana, ŋkee mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ fa atɔ timaa ne̱ a de ke̱nyare̱‑ɔ mfɛɛre̱ na atɔ ne̱ a gye̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ, ne̱ a sa se̱sɛ ke̱dabe̱, ne̱ a bware, ne̱ a mo̱ŋ de iyisi, ne̱ a gyi akatɔ, ne̱ a sa ne̱ ba kyo̱rɔ se̱sɛ‑ɔ.

ref: You know the teachings I gave you, and you know what you heard me say and saw me do. So follow my example. And God, who gives peace, will be with you. Paul Gives Thanks for the Gifts He Was Given
text: Na mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ waa atɔ pɛɛɛ ne̱ mo̱ a kaapo̱ mo̱ne̱, na amo̱ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a ŋu fe̱yɛ mo̱ a waa‑ɔ. Na kaye̱e̱yuri sapo̱‑ɔ Wuribware̱ gya mo̱ne̱ kamɛɛ. Pɔɔl a sa bamo̱ aŋsɛ fe̱yɛ bamo̱ a ke mò̱ atɔ‑ɔ

ref: The Lord has made me very grateful that at last you have thought about me once again. Actually, you were thinking about me all along, but you didn't have any chance to show it.
text: Mbe̱yɔmɔ, mo̱ne̱ a be̱e̱ sa ne̱ mo̱ kakye̱na ne̱ n te bo̱ sa Wuribware̱‑ɔ a waa kɔne̱, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mbe̱yɔmɔ mo̱ne̱ a be̱e̱ kaapo̱ ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ e̱ kpa mo̱ ase̱ŋ‑ɔ. Ŋ nyi fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ e̱ kpa mo̱ ase̱ŋ saŋ ke̱maa, amaa aa kyee fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ a nya kpa bo̱ kaapo̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ e̱ kpa mo̱ ase̱ŋ.

ref: I am not complaining about having too little. I have learned to be satisfied with whatever I have.
text: N gye̱ ko̱tɔko̱ ne̱ mo̱ e̱ kpa‑ɔ se̱ ne̱ mo̱ e̱ tɔwe̱ amo̱‑ɔ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ŋ nyi fe̱yɛ ke̱tɔ ke̱maa ne̱ n de‑o a baare sa mo̱.

ref: I know what it is to be poor or to have plenty, and I have lived under all kinds of conditions. I know what it means to be full or to be hungry, to have too much or too little.
text: Saŋ ko̱, mo̱ŋ de sɛye̱, saŋ ko̱ mɔ, n de atɔ bwe̱e̱tɔ. To̱ŋ ke̱maa ne̱ m bo̱ saŋ ke̱maa‑ɔ, ŋ nyi ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ e̱ kra mo̱ e̱ye̱e̱‑ɔ. Hare̱e̱ mo̱ ya nya gyi kpo̱ne̱, bɛɛɛ ako̱ŋ i de mo̱ ooo, a bware. Hare̱e̱ n de bwe̱e̱tɔ, bɛɛɛ n de kafwe̱e̱ ooo, a bware.

ref: It was good of you to help me when I was having such a hard time.
text: Amaa mo̱ne̱ a waa atɔ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ a kya mo̱‑rɔ saŋ ne̱ ase̱ŋ a to̱ mo̱‑ɔ.

ref: My friends at Philippi, you remember what it was like when I started preaching the good news in Macedonia. After I left there, you were the only church that became my partner by giving blessings and by receiving them in return.
text: Mo̱ aa mo̱ne̱ pɛɛɛ nyi dame̱naŋsɛ fe̱yɛ saŋ ne̱ ane̱ a le̱e̱ Yeesuu kuŋu si ase̱ŋ timaa‑o ko̱tɔwe̱ mo̱ne̱ Makedoniya swe̱e̱re̱ se̱‑ɔ, ne̱ baa gya mo̱ le̱e̱ mfe̱ŋ‑ɔ se̱, mo̱ne̱ dooo e̱ gye̱ asɔre̱e̱ awuye ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a kya mo̱‑rɔ. Saŋ amo̱‑ɔ, mo̱ne̱ ya nya ko̱tɔko̱, mo̱ dɛɛ mo̱ ya nya, ne̱ mo̱ ya nya ŋyure, mo̱ne̱ dɛɛ mo̱ne̱ ya nya.

ref: I have been paid back everything, and with interest. I am completely satisfied with the gifts you sent with Epaphroditus. They are like a sweet-smelling offering or like the right kind of sacrifice that pleases God.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ mo̱ e̱ kpa a mo̱nꞌ nu fe̱yɛ ke̱tɔ ne̱ mo̱ a nya le̱e̱ mo̱ne̱ ase̱‑ɔ gbaa kyɔ ke̱tɔ ne̱ ki tiri mo̱‑ɔ. Mo̱ a nya ke̱tɔ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a taa sa Ipafradiitus na ɔ bo̱ kyo̱ŋwe̱ mo̱‑ɔ. Aa baare sa mo̱. Ke̱tɔ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a bo̱ kyo̱ŋwe̱ mo̱‑ɔ du ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ alɔŋŋɔtɔ ne̱ a bo̱ kɔne̱, ne̱ a gyi Wuribware̱ akatɔ, ne̱ ɔ kɔɔre̱‑ɔ.

ref: I pray that God will take care of all your needs with the wonderful blessings that come from Christ Jesus!
text: Ne̱ ko̱tɔko̱ e̱ bo̱‑rɔ ne̱ ki tiri mo̱ne̱, Wuribware̱ e̱ de̱ŋ ɔ sa mo̱ne̱, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ŋyure ne̱ ane̱ a bo̱rɔ Kristoo Yeesuu si nya‑ɔ kyɔ bwe̱e̱tɔ.

ref: May God our Father be praised forever and ever. Amen. Final Greetings
text: Mo̱nꞌ sa a ane̱ se̱ Wuribware̱ nya ke̱dabe̱ na wuraa nsu pɛɛɛ. Amɛye̱.

ref: Give my greetings to all who are God's people because of Christ Jesus. The Lord's followers here with me send you their greetings.
text: Mo̱ e̱ ka mo̱ne̱ ɔke̱maa ne̱ ɔ gya Kristoo Yeesuu si‑o kanɔ. Ane̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana ne̱ bo̱ bo̱ mo̱ ase̱‑ɔ pɛɛɛ mɔ e̱ ka mo̱ne̱ kanɔ.

ref: All of God's people send their greetings, especially those in the service of the Emperor.
text: Wuribware̱ ase̱sɛ ne̱ bo̱ gye̱ Roma owure dabe̱ a lɔŋ‑ɔ‑rɔ awuye‑o na Wuribware̱ a ase̱sɛ ne̱ bo̱ tii si bo̱ bo̱ mfe̱e̱‑ɔ e̱ ka mo̱ne̱ kanɔ.

ref: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless your life!
text: Mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu Kristoo yure mo̱ne̱. Amɛye̱.

ref: Each time we pray for you, we thank God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ.
text: Saŋ ke̱maa ne̱ ane̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu Kristoo mò̱ se̱ Wuribware̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱‑ɔ, mo̱ne̱ se̱‑ɔ ane̱ e̱ sa mò̱ aŋsɛ.

ref: We have heard of your faith in Christ and of your love for all God's people,
text: A le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ a nu ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ e̱ kɔɔre̱ Wuribware̱ mo̱ne̱ i gyi‑o, na ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ e̱ kpa Wuribware̱ ase̱sɛ ase̱ŋ‑ɔ.

ref: because what you hope for is kept safe for you in heaven. You first heard about this hope when you believed the true message, which is the good news.
text: Ke̱tɔ se̱ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ e̱ waa amo̱‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ gywii ke̱tɔ timaa ne̱ Wuribware̱ a taa bo̱ be̱ya so̱so̱ gywii mo̱ne̱‑ɔ ne̱e̱. Saŋ ne̱ ɔko̱ a tɔwe̱ Wuribware̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ‑o gywii mo̱ne̱‑ɔ, ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a nu amo̱ ase̱ŋ.

ref: The good news is spreading all over the world with great success. It has spread in this same way among you, ever since the first day you learned the truth about God's wonderful kindness
text: Ase̱ŋ timaa bo̱ le̱e̱ Yeesuu kuŋu si mɔ dɛɛ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ a saŋŋe̱‑rɔ a yɔ swe̱e̱re̱ mɔ se̱ to̱ŋ ke̱maa, ne̱ a baa ŋyure. Ane̱ŋ dɛɛ ne̱ aa kya se̱ sa mo̱ne̱ ŋyure mo̱ne̱ kakye̱na‑rɔ le̱e̱ hare̱e̱ kake ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a nu ase̱ŋ‑ɔ, ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a nu kaase̱, ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a sure si fe̱yɛ kase̱ŋtiŋ ne̱ Wuribware̱ a ŋu mo̱ne̱ e̱wɛɛ.

ref: He is also the one who told us about the love that God's Spirit has given you. The Person and Work of Christ
text: Mò̱ ya tɔwe̱ ke̱kpa ne̱ Wuribware̱ a kufwiiŋe timaa‑o a sa mo̱ne̱‑ɔ ase̱ŋ gywii ane̱.

ref: We have not stopped praying for you since the first day we heard about you. In fact, we always pray that God will show you everything he wants you to do and that you may have all the wisdom and understanding his Spirit gives.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ le̱e̱ hare̱e̱ kake ne̱ ane̱ a nu mo̱ne̱ ase̱ŋ‑ɔ, ane̱ mo̱ŋ tɛɛ yɔwe̱ ko̱ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ sa mo̱ne̱. Ke̱tɔ ne̱ ane̱ gye̱ ŋkpɛɛ ane̱ e̱ ko̱re̱‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ a kufwiiŋe‑o sa mo̱ne̱ kanyiase̱ŋ, na mo̱nꞌ nya nu ke̱tɔ ne̱ ke̱ e̱ pre̱ mò̱‑ɔ kaase̱ lo̱we̱.

ref: Then you will live a life that honors the Lord, and you will always please him by doing good deeds. You will come to know God even better.
text: Mfaanɛɛ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ kakye̱na‑rɔ i baare a ka sa ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ kpa ke̱maa se̱, na mò̱ akatɔ gyi ane̱ se̱, na mo̱nꞌ nya kye̱na kakye̱na ne̱ ka sa a mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ waa ke̱dame̱naŋsɛ, na mo̱ne̱ Wuribware̱ kigyii waa ko̱kyɔ bo̱ tii si‑o.

ref: His glorious power will make you patient and strong enough to endure anything, and you will be truly happy.
text: Nyɔse̱po̱‑ɔ ane̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ taa mò̱ ke̱yaale̱ŋ dabe̱‑ɔ bo̱ sa mo̱ne̱ ke̱yaale̱ŋ, na mo̱nꞌ nya taare̱ nyite awo̱re̱fɔɔ ke̱maa ne̱ mo̱ne̱ i gyi bo̱ le̱e̱ ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ gya Kristoo a e̱kpa‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ se̱.

ref: God rescued us from the dark power of Satan and brought us into the kingdom of his dear Son,
text: A le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ke̱tɔ ne̱ ɔɔ waa‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ a lee ane̱ le̱e̱ kibugyii ne̱ ki de ane̱ ke̱yaale̱ŋ‑ɔ‑rɔ, ne̱ ɔɔ sa ne̱ ane̱ a tii mò̱ gyi ne̱ ɔ kpa mò̱ ase̱ŋ bwe̱e̱tɔ‑ɔ kuwure‑o si.

ref: Everything was created by him, everything in heaven and on earth, everything seen and unseen, including all forces and powers, and all rulers and authorities. All things were created by God's Son, and everything was made for him.
text: Mò̱ se̱ ne̱ Wuribware̱ a bo̱rɔ twe̱e̱ ke̱tɔ ke̱maa ne̱ ane̱ ke̱e̱‑ɔ na ke̱tɔ ke̱maa ne̱ ane̱ mo̱ŋ ke̱e̱‑ɔ ne̱ ke̱ bo̱ so̱so̱ na kaase̱‑ɔ. Wuribware̱ mbɔɔ ne̱ ɔɔ sa bamo̱ ke̱yaale̱ŋ e̱wo̱re̱se̱ e̱wo̱re̱se̱‑ɔ gbaa, mò̱ se̱ ne̱ Wuribware̱ a bo̱rɔ twe̱e̱ bamo̱. Kase̱ŋtiŋ si mò̱ se̱ ne̱ Wuribware̱ a bo̱rɔ twe̱e̱ ke̱tɔ ke̱maa, ne̱ ɔɔ taa amo̱ pɛɛɛ bo̱ sa mò̱.

ref: God's Son was before all else, and by him everything is held together.
text: O te pwɛɛ ne̱ Wuribware̱ a dɛɛ twe̱e̱ ke̱tɔ ke̱maa. Mò̱ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ ɔ de̱e̱re̱ ke̱tɔ ke̱maa se̱, ne̱ ɔ sa ne̱ a du kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

ref: He is the head of his body, which is the church. He is the very beginning, the first to be raised from death, so that he would be above all others.
text: Kristoo amo̱ e̱ gye̱ asɔre̱e̱ kuŋu. Asɔre̱e̱ awuye du ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ bamo̱ a gye̱ mò̱ kayo̱wɔre̱‑ɔ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mò̱ ya le̱e̱ asɔre̱e̱ kaase̱. Mò̱ ya be̱e̱ gye̱ ŋkpɛɛ kyiŋŋi le̱e̱ lowi‑ro, ne̱ mò̱ wo̱re̱ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ o kii ke̱tɔ ke̱maa owure.

ref: God himself was pleased to live fully in his Son.
text: A gye̱ Wuribware̱ ke̱pre̱ fe̱yɛ Yeesuu de ke̱yaale̱ŋ ne̱ mò̱, Wuribware̱ fɔŋfɔŋ, de‑o,

ref: And God was pleased for him to make peace by sacrificing his blood on the cross, so that all beings in heaven and on earth would be brought back to God.
text: na ɔ nya ba mò̱ lowi ne̱ oo wu kiyii kpare̱-abɛɛ‑rɔ se̱‑ɔ bo̱ lɔŋŋɔ Wuribware̱ na ke̱tɔ ke̱maa ne̱ ke̱ bo̱ so̱so̱ na swe̱e̱re̱‑ɔ ke̱bo̱ŋtɔ‑rɔ, na ɔ be̱e̱ nya baa kaye̱e̱yuri bamo̱ ke̱bo̱ŋtɔ‑rɔ. Fo̱ e̱ kpa Wuribware̱ se̱ ko̱yɔ, amo̱ fe̱raa kɔɔre̱ gyi keŋkeŋ

ref: You used to be far from God. Your thoughts made you his enemies, and you did evil things.
text: Mo̱ne̱ mfɛɛre̱ na awaasɛ bɔye̱‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, mo̱ne̱ aa Wuribware̱ a te̱ŋ‑nɔ saŋ ko̱, ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a kii mò̱ ado̱ŋ.

ref: But his Son became a human and died. So God made peace with you, and now he lets you stand in his presence as people who are holy and faultless and innocent.
text: Amaa mbe̱yɔmɔ fe̱raa Kristoo a taa mò̱ e̱ye̱e̱ bo̱ sa mo̱ne̱, ne̱ oo wu bo̱ lɔŋŋɔ mo̱ne̱ aa Wuribware̱ ke̱bo̱ŋtɔ‑rɔ, na ɔ nya sa a mo̱nꞌ fo̱ Wuribware̱ akatɔ‑rɔ, na mo̱ne̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ‑rɔ fwiiri, na mo̱ne̱ mo̱ŋ de bɔye̱ ko̱, na bo̱ ye̱re̱ amo̱ se̱ po̱rɔ mo̱ne̱.

ref: God's plan was to make me a servant of his church and to send me to preach his complete message to you.
text: Mo̱, Pɔɔl, ne̱ Wuribware̱ a sa ne̱ mo̱ i suŋ mo̱ e̱ sa asɔre̱e̱‑ɔ, ne̱ ɔɔ taa abware̱se̱ŋ pɛɛɛ ko̱tɔwe̱ gywii ase̱sɛ kusuŋ‑o bo̱ sa.

ref: For ages and ages this message was kept secret from everyone, but now it has been explained to God's people.
text: Wuribware̱ a ba abware̱se̱ŋ mɔ bo̱ kwe̱e̱rɔ ke̱nana ke̱maa se̱ kyee, ne̱ mbe̱yɔmɔ ɔɔ bo̱ lee bo̱ kaapo̱ mò̱ ase̱sɛ.

ref: God did this because he wanted you Gentiles to understand his wonderful and glorious mystery. And the mystery is that Christ lives in you, and he is your hope of sharing in God's glory.
text: Kase̱ŋtiŋ si, ɔɔ kra mò̱ mfɛɛre̱ fe̱yɛ o lee mò̱ ase̱ŋ kwe̱e̱rɔsɛ mɔ a ɔ bo̱ kaapo̱ mò̱ ase̱sɛ. Ase̱ŋ mɔ bo̱ dwii, ne̱ a kpe̱ŋ e̱ye̱e̱, ne̱ a gye̱ kaye̱‑rɔ ase̱sɛ pɛɛɛ ase̱ŋ. Ase̱ŋ kwe̱e̱rɔsɛ mɔ katiŋ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ Kristoo bo̱ mo̱ne̱ ase̱, ne̱ mò̱ se̱‑ɔ mo̱ne̱ de te̱maa fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ e̱ nya ke̱dabe̱ so̱so̱.

ref: We announce the message about Christ, and we use all our wisdom to warn and teach everyone, so all of Christ's followers will grow and become mature.
text: Amo̱‑ɔ se̱ ne̱ ane̱ e̱ tɔwe̱ Kristoo ase̱ŋ ane̱ i gywii ase̱sɛ pɛɛɛ. Ne̱ ane̱ de kanyiase̱ŋ pɛɛɛ ne̱ ane̱ de‑o ane̱ i yii ase̱sɛ se̱, na ane̱ e̱ kaapo̱ ɔke̱maa, na ane̱ nya sa a ɔke̱maa kii Kristoonyi kase̱ŋtiŋ.

ref: This is why I work so hard and use the mighty power he gives me.
text: Amo̱se̱ se̱ ne̱ m maa se̱ n de ke̱yaale̱ŋ dabe̱ ne̱ ɔɔ sa mo̱‑ɔ mo̱ e̱ waa mò̱ kusuŋ keŋkeŋ‑o ne̱e̱.

ref: I want you to know what a struggle I am going through for you, for God's people at Laodicea, and for all of those followers who have never met me.
text: Mo̱ e̱ kpa a mo̱nꞌ ŋu ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ a suŋ keŋkeŋ sa mo̱ne̱ Kolosii awuye na Lodikiya awuye na bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ mo̱ŋ tɛɛ ŋu mo̱‑ɔ.

ref: I do it to encourage them. Then as their hearts are joined together in love, they will be wonderfully blessed with complete understanding. And they will truly know Christ. Not only is he the key to God's mystery,
text: Mo̱ e̱ waa amo̱‑ɔ ne̱e̱ na mo̱nꞌ nya nya wɔre̱, na mo̱nꞌ nya kpa abɛɛ ase̱ŋ, na mo̱nꞌ waa kanɔ ko̱ŋko̱. Mfaanɛɛ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ kanyiase̱ŋ i tii si bo̱ fo̱ saŋ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ i nu Wuribware̱ kanyiase̱ŋ kwe̱e̱rɔsɛ‑ɔ kaase̱, na mo̱nꞌ kɔɔre̱ kamo̱ gyi lo̱we̱.

ref: I tell you these things to keep you from being fooled by fancy talk.
text: Mo̱ e̱ tɔwe̱ amo̱‑ɔ mo̱ i gywii mo̱ne̱ ne̱e̱, na ɔko̱ ma nya taa kaye̱ba kanyiase̱ŋ bo̱ pe̱nna mo̱ne̱.

ref: Even though I am not with you, I keep thinking about you. I am glad to know that you are living as you should and your faith in Christ is strong. Christ Brings Real Life
text: Hare̱e̱ mo̱ a mo̱ŋ bo̱ mo̱ne̱ ase̱‑ɔ gbaa ooo, mo̱ne̱ ase̱ŋ bo̱ mo̱ mfɛɛre̱‑rɔ. Mo̱ akatɔ a gyi fe̱yɛ mo̱ a ŋu fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ ye̱re̱ mo̱ne̱ Kristoo ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi‑o‑ro keŋkeŋ, na mo̱ne̱ ma yɔ mfe̱e̱ mo̱ne̱ e̱ ba mfe̱e̱. Mo̱nꞌ sa ape̱nnapo̱ ne̱ bo̱ de dimaadi kanyiase̱ŋ‑ɔ se̱

ref: You have accepted Christ Jesus as your Lord. Now keep on following him.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ mo̱ne̱ a tɛɛ kɔɔre̱ Kristoo fe̱yɛ ɔ gye̱ mo̱ne̱ nyaŋpe̱‑ɔ fe̱raa, mo̱nꞌ gya mò̱ se̱ ane̱ŋ ne̱ a kaapo̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ gye̱ mò̱ ase̱sɛ‑ɔ.

ref: Don't let anyone fool you by using senseless arguments. These arguments may sound wise, but they are only human teachings. They come from the powers of this world and not from Christ.
text: Amaa mo̱nꞌ sa ape̱nnapo̱‑ɔ se̱. Mo̱nꞌ sa ase̱sɛ ne̱ bo̱ de dimaadi kanyiase̱ŋ na aye̱ba ba pe̱nna mo̱ne̱, na mo̱nꞌ nya kii bamo̱ agyase̱po̱‑ɔ se̱. A le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ bamo̱ kanyiase̱ŋ‑ɔ mo̱ŋ le̱e̱ Kristoo ase̱ ne̱e̱. Kaa le̱e̱ ananatɔ ne̱ kaye̱ mɔ‑rɔ ase̱sɛ e̱ kaapo̱‑ɔ ase̱ ne̱e̱.

ref: And you are fully grown because you belong to Christ, who is over every power and authority.
text: ne̱ ŋkee mò̱ ke̱yaale̱ŋ a bo̱ kye̱na mo̱ne̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ‑rɔ. Mò̱ e̱ gye̱ Wuribware̱ a mbɔɔ pɛɛɛ ne̱ bo̱ de ke̱yaale̱ŋ so̱so̱‑ɔ bamo̱ nyaŋpe̱.

ref: You were dead, because you were sinful and were not God's people. But God let Christ make you alive, when he forgave all our sins.
text: Saŋ‑ɔ mo̱ne̱ dɛɛ mo̱ne̱ du ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ase̱sɛ ne̱ baa wu‑o. A le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ a dɛɛ mo̱ne̱ te e̱bɔye̱‑rɔ‑ɔ, a du ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ a wu‑o. Amaa Wuribware̱ a sa mo̱ne̱ kakye̱na po̱pwɛɛ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ ɔɔ sa Kristoo‑o dɛɛ. Ne̱ ɔɔ taa ane̱ e̱bɔye̱ bo̱ ke ane̱‑ɔ ne̱e̱.

ref: God wiped out the charges that were against us for disobeying the Law of Moses. He took them away and nailed them to the cross.
text: A du ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mò̱ a te̱ŋ ase̱ŋkpare̱gyi ne̱ a bo̱ Mosis a mbraa wo̱re̱‑ɔ‑rɔ, ne̱ aa kaapo̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ dɛɛ ane̱ gye̱ e̱bɔye̱ awaapo̱‑ɔ. Ne̱ a du fe̱yɛ mò̱ a taa wo̱re̱‑ɔ le̱e̱‑rɔ, ne̱ ɔɔ da mò̱ bo̱ me̱ra mò̱ kiyii kpare̱-abɛɛ‑rɔ‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ.

ref: There Christ defeated all powers and forces. He let the whole world see them being led away as prisoners when he celebrated his victory.
text: Kristoo a wu kiyii kpare̱-abɛɛ‑rɔ‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, ne̱ ɔɔ kɔ gyi Wuribware̱ a mbɔɔ bɔye̱ ne̱ bo̱ dɛɛ bo̱ de ke̱yaale̱ŋ so̱so̱‑ɔ se̱, ne̱ ɔɔ kra bamo̱, ne̱ oo ŋure bamo̱, ne̱ ɔ gye̱ ŋkpɛɛ, na bo̱ gya se̱, na ipeere de bamo̱.

ref: They are no longer part of Christ, who is the head of the whole body. Christ gives the body its strength, and he uses its joints and muscles to hold it together, as it grows by the power of God. Christ Brings New Life
text: Ane̱ŋ a se̱sɛ‑ɔ a kine Kristoo, ne̱ ɔ mo̱ŋ lɛɛ o tii Kristoo si. Amaa Kristoo mɔ du ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ se̱sɛ kuŋu‑o Abowii na e̱kyakpa na akyiini e̱ gye̱ ne̱ a de ane̱ kuŋu‑ro bo̱ kya ane̱ ŋyo̱wɔre̱ se̱. Kpa mɔ se̱ ne̱ Wuribware̱ gya se̱ ɔ sa ne̱ kayo̱wɔre̱ e̱ daŋ. Ane̱ŋ dɛɛ ne̱ Kristoo e̱ sa ne̱ mò̱ asɔre̱e̱ e̱ daŋ.

ref: After these things are used, they are no longer good for anything. So why be bothered with the rules that humans have made up?
text: Akisitɔ mɔ pɛɛɛ, se̱sɛ ya gyi amo̱ bɛɛɛ mò̱ ya nuu amo̱, ke̱tɔ a de̱ŋ lo̱we̱ ne̱e̱. Se̱sɛ dimaadi ya sa ase̱sɛ akisitɔ mɔ pɛɛɛ.

ref: Obeying these rules may seem to be the smart thing to do. They appear to make you love God more and to be very humble and to have control over your body. But they don't really have any power over our desires.
text: Akisitɔ mɔ du ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ kanyiase̱ŋ bo̱ amo̱‑rɔ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ a le̱ŋ ase̱sɛ ne̱ ba buŋŋe ba suŋ Wuribware̱ mbɔɔ, na ba baa bamo̱ e̱ye̱e̱ kaase̱, ne̱ a sa ne̱ ba waa bamo̱ e̱ye̱e̱ awo̱re̱fɔɔ. Amaa kase̱ŋtiŋ fe̱raa a mo̱ŋ de ke̱yaale̱ŋ ase̱sɛ mfɛɛre̱ bɔye̱ se̱ na bamo̱ ŋyo̱rɔwe̱ se̱.

ref: You have been raised to life with Christ. Now set your heart on what is in heaven, where Christ rules at God's right side.
text: Amaa mo̱ne̱ fe̱raa, mo̱ne̱ a nya kakye̱na po̱pwɛɛ. A du fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ a yɔwe̱ mo̱ne̱ kakye̱na de̱daa‑ɔ bo̱ sii ke̱gye̱raŋta‑rɔ, ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a kyiŋŋi le̱e̱ lowi‑ro fe̱yɛ Kristoo‑o. Amo̱se̱‑ɔ, mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ kpa atɔ ne̱ a bo̱ Wuribware̱ se̱ mfe̱ŋ ne̱ Kristoo te kuwuregya se̱ Wuribware̱ kigyise si‑o.

ref: Think about what is up there, not about what is here on earth.
text: Mo̱ne̱ ma kaŋ taa mo̱ne̱ mfɛɛre̱ bo̱ dɔŋŋɔ kaye̱ mɔ‑rɔ atɔ se̱, amaa mo̱nꞌ taa mo̱ne̱ mfɛɛre̱ bo̱ dɔŋŋɔ atɔ ne̱ a bo̱ so̱so̱‑ɔ se̱.

ref: You died, which means that your life is hidden with Christ, who sits beside God.
text: Mo̱ne̱ kakye̱na de̱daa‑ɔ a wu, ne̱ baa pure kamo̱, ne̱ Kristoo a taa mo̱ne̱ kakye̱na po̱pwɛɛ‑ɔ bo̱ kwe̱e̱rɔ Wuribware̱ ase̱, ne̱ ɔ de̱e̱re̱ se̱ nɛɛnɛɛ ɔ sa mo̱ne̱.

ref: Don't be controlled by your body. Kill every desire for the wrong kind of sex. Don't be immoral or indecent or have evil thoughts. Don't be greedy, which is the same as worshiping idols.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ mo̱nꞌ yɔwe̱ ke̱bo̱rɔgyi ne̱ mo̱ne̱ dɛɛ mo̱ne̱ bo̱ ke̱mo̱‑rɔ‑ɔ bo̱ twe̱e̱. Amo̱ ako̱ e̱ gye̱ kakye̱e̱kpa na kanyare̱kpa na ayuse̱ŋ mfɛɛre̱ bɔye̱ na nyase̱pee.

ref: God is angry with people who disobey him by doing these things.
text: Wuribware̱ duŋ i fwii bamo̱ ne̱ ba waa atɔ mɔ‑ɔ se̱.

ref: And this is exactly what you did, when you lived among people who behaved in this way.
text: Mo̱ne̱ kakye̱na de̱daa‑ɔ‑rɔ, atɔ mɔ se̱ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a gya.

ref: But now you must stop doing such things. You must quit being angry, hateful, and evil. You must no longer say insulting or cruel things about others.
text: Amaa mbe̱yɔmɔ fe̱raa, mo̱nꞌ yɔwe̱ mo̱ne̱ ke̱bo̱rɔgyi bɔye̱ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ de‑o, na mo̱ne̱ ma lɛɛ sa a mo̱ne̱ iduŋ fwii, na mo̱ne̱ ma lɛɛ nya kiŋeŋtiŋ. Na mo̱ne̱ ma lɛɛ kisi abɛɛ, na mo̱ne̱ ma lɛɛ sa se̱ŋsa bo̱ kye mo̱ne̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana bɛɛɛ mo̱nꞌ saare̱ bamo̱.

ref: It doesn't matter if you are a Greek or a Jew, or if you are circumcised or not. You may even be a barbarian or a Scythian, and you may be a slave or a free person. Yet Christ is all that matters, and he lives in all of us.
text: Mo̱ne̱ a maa se̱ mo̱ne̱ i kyurowi, na mo̱nꞌ nya kii fe̱yɛ Kristoo‑o si‑o, a kaapo̱ ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ Kristoo awuye pɛɛɛ ta. Ɔko̱ mo̱ŋ lɛɛ ɔ kwe̱e̱. Griiki awuye mo̱ŋ kwe̱e̱, ne̱ Yudaa awuye kwe̱e̱, ne̱ bamo̱ ne̱ ba te̱ŋŋe̱ atwe̱e̱tu‑o mo̱ŋ kwe̱e̱, ne̱ bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ mo̱ŋ te̱ŋŋe̱‑ɔ kwe̱e̱. Hare̱e̱ swe̱e̱re̱ ko̱ se̱ ase̱sɛ na ɔko̱ se̱ ase̱sɛ ooo, bɛɛɛ mo̱ne̱ se̱ŋsa gye̱ ɔko̱ŋko̱ bɛɛɛ ɔ mo̱ŋ gye̱ ooo, bɛɛɛ bo̱ gye̱ anya bɛɛɛ bo̱ gye̱ agyi ooo, ɔko̱ mo̱ŋ lɛɛ ɔ kwe̱e̱. Amɔ Kristoo wo̱re̱ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ ɔ kyɔ bamo̱ ke̱maa. Kristoo bo̱ bamo̱ pɛɛɛ ase̱.

ref: Each one of you is part of the body of Christ, and you were chosen to live together in peace. So let the peace that comes from Christ control your thoughts. And be grateful.
text: Kristoo a te̱e̱ mo̱ne̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ bo̱ kye̱na kaye̱e̱yuri‑ro, na mo̱nꞌ waa kanɔ ko̱ŋko̱‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, mo̱nꞌ waa ke̱tɔ ke̱maa ne̱ ɔ tɔwe̱‑ɔ, na o yuri mo̱ne̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ. Na mo̱nꞌ sa mò̱ aŋsɛ saŋ ke̱maa.

ref: Whatever you say or do should be done in the name of the Lord Jesus, as you give thanks to God the Father because of him. Some Rules for Christian Living
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ ke̱tɔ ke̱maa ne̱ mo̱ne̱ e̱ waa‑ɔ bɛɛɛ mo̱ne̱ e̱ tɔwe̱‑ɔ, mo̱nꞌ waa ke̱mo̱, na mo̱nꞌ tɔwe̱ ke̱mo̱, ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu ke̱nyare̱‑rɔ. Na mo̱nꞌ bo̱rɔ Yeesuu si bo̱ sa ane̱ se̱ Wuribware̱ aŋsɛ.

ref: A wife must put her husband first. This is her duty as a follower of the Lord.
text: Akye̱e̱ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a waare̱e̱‑ɔ, mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ bu mo̱ne̱ akuri. Ane̱ŋ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ a bware fe̱yɛ Kristoo akye̱e̱ waa.

ref: Parents, don't be hard on your children. If you are, they might give up.
text: Na mo̱ne̱ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ gye̱ ako̱we̱po̱‑ɔ mɔ, mo̱ne̱ ma waa ke̱tɔ ne̱ ki i fwii mo̱ne̱ agyi iduŋ‑o. N gye̱ ane̱ŋ, bamo̱ abaa‑rɔ e̱ yɔre̱.

ref: Slaves, you must always obey your earthly masters. Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. Honor the Lord and serve your masters with your whole heart.
text: Mo̱ne̱ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ gye̱ anya‑ɔ mɔ, mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ bu mo̱ne̱ anyaŋpe̱ ne̱ bo̱ bo̱ kaye̱ mɔ‑rɔ‑ɔ kpa ke̱maa se̱. Mo̱ne̱ ma suŋ bamo̱ akatɔ se̱ wo̱re̱, amaa mo̱nꞌ lee mo̱ne̱ mme‑ro bo̱ suŋ bamo̱, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ i suŋ.

ref: In fact, the Lord Christ is the one you are really serving, and you know he will reward you.
text: Amo̱ a gye̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Kristoo ne̱ mo̱ne̱ i suŋ‑o si‑o, mò̱ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ ɔ ka mo̱ne̱ ko̱kɔ. Mò̱ kapo̱tɛɛ ne̱ ɔɔ kpa bo̱ be̱ya mò̱ ase̱sɛ‑ɔ kako̱ ne̱ ɔ sa mo̱ne̱.

ref: Be sure to pray that God will make a way for us to spread his message and explain the mystery about Christ, even though I am in jail for doing this.
text: Na mo̱nꞌ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ sa ane̱ gbaa ane̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ sa a ane̱ nya kpa de̱e̱ tɔwe̱ Kristoo kase̱ŋtiŋ ase̱ŋ ne̱ Wuribware̱ a lee bo̱ kaapo̱ ane̱‑ɔ. Aa le̱e̱ ase̱ŋ amo̱ ko̱tɔwe̱ se̱ ne̱ baa tii mo̱ mfe̱e̱‑ɔ.

ref: Please pray that I will make the message as clear as possible.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ, mo̱nꞌ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ fe̱yɛ n tɔwe̱ ase̱ŋ amo̱ kpa timaa si, na ase̱sɛ nya nu amo̱ kaase̱ nɛɛnɛɛ.

ref: Be pleasant and hold their interest when you speak the message. Choose your words carefully and be ready to give answers to anyone who asks questions. Final Greetings
text: Mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ sa se̱ŋsa ne̱ ɔ bo̱ kɔne̱‑ɔ gywii bamo̱. Na ɔko̱ ya bise mo̱ne̱ ase̱ŋ, mo̱nꞌ gyii ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ e̱ sa mò̱ kanɔ kpe̱yaa‑ɔ. Kanɔka

ref: I am sending him to cheer you up by telling you how we are getting along.
text: Mo̱ i suŋ mò̱ mo̱ e̱ kyo̱ŋwe̱ mo̱ne̱ ase̱ ne̱e̱, na ɔ nya tɔwe̱ ane̱ŋ ne̱ ane̱ du‑o ase̱ŋ gywii mo̱ne̱, na mo̱ne̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ nya di mo̱ne̱ mme‑ro.

ref: Onesimus, the dear and faithful follower from your own group, is coming with him. The two of them will tell you everything that has happened here.
text: M be̱e̱ mo̱ i suŋ ane̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ timaa Onisimus ne̱ ane̱ e̱ kɔɔre̱ mò̱ ane̱ i gyi‑o. Ɔ gye̱ mo̱ne̱ aye̱ wuye ne̱e̱. Bamo̱ abɛɛ anyɔ‑ɔ e̱ tɔwe̱ ke̱tɔ ne̱ ke̱ e̱ waa mfe̱e̱‑ɔ a bo̱ gywii mo̱ne̱.

ref: Aristarchus is in jail with me. He sends greetings to you, and so does Mark, the cousin of Barnabas. You have already been told to welcome Mark, if he visits you.
text: Aristaakus ne̱ ɔ bo̱ mo̱ ase̱ tiikpa mfe̱e̱‑ɔ e̱ ka mo̱ne̱ kanɔ. Ane̱ŋ dɛɛ ne̱ Maak ne̱ ɔ gye̱ Bar‑Nabas mò̱ ko̱we̱bɛɛ‑ɔ e̱ ka mo̱ne̱ kanɔ.

ref: Jesus, who is known as Justus, sends his greetings. These three men are the only Jewish followers who have worked with me for the kingdom of God. They have given me much comfort.
text: Yosuwa Yusutus gbaa e̱ ka mo̱ne̱ kanɔ. Mo̱ aa abɛɛ asa mɔ e̱ waa kusuŋ ane̱ e̱ tɔwe̱ Wuribware̱ a kuwure‑o ase̱ŋ. Bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ gye̱ Yudaa awuye‑o bwe̱e̱tɔ a kɔɔre̱ Yeesuu gyi. Amaa bamo̱‑rɔ abɛɛ asa amo̱ wo̱re̱ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ mo̱ aa bamo̱ e̱ waa Wuribware̱ a kuwure‑o ase̱ŋ ko̱tɔwe̱ kusuŋ mɔ. Ne̱ bamo̱ ya sa mo̱ kakpo̱nɔkya bwe̱e̱tɔ.

ref: I have seen how much trouble he has gone through for you and for the followers in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
text: Mo̱ fɔŋfɔŋ a ŋu ane̱ŋ ne̱ ɔɔ waa kusuŋ keŋkeŋ sa mo̱ne̱ Kolosii awuye na asɔre̱e̱ awuye ne̱ bo̱ bo̱ Lodikiya maŋ‑nɔ na Hirapolis maŋ‑nɔ‑ɔ.

ref: Our dear doctor Luke sends you his greetings, and so does Demas.
text: Lukas ne̱ ɔ gye̱ dɔkɔtaa, ne̱ ane̱ e̱ kpa mò̱ ase̱ŋ bwe̱e̱tɔ‑ɔ na De̱e̱mas e̱ ka mo̱ne̱ kanɔ.

ref: Give my greetings to the followers at Laodicea, especially to Nympha and the church that meets in her home.
text: Mo̱nꞌ ka Kristoo awuye ne̱ bo̱ bo̱ Lodikiya maŋ‑nɔ‑ɔ kanɔ. Na mo̱nꞌ be̱e̱ ka ɔkye̱e̱ Nimfa na Kristoo awuye ne̱ ba gyaŋŋe̱ ba waa asɔre̱e̱ mò̱ lɔŋ‑nɔ‑ɔ kanɔ.

ref: After this letter has been read to your people, be sure to have it read in the church at Laodicea. And you should read the letter that I have sent to them.
text: Mo̱ne̱ ya kare̱ wo̱re̱ mɔ mo̱ne̱ asɔre̱e̱‑rɔ, na mo̱nꞌ sa a bo̱ be̱e̱ kare̱ mò̱ Lodikiya asɔre̱e̱‑ɔ‑rɔ mɔ. Ane̱ŋ dɛɛ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ gbaa mo̱nꞌ kare̱ wo̱re̱ ne̱ mo̱ a kyo̱rɛɛ bo̱ kyo̱ŋwe̱ Lodikiya awuye‑o.

ref: Remind Archippus to do the work that the Lord has given him to do.
text: Na mo̱nꞌ tɔwe̱ gywii Aakipus fe̱yɛ ɔ waa kusuŋ ne̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ a sa mò̱ fe̱yɛ ɔ waa‑ɔ.

ref: I am signing this letter myself: PAUL. Don't forget that I am in jail. I pray that God will be kind to you.
text: To, ŋkee mo̱, Pɔɔl, n de mo̱ fɔŋfɔŋ ke̱sare̱e̱ mo̱ e̱ kyo̱rɛɛ ase̱ŋkpare̱gyi mɔ mo̱ e̱ ka mo̱ne̱ kanɔ. Mo̱ne̱ ma taŋ se̱ fe̱yɛ n saŋ n da tiikpa mfe̱e̱. Wuribware̱ yure mo̱ne̱.

ref: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God the Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ. I pray that God will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
text: Mo̱, Pɔɔl, na Silobaanus na Timotii e̱ gye̱ ne̱ ane̱ e̱ kyo̱rɛɛ wo̱re̱ mɔ ane̱ e̱ kyo̱ŋwe̱ mo̱ne̱ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ bo̱ Tisalonikaa maŋ‑nɔ, ne̱ mo̱ne̱ gye̱ asɔre̱e̱ awuye, ne̱ mo̱ne̱ gye̱ ane̱ se̱ Wuribware̱ na ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu Kristoo ase̱sɛ‑ɔ. Ane̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ Wuribware̱ fe̱yɛ ɔ sa mo̱ne̱ ŋyure na kaye̱e̱yuri. Tisalonikaa asɔre̱e̱ awuye ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi na bamo̱ asuŋ timaa

ref: So, when you accepted the message, you followed our example and the example of the Lord. You suffered, but the Holy Spirit made you glad.
text: Ane̱ŋ se̱‑ɔ, mo̱ne̱ a kase̱ ane̱ kakye̱na‑rɔ na ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu lee‑o‑ro‑o. Na awo̱re̱fɔɔ de̱maŋte̱ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ bɛɛko̱‑ana amaŋgyi a sa ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a gyi‑o gbaa ooo, mo̱ne̱ a bo̱ kɔɔre̱ abware̱se̱ŋ‑ɔ kra‑rɔ. Ne̱ Wuribware̱ a kufwiiŋe timaa‑o a sa ne̱ mo̱ne̱ akatɔ a gyi.

ref: They also tell how you are waiting for his Son Jesus to come from heaven. God raised him from death, and on the day of judgment Jesus will save us from God's anger.
text: na ane̱ŋ ne̱ mbe̱yɔmɔ mo̱ne̱ i gywii mò̱ gyi ne̱ ɔ le̱e̱ so̱so̱ a ɔ ba‑ɔ. Wuribware̱ mò̱ gyi Yeesuu e̱ gye̱ mò̱ ne̱ oo kyiŋŋi le̱e̱ lowi‑ro‑o. Mò̱ gyi‑o dɛɛ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ ɔ ba, na ɔ bo̱ mo̱rɔwe̱ ane̱ le̱e̱ Wuribware̱ a ke̱se̱bɔgyiiri ne̱ ɔ ba a ɔ bo̱ gyiiri abɔye̱waapo̱‑ɔ‑rɔ.

ref: My friends, you know our time with you wasn't wasted.
text: Ane̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana, mo̱ne̱ fɔŋfɔŋ a ŋu fe̱yɛ ane̱ a bo̱ tɔwe̱ abware̱se̱ŋ gywii mo̱ne̱‑ɔ, ane̱ mo̱ŋ tɔwe̱ bo̱ twe̱e̱.

ref: As you remember, we had been mistreated and insulted at Philippi. But God gave us the courage to tell you the good news about him, even though many people caused us trouble.
text: Ne̱ mo̱ne̱ be̱e̱ mo̱ne̱ nyi ane̱ŋ ne̱ Filipii maŋ‑nɔ awuye a saare̱ ane̱, ne̱ baa sa ne̱ ane̱ a gyi awo̱re̱fɔɔ pwɛɛ ne̱ ane̱ a dɛɛ kyo̱ŋ ba mo̱ne̱ ase̱‑ɔ. Ne̱ ase̱sɛ bwe̱e̱tɔ a kpa fe̱yɛ bo̱ gya ane̱‑ɔ gbaa ooo, Wuribware̱ a kya ane̱‑rɔ, sa ane̱ ŋkpo̱nɔse̱e̱ ne̱ ane̱ a bo̱ tɔwe̱ mò̱ ase̱ŋ timaa‑o gywii mo̱ne̱, mo̱ne̱ aye̱ Tisalonikaa.

ref: We didn't have any hidden motives when we won you over, and we didn't try to fool or trick anyone.
text: Ase̱ŋ amo̱ mo̱ŋ gye̱ aye̱ba bɛɛɛ ŋkɔ mpe̱nna. Ane̱ mo̱ŋ fo̱ kpa amo̱ ko̱tɔwe̱‑rɔ, ne̱ ane̱ mo̱ŋ de mfɛɛre̱ bɔye̱ ko̱ ane̱ e̱ ka mo̱ne̱ ase̱ŋ ane̱ ye̱ra e̱kpa timaa si ne̱e̱.

ref: We cared so much for you, and you became so dear to us, that we were willing to give our lives for you when we gave you God's message.
text: Kase̱ŋtiŋ ane̱ a kpa mo̱ne̱ ase̱ŋ‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, n gye̱ Wuribware̱ kuŋu si ase̱ŋ timaa‑o dooo ne̱ ane̱ a kpa fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ nu bo̱ le̱e̱ ane̱ ase̱, amaa ane̱ a kpa fe̱yɛ ane̱ te̱ŋ ane̱ ŋkpa se̱ sa mo̱ne̱ bo̱ tii si.

ref: My dear friends, you surely haven't forgotten our hard work and hardships. You remember how night and day we struggled to make a living, so we could tell you God's message without being a burden to anyone.
text: Ane̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana, mo̱ne̱ a taŋ se̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ a waa ane̱ fɔŋfɔŋ kusuŋ ko̱ mpase̱ na kanye, ne̱ ane̱ a nya ane̱ ateese na atanne̱ aaa? Ane̱ a waa ane̱ŋ ne̱e̱ a mo̱ne̱ ma nya tɔwe̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ abware̱se̱ŋ ke̱bo̱tɔwe̱‑ɔ a taa ke̱kpo̱ne̱ bo̱ dɔŋŋɔ mo̱ne̱ se̱.

ref: You also know we did everything for you that parents would do for their own children.
text: Ane̱ e̱ fa fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ nyi ane̱ŋ ne̱ ane̱ a kra mo̱ne̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ se̱sɛ e̱ kra mò̱ gyi‑ana‑ɔ.

ref: We begged, encouraged, and urged each of you to live in a way that would honor God. He is the one who chose you to share in his own kingdom and glory.
text: Ne̱ ane̱ a be̱e̱ waa mo̱ne̱ wɔre̱, ne̱ ane̱ a yuri mo̱ne̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ, ne̱ ane̱ a kaapo̱ mo̱ne̱ ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱nꞌ waa na mo̱ne̱ kakye̱na‑rɔ gyi Wuribware̱ akatɔ‑ɔ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mò̱ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ ɔɔ te̱e̱ mo̱ne̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ bo̱ tii mò̱ kuwure‑o si, na mo̱nꞌ nya mò̱ ke̱dabe̱‑ɔ ko̱ko̱.

ref: We always thank God that you believed the message we preached. It came from him, and it isn't something made up by humans. You accepted it as God's message, and now he is working in you.
text: Ke̱tɔ se̱ ne̱ ane̱ be̱e̱ ane̱ e̱ sa Wuribware̱ aŋsɛ saŋ ke̱maa‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ saŋ ne̱ ane̱ a bo̱ tɔwe̱ abware̱se̱ŋ gywii mo̱ne̱‑ɔ, ane̱ a ŋu fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ mo̱ŋ nu amo̱ fe̱yɛ se̱sɛ ase̱ ne̱ aa le̱e̱, amaa mo̱ne̱ a nu amo̱ ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ ase̱ ne̱ aa le̱e̱. Amo̱se̱‑ɔ mo̱ne̱ a kɔɔre̱ gyi‑o si‑o, aa kyurowi mo̱ne̱ kakye̱na‑rɔ.

ref: My friends, you did just like God's churches in Judea and like the other followers of Christ Jesus there. And so, you were mistreated by your own people, in the same way they were mistreated by their people.
text: Ane̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana, ke̱tɔ ne̱ kaa waa ase̱sɛ ne̱ bo̱ gya Kristoo Yeesuu si Wuribware̱ asɔre̱e̱ ne̱ a bo̱ Yude̱ya swe̱e̱re̱ se̱‑ɔ dɛɛ ya waa mo̱ne̱‑ɔ. Bo̱ le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ awo̱re̱fɔɔ ne̱ Yudaa awuye a sa ne̱ baa gyi‑o dɛɛ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ aye̱ awuye a sa ne̱ mo̱ne̱ i gyi‑o.

ref: Those evil people killed the Lord Jesus and the prophets, and they even chased us away. God doesn't like what they do and neither does anyone else.
text: Yudaa awuye amo̱ ne̱ bo̱ bo̱ mfe̱ŋ‑ɔ dɛɛ ya mɔɔ Wuribware̱ akyaamɛɛ bo̱ko̱, ne̱ baa be̱e̱ bo̱ mɔɔ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu, ne̱ ŋkee baa gya ane̱ mɔ ane̱ le̱e̱ bamo̱ ase̱ bo̱ kyo̱ŋwe̱. Wuribware̱ maa kpa ane̱ŋ ne̱ baa waa‑ɔ. Baa waa ɔke̱maa mɔ bo̱ro̱kɔɔne̱.

ref: They keep us from speaking his message to the Gentiles and from leading them to be saved. They have always gone too far with their sins. Now God has finally become angry and will punish them. Paul Wants To Visit the Church Again
text: Ne̱ baa gya ane̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ ma ya tɔwe̱ gywii bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ mo̱ŋ gye̱ Yudaa awuye‑o ane̱ŋ ne̱ Wuribware̱ e̱ taare̱ a ɔ mo̱rɔwe̱ bamo̱‑ɔ. Na Yudaa awuye mɔ saŋ ba waa e̱bɔye̱ ba dɔŋŋɔ abɛɛ se̱ ba tii e̱de̱daa‑ɔ se̱. Ne̱ ŋkee fe̱raa, Wuribware̱ kaduŋfwii a sii bamo̱ se̱. Pɔɔl ke̱be̱e̱kpa bamo̱ kanɔka‑rɔ ko̱yɔ ase̱ŋ

ref: My friends, we were kept from coming to you for a while, but we never stopped thinking about you. We were eager to see you and tried our best to visit you in person.
text: Ane̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana, ane̱ fe̱raa, saŋ ne̱ ase̱sɛ ko̱ a gya ane̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ le̱e̱ mo̱ne̱ ase̱‑ɔ, ke̱tɔ mo̱ŋ kyee, ne̱ aa waa ane̱ gya bwe̱e̱tɔ fe̱yɛ ane̱ a yɔwe̱ mo̱ne̱. Hare̱e̱ ane̱ fɔŋfɔŋ a mo̱ŋ bo̱ mo̱ne̱ ase̱ gbaa ooo, mo̱ne̱ ase̱ŋ saŋ a bo̱ ane̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ‑rɔ.

ref: Timothy has now come back from his visit with you and has told us about your faith and love. He also said that you always have happy memories of us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
text: Amaa mbe̱yɔmɔ Timotii a le̱e̱ mo̱ne̱ ase̱ baa ane̱ ase̱ŋ kɔne̱kɔne̱sɛ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi‑o na mo̱ne̱ ke̱kpa‑ɔ saŋ a kyɔ. Ɔɔ be̱e̱ tɔwe̱ gywii ane̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ saŋ mo̱ne̱ i nyiŋŋi ane̱, hare̱e̱ gbaa mo̱ne̱ e̱ kpa fe̱yɛ ane̱ aa mo̱ne̱ a be̱e̱ ŋu abɛɛ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ ane̱ gbaa ane̱ e̱ kpa‑ɔ dɛɛ.

ref: My friends, even though we have a lot of trouble and suffering, your faith makes us feel better about you.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ mfe̱e̱ a ase̱sɛ‑ɔ a tɔɔraa ane̱, na ba waa ane̱ awo̱re̱fɔɔ gbaa ooo, ane̱ a nu fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ saŋ mo̱ne̱ e̱ kɔɔre̱ Kristoo mo̱ne̱ i gyi‑o a waa ane̱ wɔre̱ fɛɛ.

ref: How can we possibly thank God enough for all the happiness you have brought us?
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a sa ne̱ ane̱ akatɔ a gyi nɛɛnɛɛ Wuribware̱ akatɔ‑rɔ‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, ane̱ e̱ sa mò̱ aŋsɛ na kusuŋ bwe̱e̱tɔ.

ref: Day and night we sincerely pray that we will see you again and help you to have an even stronger faith.
text: Kanye na mpase̱ pɛɛɛ ane̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ Wuribware̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ aa mo̱ne̱ a be̱e̱ ŋu abɛɛ, na ane̱ nya sa mo̱ne̱ ke̱tɔ ne̱ ke̱ saŋ ki tiri fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ nya, na mo̱nꞌ taare̱ kɔɔre̱ Kristoo gyi lo̱we̱‑ɔ.

ref: We pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus will let us visit you.
text: Ane̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ane̱ se̱ Wuribware̱ fɔŋfɔŋ na ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ bo̱ lɔŋŋɔ e̱kpa‑rɔ, na ane̱ nya ba mo̱ne̱ ase̱ bo̱ ŋu mo̱ne̱.

ref: May the Lord make your love for each other and for everyone else grow by leaps and bounds. This is how our love for you has grown.
text: Ane̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ sa a ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ e̱ kpa abɛɛ na ase̱sɛ pɛɛɛ‑ɔ be̱e̱ tii si, na ke̱kpa‑ɔ waa ko̱kyɔ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ ane̱ e̱ kpa mo̱ne̱ ase̱ŋ‑ɔ dɛɛ.

ref: And when our Lord comes with all his people, I pray he will make your hearts pure and innocent in the sight of God the Father.
text: Ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu sa mo̱ne̱ wɔre̱, na ɔko̱ ma taare̱ nya mo̱ne̱ kuŋu si ke̱bɔye̱ ko̱ tɔwe̱ ane̱ se̱ Wuribware̱ akatɔ‑rɔ, saŋ ne̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ na mò̱ ase̱sɛ i kiŋŋi a bo̱ ba‑ɔ.

ref: Finally, my dear friends, since you belong to the Lord Jesus, we beg and urge you to live as we taught you. Then you will please God. You are already living that way, but try even harder.
text: Mbe̱yɔmɔ ane̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana, mo̱ne̱ a suye kakye̱na timaa ne̱ ka pre̱ Wuribware̱‑ɔ le̱e̱ ane̱ ase̱. Mo̱ne̱ a nu ane̱ kanɔ. Amaa ane̱ de ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu ane̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ mo̱ne̱ ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ waa amo̱ ne̱ a kyɔ amo̱‑ɔ.

ref: Remember the instructions we gave you as followers of the Lord Jesus.
text: A le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ mo̱ŋ taŋ atɔ ne̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu a sa ane̱, ne̱ ane̱ a kaapo̱ mo̱ne̱‑ɔ se̱.

ref: God wants you to be holy, so don't be immoral in matters of sex.
text: Amo̱ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ e̱ kpa ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ‑rɔ fwiiri, na mo̱ne̱ ma kaŋ waa kakye̱e̱kpa bɛɛɛ kanyare̱kpa.

ref: So if you don't obey these rules, you are not really disobeying us. Instead, you are disobeying God, who gives you his Holy Spirit.
text: Ane̱ŋ se̱‑ɔ, n gye̱ se̱sɛ ne̱ ɔke̱maa ne̱ oo kine ase̱ŋ mɔ‑ɔ a kine, amaa Wuribware̱ ne̱ ɔɔ sa mo̱ne̱ ɔke̱maa mò̱ kufwiiŋe timaa‑o ne̱ oo kine.

ref: We don't have to write you about the need to love each other. God has taught you to do this,
text: Mbe̱yɔmɔ, mo̱ne̱ fɔŋfɔŋ abɛɛ ke̱kpa ase̱ŋ‑ɔ fe̱raa, a mo̱ŋ tiri fe̱yɛ ane̱ be̱e̱ tɔwe̱ amo̱ ase̱ŋ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ fɔŋfɔŋ ya kaapo̱ mo̱ne̱ ke̱kpa ne̱ mo̱nꞌ bo̱ kpa abɛɛ‑ɔ.

ref: and you already have shown your love for all his people in Macedonia. But, my dear friends, we ask you to do even more.
text: Kase̱ŋtiŋ si fe̱raa, mo̱ne̱ e̱ kpa mo̱ne̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana ne̱ bo̱ bo̱ Makedoniya swe̱e̱re̱ se̱‑ɔ pɛɛɛ ase̱ŋ. Amaa ane̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ mo̱ne̱ ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ sa a ane̱ŋ a ke̱kpa‑ɔ be̱e̱ tii si.

ref: Try your best to live quietly, to mind your own business, and to work hard, just as we taught you to do.
text: Na mo̱nꞌ nya mfɛɛre̱ waa diŋŋ kye̱na kaye̱e̱yuri‑ro, na mo̱ne̱ ma taa mo̱ne̱ nnɔ waa ase̱sɛ ase̱ŋ‑nɔ, na mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱re̱ mo̱ne̱ fɔŋfɔŋ asuŋ si waa keŋkeŋ, na mo̱nꞌ kye̱na mo̱ne̱ e̱ye̱e̱ se̱, fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ ane̱ a kyɔ kaapo̱ mo̱ne̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ waa‑ɔ.

ref: Then you will be respected by people who are not followers of the Lord, and you won't have to depend on anyone. The Lord's Coming
text: Mo̱ne̱ ya waa mfaanɛɛ, mo̱ne̱ maa lɛɛ nare̱ mo̱ne̱ ako̱so̱bɛɛ se̱ mo̱ne̱ e̱ kpa ateese na nkyu, na bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ maa kɔɔre̱ Kristoo ba gyi‑o nya bu mo̱ne̱. Ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ kikiŋŋi ba‑rɔ ase̱ŋ

ref: My friends, we want you to understand how it will be for those followers who have already died. Then you won't grieve over them and be like people who don't have any hope.
text: Na mbe̱yɔmɔ, ane̱ e̱ kpa fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ ŋu ke̱tɔ ne̱, ase̱sɛ ya wu, ne̱ ke̱ e̱ waa bamo̱‑ɔ. Na mo̱ne̱ ma nya su bamo̱ nle fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ mo̱ŋ de te̱maa fe̱yɛ bamo̱ ya wu ba yɔ Wuribware̱ se̱‑ɔ i su‑o.

ref: We believe Jesus died and was raised to life. We also believe that when God brings Jesus back again, he will bring with him all who had faith in Jesus before they died.
text: Ane̱ŋ ne̱ ane̱ a kɔɔre̱ gyi fe̱yɛ Yeesuu a wu, ne̱ ɔɔ be̱e̱ kyiŋŋi le̱e̱ lowi‑ro‑o, ane̱ŋ dɛɛ ne̱ ane̱ e̱ kɔɔre̱ ane̱ i gyi fe̱yɛ bamo̱ ne̱ baa kɔɔre̱ Yeesuu gyi, ne̱ baa wu‑o, Wuribware̱ e̱ yaa bamo̱ mò̱ aa Yeesuu ase̱, na kake ŋko̱ bamo̱ mpe̱pe̱yɔ le̱e̱ so̱so̱ ba.

ref: Our Lord Jesus told us that when he comes, we won't go up to meet him ahead of his followers who have already died.
text: Ke̱tɔ ne̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ a kaapo̱ ane̱‑ɔ dɛɛ ne̱ ane̱ e̱ kaapo̱ mo̱ne̱ mbe̱yɔmɔ. Amo̱ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ ne̱ ane̱ te ane̱ ke̱e̱ saŋ ne̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ e̱ ba‑ɔ maa gye̱ bamo̱ ne̱ baa kyɔ wu‑o ŋkpɛɛ.

ref: With a loud command and with the shout of the chief angel and a blast of God's trumpet, the Lord will return from heaven. Then those who had faith in Christ before they died will be raised to life.
text: Amaa ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ e̱ faa keŋkeŋ ne̱e̱, na bo̱ nu Wuribware̱ kabɔɔ bre̱sɛ‑ɔ bo̱re̱, na Wuribware̱ kabe̱re̱ dabe̱‑ɔ su, na ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ fɔŋfɔŋ le̱e̱ so̱so̱ ba. Na bamo̱ ne̱ baa kɔɔre̱ Wuribware̱ gyi, ne̱ baa wu‑o gye̱ ŋkpɛɛ kyiŋŋi le̱e̱ lowi‑ro.

ref: Next, all of us who are still alive will be taken up into the clouds together with them to meet the Lord in the sky. From that time on we will all be with the Lord forever.
text: Na Wuribware̱ kpɔwe̱ bamo̱ aa ane̱ ne̱ ane̱ saŋ ane̱ te saŋ amo̱‑ɔ bo̱ gyaŋŋe̱ awo̱re̱‑rɔ ya gyaŋŋaa ane̱ nyaŋpe̱. Na le̱e̱ saŋ amo̱‑ɔ, ane̱ ya kye̱na ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ ase̱ nsu pɛɛɛ.

ref: Encourage each other with these words.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ, mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ ba ase̱ŋkpare̱gyi mɔ bo̱ waa abɛɛ wɔre̱.

ref: I don't need to write you about the time or date when all this will happen.
text: Ane̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana, mbe̱yɔmɔ, a mo̱ŋ lɛɛ a tiri fe̱yɛ ane̱ a be̱e̱ kyo̱rɛɛ tɔwe̱ gywii mo̱ne̱ saŋ ne̱ amo̱‑ɔ ne̱ ane̱ a tɔwe̱ amo̱ ase̱ŋ‑ɔ pɛɛɛ e̱ waa‑ɔ.

ref: People will think they are safe and secure. But destruction will suddenly strike them like the pains of a woman about to give birth. And they won't escape.
text: Saŋ ne̱ ase̱sɛ pɛɛɛ mɔ e̱ fa fe̱yɛ kaye̱e̱yuri a ba kaye̱‑rɔ, ne̱ kufu mo̱ŋ lɛɛ ke̱ bo̱‑rɔ‑ɔ, ne̱ ase̱ŋ dabe̱ dabe̱ e̱ ba ɔke̱maa se̱. Ase̱ŋ amo̱ i puruwe bamo̱ fe̱yɛ kako̱we̱ a kra daŋpo̱kye̱e̱ puri‑ro, ne̱ o ŋu gya‑ɔ. Amo̱se̱‑ɔ bamo̱ ɔke̱maa maa nya mò̱ e̱ye̱e̱ pɛɛɛ, ɔko̱ maa le̱e̱.

ref: My dear friends, you don't live in darkness, and so that day won't surprise you like a thief.
text: Amaa ane̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana, mo̱ne̱ mo̱ŋ te kibugyii‑ro. Ane̱ŋ se̱‑ɔ kake ne̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ de ɔ ba‑ɔ maa puruwe mo̱ne̱ fe̱yɛ oyu‑o.

ref: You belong to the light and live in the day. We don't live in the night or belong to the dark.
text: Mo̱ne̱ pɛɛɛ mɔ gye̱ ase̱sɛ ne̱ bo̱ bo̱ ke̱laŋŋe̱rɔ‑rɔ‑ɔ ne̱e̱. Ane̱ Kristoo agyase̱po̱‑ɔ fe̱raa, ane̱ mo̱ŋ bo̱ kibugyii‑ro.

ref: Others may sleep, but we should stay awake and be alert.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ, ane̱ ma di idi fe̱yɛ bo̱ko̱‑ɔ. Ane̱ ma di idi, na ane̱ be̱e̱ ane̱ ma bwe̱e̱ bwe̱e̱tɔ.

ref: But we belong to the day. So we must stay sober and let our faith and love be like a suit of armor. Our firm hope that we will be saved is our helmet.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ ane̱ fe̱raa ane̱ a bo̱ ke̱laŋŋe̱rɔ‑rɔ‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, ane̱ ma bwe̱e̱. Ane̱ sa a ke̱kpa na ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi ne̱ ane̱ de‑o kɔɔre̱ ane̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ, na te̱maa ne̱ ane̱ de fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ e̱ mo̱rɔwe̱ ane̱‑ɔ kɔɔre̱ ane̱ mfɛɛre̱, na a kuŋ ane̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ soogyaa i buŋ mò̱ ke̱kyaŋse̱ kaare̱‑ɔ o kuŋ mò̱ ke̱kaŋ na ke̱kyaŋse̱ ke̱pa mɔ o kuŋ mò̱ kuŋu‑o.

ref: Christ died for us, so we could live with him, whether we are alive or dead when he comes.
text: Yeesuu a wu sa ane̱. Ane̱ŋ se̱‑ɔ, saŋ ne̱ ɔ be̱e̱ o kiŋŋi a ɔ ba‑ɔ, ne̱ ane̱ ya wu bɛɛɛ ane̱ ke̱e̱ gbaa ooo, ane̱ e̱ yɔ a ane̱ ya kye̱na mò̱ ase̱.

ref: This is why you must encourage and help each other, just as you are already doing. Final Instructions and Greetings
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ, mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ ba amo̱‑ɔ bo̱ waa abɛɛ wɔre̱, na mo̱nꞌ kya abɛɛ‑rɔ, fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ maa se̱ mo̱ne̱ e̱ waa mbe̱yɔmɔ‑ɔ. Ase̱ŋ‑ɔ lalalo̱we̱ na kanɔka
