ref: My friends, we ask you to be thoughtful of your leaders who work hard and tell you how to live for the Lord.
text: Ane̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana, ase̱ŋ ne̱ a tii si‑o e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ mo̱ne̱ ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ bu asɔre̱e̱ agye̱ŋkpɛɛpo̱ ne̱ bo̱ bo̱ mo̱ne̱‑rɔ ba de̱e̱re̱ mo̱ne̱ se̱, na ba kaapo̱ mo̱ne̱ ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱nꞌ kye̱na kakye̱na timaa‑o‑ro.

ref: My friends, we beg you to warn anyone who isn't living right. Encourage anyone who feels left out, help all who are weak, and be patient with everyone.
text: Ŋkee ane̱ e̱ kpa fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ neŋ bamo̱ ne̱ wo̱rɔgya de bamo̱ Wuribware̱ kusuŋ‑no‑o e̱te̱bɔ. Na mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ waa bamo̱ ne̱ bamo̱ mfɛɛre̱ mo̱ŋ da, ne̱ iduŋ e̱ te̱ŋŋe̱ bamo̱‑ɔ wɔre̱, na mo̱nꞌ kya bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ mo̱ŋ bo̱ le̱ŋ‑ɔ‑rɔ, na mo̱nꞌ waa kanyite sa ɔke̱maa.

ref: Don't be hateful to people, just because they are hateful to you. Rather, be good to each other and to everyone else.
text: Ɔko̱ ya waa mò̱ bɛɛko̱ bɔye̱, mo̱ne̱ ma sa a mò̱ bɛɛko̱‑ɔ mɔ waa bɔye̱ bo̱ teere. Amaa mo̱nꞌ le̱ŋ e̱ye̱e̱ waa abɛɛ na ase̱sɛ pɛɛɛ ke̱dame̱naŋsɛ saŋ ke̱maa.

ref: and never stop praying.
text: Mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ kake ke̱maa.

ref: I pray that God, who gives peace, will make you completely holy. And may your spirit, soul, and body be kept healthy and faultless until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
text: Ane̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ kaye̱e̱yuri sapo̱‑ɔ Wuribware̱ ane̱ e̱ sa mo̱ne̱ fe̱yɛ ɔ kpɛɛ mo̱ne̱ pɛɛɛ iyisi. Na ɔ sa a mo̱ne̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ fwiiri lee mo̱ne̱ e̱kra na ŋyo̱wɔre̱ le̱e̱ bɔye̱ ke̱maa‑rɔ bo̱ fo̱ kake nsi ne̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu be̱e̱ o kiŋŋi a ɔ ba‑ɔ.

ref: The one who chose you can be trusted, and he will do this.
text: Wuribware̱ e̱ waa ane̱ŋ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mò̱ fɔŋfɔŋ ya te̱e̱ mo̱ne̱, o de kase̱ŋtiŋ, ɔ maa laŋŋe̱ mò̱ kanɔ daa.

ref: Friends, please pray for us.
text: Ane̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana, mo̱ne̱ gbaa mo̱nꞌ de̱e̱ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ sa ane̱.

ref: Give the Lord's followers a warm greeting.
text: Mo̱nꞌ ka asɔre̱e̱‑rɔ awuye‑o pɛɛɛ kanɔ dame̱naŋsɛ.

ref: In the name of the Lord I beg you to read this letter to all his followers.
text: Ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ ke̱nyare̱‑rɔ se̱‑ɔ, mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ kare̱ wo̱re̱ mɔ gywii asɔre̱e̱ awuye‑o pɛɛɛ.

ref: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
text: Mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu Kristoo yure mo̱ne̱.

ref: My dear friends, we always have good reason to thank God for you, because your faith in God and your love for each other keep growing all the time.
text: Ane̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana, mo̱ne̱ se̱‑ɔ, a tiri fe̱yɛ ane̱ sa Wuribware̱ aŋsɛ saŋ ke̱maa. A bware fe̱yɛ ane̱ a waa ane̱ŋ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a kɔɔre̱ Kristoo gyi‑o na ke̱kpa ne̱ mo̱ne̱ e̱ kpa abɛɛ‑ɔ i tii si saŋ ke̱maa.

ref: This is why we brag about you to all of God's churches. We tell them how patient you are and how you keep on having faith, even though you are going through a lot of trouble and suffering.
text: Ne̱ mo̱ne̱ Yeesuu ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi na abɛɛ ke̱kpa mɔ se̱, ne̱ ane̱ fe̱raa ane̱ e̱ kaapo̱ ane̱ e̱ye̱e̱ asɔre̱e̱ ke̱maa‑rɔ. Na ane̱ e̱ tɔwe̱ ane̱ i gywii bamo̱ fe̱yɛ awo̱re̱fɔɔ suyo ne̱ mo̱ne̱ i gyi na ase̱ŋ de̱maŋte̱ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ i ŋu bo̱ le̱e̱ ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ gya Kristoo a e̱kpa‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ gbaa ooo, mo̱ne̱ saŋ mo̱ne̱ de ŋkpo̱nɔ mo̱ne̱ e̱ kɔɔre̱ Kristoo mo̱ne̱ i gyi keŋkeŋ.

ref: All this shows that God judges fairly and is making you fit to share in his kingdom for which you are suffering.
text: Amo̱‑ɔ pɛɛɛ e̱ kaapo̱‑rɔ nɛɛnɛɛ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ Wuribware̱ i gyi ase̱sɛ ase̱ŋ‑ɔ gye̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ. Na bo̱ le̱e̱ ane̱ŋ se̱‑ɔ, o ŋu fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ a fo̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ tii Wuribware̱ kuwure ne̱ mo̱ne̱ a kperi ke̱mo̱ se̱ mo̱ne̱ i gyi awo̱re̱fɔɔ‑ɔ se̱.

ref: It is only right for God to punish everyone who is causing you trouble,
text: Amo̱ a gye̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ e̱ waa ke̱tɔ ne̱ ki bware‑o si‑o, ɔ sa a bamo̱ ne̱ ba waa mo̱ne̱ awo̱re̱fɔɔ‑ɔ ŋu ase̱ŋ.

ref: but he will give you relief from your troubles. God will do the same for us, when the Lord Jesus comes from heaven with his powerful angels
text: Na ɔ sa a e̱ye̱e̱ twɛɛ mo̱ne̱ aa ane̱ pɛɛɛ, saŋ ne̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu na mò̱ mbɔɔ e̱ le̱e̱ so̱so̱ a bo̱ bo̱ ba swe̱e̱re̱‑ɔ. Mbɔɔ amo̱ de Wuribware̱ a ke̱yaale̱ŋ‑ɔ, na agyabreŋ a muruwaa bamo̱ aa Yeesuu.

ref: and with a flaming fire. Our Lord Jesus will punish anyone who doesn't know God and won't obey his message.
text: Na Yeesuu ba do̱ŋdaa bo̱ kɔ bamo̱ ne̱ ba kine Wuribware̱‑ɔ na bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ maa gya ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu Kristoo kuŋu si ase̱ŋ timaa‑o si‑o.

ref: This will happen on the day when the Lord returns to be praised and honored by all who have faith in him and belong to him. This includes you, because you believed what we said.
text: Kake dabe̱ ne̱ Yeesuu e̱ ba, na ɔ bo̱ nya ke̱dabe̱ na wuraa na nkyo̱rɔ le̱e̱ ase̱sɛ ne̱ ba kɔɔre̱ mò̱ ba gyi‑o ase̱‑ɔ ne̱ atɔ mɔ pɛɛɛ e̱ ba ane̱ŋ. Mo̱ne̱ gbaa mo̱ne̱ tii bamo̱ ne̱ ba sa Yeesuu ke̱dabe̱ na wuraa na nkyo̱rɔ kake amo̱‑ɔ se̱. A le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ gbaa mo̱ne̱ a kɔɔre̱ ase̱ŋ timaa ne̱ ane̱ a tɔwe̱ gywii mo̱ne̱‑ɔ gyi.

ref: Then, because of the undeserved grace of God and our Lord Jesus Christ, you will bring honor to the name of our Lord Jesus, and he will bring honor to you.
text: Bo̱ le̱e̱ amo̱ se̱ ne̱ ane̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ amo̱‑ɔ, na mo̱ne̱ kakye̱na‑rɔ nya sa a bo̱ kyo̱rɔ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu, na mò̱‑ɔ mò̱ sa a bo̱ kyo̱rɔ mo̱ne̱ ane̱ŋ dɛɛ. Wuribware̱ na ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu Kristoo ŋyure e̱ gye̱ ne̱ n sa a amo̱‑ɔ pɛɛɛ ba ane̱ŋ.

ref: But don't be fooled! People will rebel against God. Then before the Lord returns, the wicked one who is doomed to be destroyed will appear.
text: Mo̱ne̱ ma sa a ɔko̱ pe̱nna mo̱ne̱ kpa ke̱maa se̱. A le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ pwɛɛ na ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ dɛɛ ba‑ɔ, ase̱sɛ bwe̱e̱tɔ e̱ yɔwe̱ ke̱bware̱suŋ, na bo̱ ye̱re̱ bo̱ kye Wuribware̱, na ɔko̱ ne̱ ba te̱e̱ mò̱ ɛ ɔbo̱ro̱kɔɔne̱po̱‑ɔ le̱e̱ ifuri. Ɔbo̱ro̱kɔɔne̱po̱ amo̱, a waa dɛɛ o lwee awo̱re̱fɔɔ de̱e̱kpa‑rɔ.

ref: Don't you remember I told you this while I was still with you?
text: Mo̱ne̱ a taŋ se̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ a tɔwe̱ amo̱‑ɔ pɛɛɛ gywii mo̱ne̱ saŋ ne̱ m bo̱ mo̱ne̱ ase̱‑ɔ ɔɔɔ?

ref: His mysterious power is already at work, but someone is holding him back. And the wicked one won't appear until this someone is out of the way.
text: Mo̱ne̱ fɔŋfɔŋ nyi ke̱tɔ ne̱ ki i kuŋ ɔbo̱ro̱kɔɔne̱po̱‑ɔ ke̱ba mbe̱yɔmɔ‑ɔ. Mò̱ saŋ ya fo̱, ne̱ ɔ ba. Hare̱e̱ mbe̱yɔmɔ gbaa e̱bɔye̱ bo̱ kaye̱ mɔ‑rɔ, amaa e̱ ya kwe̱e̱rɔ. Amaa ke̱tɔ ne̱ ke̱ e̱ waa‑ɔ maa waa, amɔ saŋ ne̱ baa lee ɔko̱ ne̱ mbe̱yɔmɔ o kuŋ ɔbo̱ro̱kɔɔne̱po̱ amo̱ ke̱ba‑ɔ le̱e̱‑rɔ pwɛɛ.

ref: Then he will appear, but the Lord Jesus will kill him simply by breathing on him. He will be completely destroyed by the Lord's glorious return.
text: Saŋ ne̱ ɔko̱ ne̱ o kuŋ mò̱‑ɔ a le̱e̱‑ɔ, ne̱ ɔbo̱ro̱kɔɔne̱po̱ amo̱ e̱ le̱e̱ ifuri. Amaa ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu e̱ gye̱ ne̱ mò̱ ya ba, ne̱ saŋ amo̱ ɔ ba mò̱ kanɔ‑rɔ afwii na mò̱ ko̱to̱re̱se̱‑ɔ na ɔ bo̱ mɔɔ ɔbo̱ro̱kɔɔne̱po̱‑ɔ.

ref: When the wicked one appears, Satan will pretend to work all kinds of miracles, wonders, and signs.
text: Pwɛɛ na Yeesuu dɛɛ ba‑ɔ, ɔbo̱ro̱kɔɔne̱po̱‑ɔ e̱ ba Ɔbɔnsam e̱le̱ŋ na ɔ bo̱ waa akpe̱ŋe̱ye̱e̱tɔ e̱wo̱re̱se̱ e̱wo̱re̱se̱ ne̱ a pe̱nna ase̱sɛ‑ɔ.

ref: So God will make sure they are fooled into believing a lie.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ ne̱ Wuribware̱ a sa ne̱ ba nu, na ba kɔɔre̱ aye̱ba ase̱ŋ ba gyi.

ref: All of them will be punished, because they would rather do evil than believe the truth. Be Faithful
text: Amo̱ lalalo̱we̱‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ i bu bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ mo̱ŋ kɔɔre̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ‑o gyi, ne̱ e̱bɔye̱ ko̱waa bo̱ bamo̱ kɔne̱‑ɔ ke̱pɔ. Mo̱ne̱ e̱ gye̱ ase̱sɛ ne̱ Wuribware̱ fɔŋfɔŋ a lee‑o

ref: My friends, the Lord loves you, and it is only natural for us to thank God for you. God chose you to be the first ones to be saved. His Spirit made you holy, and you put your faith in the truth.
text: Amaa mo̱ne̱ fe̱raa, mo̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana, mo̱ne̱ se̱‑ɔ, a tiri fe̱yɛ ane̱ sa Wuribware̱ aŋsɛ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Wuribware̱ e̱ kpa mo̱ne̱ ase̱ŋ, ne̱ oo lee mo̱ne̱ hare̱e̱ saŋ ne̱ ɔɔ twe̱e̱ kaye̱‑ɔ fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ kɔɔre̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ‑o gyi, na Wuribware̱ a kufwiiŋe timaa‑o nya sa mo̱ne̱ ŋkpo̱nɔfwiiri. Mfaanɛɛ ne̱ ɔ mo̱rɔwe̱ mo̱ne̱.

ref: My friends, this is why you must remain faithful and follow closely what we taught you in person and by our letters.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ ane̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana, mo̱nꞌ kra kase̱ŋtiŋ ne̱ ane̱ a bo̱ kaapo̱ mo̱ne̱‑ɔ‑rɔ keŋkeŋ. Abware̱se̱ŋ ne̱ ane̱ a ba kanɔ bo̱ tɔwe̱ bo̱ kaapo̱ mo̱ne̱‑ɔ, na amo̱ ne̱ ane̱ a kyo̱rɛɛ amo̱ e̱wo̱re̱ bo̱ kyo̱ŋwe̱ mo̱ne̱‑ɔ ne̱ n de.

ref: Finally, our friends, please pray for us. This will help the message about the Lord to spread quickly, and others will respect it, just as you do.
text: Ŋkee ane̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana, mo̱nꞌ ko̱re̱ Wuribware̱ sa ane̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ nya e̱ye̱e̱ nɛɛnɛɛ yɔ to̱ŋ ke̱maa me̱naŋ me̱naŋ ya tɔwe̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ kuŋu si ase̱ŋ, na a nya saŋŋe̱‑rɔ ya fo̱ to̱ŋ ke̱maa, na bamo̱ ne̱ ba nu amo̱‑ɔ kɔɔre̱ kra‑rɔ gya amo̱ se̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱‑ɔ.

ref: Pray that we may be kept safe from worthless and evil people. After all, not everyone has faith.
text: Mo̱nꞌ be̱e̱ ko̱re̱ Wuribware̱ fe̱yɛ o lee ane̱ le̱e̱ ase̱sɛ bɔye̱ na abo̱ro̱kɔɔne̱po̱ ke̱sare̱e̱‑rɔ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ n gye̱ ɔke̱maa ne̱ o nu ase̱ŋ‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ ɔ kɔɔre̱ a o gyi.

ref: But the Lord can be trusted to make you strong and protect you from harm.
text: Amaa mo̱ne̱ fe̱raa, ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ a gye̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ gyipo̱‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, ɔ sa mo̱ne̱ ke̱yaale̱ŋ, na o kuŋ mo̱ne̱ lee mo̱ne̱ le̱e̱ Ɔbɔnsam ke̱sare̱e̱‑rɔ.

ref: He has made us sure that you are obeying what we taught you and that you will keep on obeying.
text: Ane̱ fe̱raa, ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ a sa ne̱ ane̱ a kɔɔre̱ gyi fe̱yɛ mbe̱yɔmɔ mo̱ne̱ e̱ waa ke̱tɔ ne̱ ane̱ a bo̱ sa mo̱ne̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ waa‑ɔ, na mo̱ne̱ e̱ kya se̱ a mo̱nꞌ waa ane̱ŋ mɔ bo̱ yɔ.

ref: I pray that the Lord will guide you to be as loving as God and as patient as Christ. Warnings against Laziness
text: Ŋkee ane̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ɔ kaapo̱ mo̱ne̱, na mo̱nꞌ ŋu ane̱ŋ ne̱ Wuribware̱ e̱ kpa mo̱ne̱ ase̱ŋ bwe̱e̱tɔ‑ɔ, na ane̱ŋ ne̱ Kristoo a gyi kanyite awo̱re̱fɔɔ‑rɔ‑ɔ. Mo̱ne̱ ma waa wo̱rɔgya

ref: My dear friends, in the name of the Lord Jesus, I beg you not to have anything to do with any of your people who loaf around and refuse to obey the instructions we gave you.
text: Mbe̱yɔmɔ, ane̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana, ane̱ i yii mo̱ne̱ se̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu Kristoo ke̱nyare̱‑rɔ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ ya ŋu mo̱ne̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ Kristoonyi ko̱ ne̱ o de wo̱rɔgya, ne̱ ɔ mo̱ŋ gya e̱kpa ne̱ ane̱ a kaapo̱ mo̱ne̱‑ɔ se̱, mo̱ne̱ aa mò̱ ma nare̱.

ref: You surely know that you should follow our example. We didn't waste our time loafing,
text: Mo̱ne̱ fɔŋfɔŋ nyi dame̱naŋsɛ fe̱yɛ a tiri fe̱yɛ mo̱nꞌ kase̱ ane̱ŋ ne̱ ane̱ a ba mo̱ne̱ ase̱ bo̱ kye̱na‑ɔ‑rɔ. Ane̱ mo̱ŋ waa wo̱rɔgya.

ref: and we didn't accept food from anyone without paying for it. We didn't want to be a burden to any of you, so night and day we worked as hard as we could.
text: Ane̱ŋ dɛɛ ne̱ mo̱ne̱ nyi fe̱yɛ ane̱ mo̱ŋ kyaare̱ mo̱ne̱ kɔɔre̱ ateese gyi, ane̱ a sɔɔ gyi ne̱e̱. Amaa ane̱ a suŋ ane̱ fɔŋfɔŋ kusuŋ mpase̱ na kanye ne̱e̱, kpa atanne̱ bo̱ be̱ra ane̱ e̱ye̱e̱, na ane̱ ma nya taa tɔɔraa bo̱ dɔŋŋɔ mo̱ne̱ se̱.

ref: We had the right not to work, but we wanted to set an example for you.
text: A mo̱ŋ gye̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ mo̱ŋ de kpa fe̱yɛ ane̱ kɔɔre̱ ateese le̱e̱ mo̱ne̱ ase̱. Amaa ane̱ a waa ane̱ŋ ne̱e̱ na mo̱nꞌ nya gya ane̱ e̱kpa‑ɔ se̱.

ref: Now we learn that some of you just loaf around and won't do any work, except the work of a busybody.
text: Amaa mbe̱yɔmɔ ane̱ a nu fe̱yɛ bo̱ko̱ bo̱ mo̱ne̱‑rɔ, ne̱ bo̱ de wo̱rɔgya. Bo̱ maa waa asuŋ ke̱maa, amɔ ase̱sɛ ase̱ŋ‑nɔ ke̱nare̱ lweero dooo.

ref: So, for the sake of our Lord Jesus Christ, we ask and beg these people to settle down and start working for a living.
text: Ane̱ŋ a ase̱sɛ‑ɔ, ane̱ de ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu Kristoo ke̱nyare̱ ane̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ bamo̱ ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ bo̱ kyurowi bamo̱ anare̱gyi‑o, na bo̱ waa diŋŋ, na bo̱ suŋ kusuŋ kpa ko̱tɔko̱ bo̱ ke̱e̱ bamo̱ e̱ye̱e̱.

ref: Dear friends, you must never become tired of doing right.
text: Amaa mo̱ne̱, ane̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana‑ɔ fe̱raa, mo̱ne̱ ma tɔwe̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ a kpo̱ne̱ na itimaa bɛɛɛ ke̱dame̱naŋsɛ ko̱waa se̱.

ref: Be on your guard against any followers who refuse to obey what we have written in this letter. Put them to shame by not having anything to do with them.
text: A taare̱ a a waa fe̱yɛ ɔko̱ bo̱‑rɔ mfe̱ŋ ne̱ mò̱ fe̱raa maa gya ase̱ŋ ne̱ ane̱ a kyo̱rɛɛ wo̱re̱ mɔ‑rɔ bo̱ kyo̱ŋwe̱ mo̱ne̱‑ɔ se̱. Amo̱ e̱ gye̱ ane̱ŋ fe̱raa, amɔ mo̱nꞌ sa ane̱ŋ a se̱sɛ‑ɔ se̱, na mo̱ne̱ aa mò̱ ma lɛɛ kpaa sɛye̱, na ipeere nya nya mò̱.

ref: Don't consider them your enemies. Instead, speak kindly to them as you would to any other follower. Final Prayer
text: Amaa mo̱ne̱ ma kaŋ taa se̱sɛ‑ɔ bo̱ kii mo̱ne̱ do̱ŋ. Mo̱nꞌ ka mò̱ ase̱ŋ kpe̱yaa fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ɔ. Ase̱ŋ lalalo̱we̱ ne̱ ane̱ de ane̱ e̱ kra mo̱ne̱‑ɔ

ref: I pray that the Lord, who gives peace, will always bless you with peace. May the Lord be with all of you.
text: Ane̱ e̱ tɔwe̱ a ane̱ bo̱ gye̱ kɛɛ fe̱yɛ ane̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ Wuribware̱ ane̱ e̱ sa mo̱ne̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu fɔŋfɔŋ ne̱ ɔ gye̱ kaye̱e̱yuri sapo̱‑ɔ sa mo̱ne̱ kaye̱e̱yuri saŋ ke̱maa na ke̱tɔ ke̱maa‑rɔ. Ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ gya mo̱ne̱ pɛɛɛ kamɛɛ.

ref: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to all of you.
text: Mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu Kristoo yure mo̱ne̱ pɛɛɛ.

ref: You needed to warn them to stop wasting their time on senseless stories and endless lists of ancestors. Such things only cause arguments. They don't help anyone to do God's work that can only be done by faith.
text: Na fo̱ be̱e̱ tɔwe̱ gywii bamo̱ a bo̱ yɔwe̱ itee kunu na bamo̱ ke̱nana‑rɔ ade̱daase̱ŋ so̱swe̱e̱ so̱swe̱e̱‑ɔ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ amo̱ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ a ba ase̱sɛ ikii kigyiiri, ne̱ a be̱e̱ a maa kya ɔko̱‑rɔ a o ŋu ane̱ŋ ne̱ Wuribware̱ e̱ kpa fe̱yɛ mò̱ ase̱sɛ kye̱na, na bo̱ ŋu mò̱ kusuŋ waa‑ɔ. Amɔ Wuribware̱ ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi wo̱re̱ kpeŋ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ ke̱ e̱ taare̱ a ke̱ sa a ane̱ gyii e̱waa mò̱ ke̱pre̱.

ref: There are some who have given up these for nothing but empty talk.
text: Amo̱‑ɔ ke̱kaapo̱ ne̱ bo̱ko̱ a fo̱ kpa, lee laakare̱ le̱e̱ amo̱ ba gyiiri ikii ne̱ e̱ mo̱ŋ de to̱nɔ ko̱‑ɔ‑rɔ.

ref: They want to be teachers of the Law of Moses. But they don't know what they are talking about, even though they think they do.
text: Ba kpa a bo̱ kii Wuribware̱ mbraa akaapo̱po̱, amaa bamo̱ fɔŋfɔŋ mo̱ŋ nyi ase̱ŋ ne̱ ba pee atɔ ba tɔwe̱‑ɔ, bo̱ maa nu amo̱ ase̱ŋkpare̱gyi kaase̱.

ref: We know the Law is good, if it is used in the right way.
text: Mbe̱yɔmɔ ane̱ nyi fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ a mbraa‑ɔ bware sa ane̱, amɔ se̱sɛ ne̱ ɔ kaapo̱ mmo̱‑ɔ mo̱ŋ kaapo̱ kaase̱ kyɛɛkyɛɛ fe̱raa.

ref: The Law was written for people who are sexual perverts or who live as homosexuals or are kidnappers or liars or won't tell the truth in court. It is for anything else that opposes the correct teaching
text: na bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ de kakye̱e̱kpa na kanyare̱kpa‑ɔ, na ɔnyare̱ na ɔnyare̱ ne̱ ba kpa abɛɛ ba di fe̱yɛ ke̱kye̱e̱ na ke̱nyare̱‑ɔ, na bamo̱ ne̱ ba kra bamo̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana ba kii anya‑ɔ, na bamo̱ ne̱ ba ba aye̱ba‑ɔ, na bamo̱ ne̱ ba ba aye̱ba iwurekpa‑ɔ, na bamo̱ ne̱ ba waa atɔ ke̱maa ne̱ a kye kase̱ŋtiŋ ke̱kaapo̱‑ɔ.

ref: I thank Christ Jesus our Lord, who has given me the strength for my work because he knew he could trust me.
text: Mo̱ e̱ sa ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Kristoo Yeesuu aŋsɛ fe̱yɛ mò̱ a sa mo̱ ke̱yaale̱ŋ, ne̱ ɔɔ kɔɔre̱ mo̱ gyi, lee mo̱ fe̱yɛ n suŋ sa mò̱.

ref: I used to say terrible and insulting things about him, and I was cruel. But Christ had mercy on me because I didn't know what I was doing, and I had not yet put my faith in him.
text: Nsaŋ‑ɔ, mo̱ a dɛɛ sa se̱ŋsa bo̱ kye Kristoo, ne̱ mo̱ a saare̱ mò̱, ne̱ mo̱ a waa ase̱sɛ ne̱ bo̱ gya mò̱ e̱kpa‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ awo̱re̱fɔɔ, ne̱ mo̱ a waa akatɔle̱ŋ. Amo̱‑ɔ pɛɛɛ gbaa Kristoo a ŋu mo̱ e̱wɛɛ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ nsaŋ amo̱, ma kɔɔre̱ mò̱ mo̱ i gyi, amo̱se̱‑ɔ mo̱ŋ nyi fe̱yɛ mo̱ e̱ waa e̱bɔye̱ ne̱e̱.

ref: Christ Jesus our Lord treated me with undeserved grace and has greatly blessed my life with faith and love just like his own.
text: Kase̱ŋtiŋ, ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Kristoo Yeesuu a ŋu mo̱ e̱wɛɛ bwe̱e̱tɔ bwe̱e̱tɔ, ne̱ ɔɔ be̱e̱ sa ne̱ mo̱ a kɔɔre̱ mò̱ gyi, ne̱ mo̱ a kpa mò̱ ase̱ŋ.

ref: “Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners.” This saying is true, and it can be trusted. I was the worst sinner of all!
text: Ase̱ŋ ko̱ bo̱‑rɔ, ne̱ a gye̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ, ne̱ a bware fe̱yɛ ase̱sɛ pɛɛɛ kɔɔre̱ amo̱ gyi lo̱we̱, amo̱ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ Kristoo Yeesuu a ba kaye̱ mɔ‑rɔ a ɔ bo̱ mo̱rɔwe̱ e̱bɔye̱ awaapo̱ ne̱e̱. Mo̱‑ɔ n dɛɛ n gye̱ e̱bɔye̱ awaapo̱ ɔgye̱ŋkpɛɛpo̱ ne̱e̱.

ref: But since I was worse than anyone else, God had mercy on me and let me be an example of the endless patience of Christ Jesus. He did this so that others would put their faith in Christ and have eternal life.
text: Amaa ke̱tɔ se̱ ne̱ Yeesuu Kristoo a ŋu mo̱ e̱wɛɛ, ne̱ ɔɔ mo̱rɔwe̱ mo̱‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ ɔ kpa a ɔ bo̱ kaapo̱ ane̱ŋ ne̱ o nyite e̱bɔye̱ awaapo̱ bwe̱e̱tɔ‑ɔ ne̱e̱. Na ɔ nya sa a bamo̱ ne̱ kamɛɛ‑rɔ ba ba a bo̱ bo̱ kɔɔre̱ mò̱ gyi‑o nya ŋkpa na kukyure ne̱ a mo̱ŋ de kɛɛ‑ɔ.

ref: I pray that honor and glory will always be given to the only God, who lives forever and is the invisible and eternal King! Amen.
text: Amo̱se̱ se̱‑ɔ, mo̱nꞌ sa a ane̱ bo̱nyaa Wuribware̱, na ane̱ kyo̱rɔ mò̱, na a mo̱ŋ de kɛɛ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mò̱ kuwure‑o mo̱ŋ de kɛɛ, ne̱ mò̱ fɔŋfɔŋ gbaa maa be̱re̱ na o wu, amaa ane̱ mo̱ŋ ke̱e̱ mò̱ fe̱raa, mò̱‑ɔ mò̱ wo̱re̱ kpeŋ e̱ gye̱ Wuribware̱. Amɛye̱.

ref: Two of them are Hymenaeus and Alexander. I have given these men over to the power of Satan, so they will learn not to oppose God.
text: Anyare̱ anyɔ ne̱ bo̱ du ane̱ŋ‑ɔ, e̱ gye̱ Himiniyus na Alɛsanda ne̱ mo̱ a gya le̱e̱ mfe̱ŋ a asɔre̱e̱‑ɔ‑rɔ‑ɔ, na a nya kaapo̱ bamo̱ kanyiase̱ŋ, na bo̱ ma lɛɛ tɔwe̱ ase̱ŋ bɔye̱ bo̱ kye Wuribware̱.

ref: First of all, I ask you to pray for everyone. Ask God to help and bless them all, and tell God how thankful you are for each of them.
text: To, ke̱tɔ ne̱ ke̱ gye̱ ŋkpɛɛ ne̱ mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ fo̱ fe̱yɛ fo̱ waa‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ, saŋ ne̱ asɔre̱e̱ agyi e̱ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱‑ɔ, na fo̱ sa a bo̱ sa Wuribware̱ aŋsɛ, na bo̱ ko̱re̱ sa ase̱sɛ pɛɛɛ.

ref: Pray for kings and others in power, so we may live quiet and peaceful lives as we worship and honor God.
text: Bo̱ ko̱re̱ Wuribware̱ sa bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ de mo̱ne̱ se̱ ke̱yaale̱ŋ‑ɔ, awure na maŋ agye̱ŋkpɛɛpo̱‑ɔ, na ane̱ nya kaye̱e̱yuri a ane̱ bo̱ suŋ Wuribware̱, na ane̱ bu Wuribware̱ kpa ke̱maa se̱.

ref: There is only one God, and Christ Jesus is the only one who can bring us to God. Jesus was truly human, and he gave himself to rescue all of us.
text: Kase̱ŋtiŋ mɔ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ gye̱ ɔko̱ŋko̱ kpeŋ ne̱e̱, ne̱ mbo̱ŋtɔ‑rɔ ɔye̱re̱po̱ mɔ gye̱ ɔko̱ŋko̱, ne̱ ɔ bo̱ Wuribware̱ na dimaadi mbo̱ŋtɔ‑rɔ. Kristoo Yeesuu wo̱re̱ e̱ gye̱ ane̱ŋ a se̱sɛ‑ɔ.

ref: This is why God chose me to be a preacher and an apostle of the good news. I am telling the truth. I am not lying. God sent me to teach the Gentiles about faith and truth.
text: Ane̱ŋ se̱ dɛɛ ne̱ Wuribware̱ a lee mo̱ suŋ mo̱ bo̱ kyo̱ŋwe̱ fe̱yɛ m bo̱ waa mò̱ kabɔɔ na mò̱ ayaa‑rɔ ɔye̱re̱po̱, na m bo̱ kii ase̱sɛ ne̱ bo̱ mo̱ŋ gye̱ Yudaa awuye‑o ɔkaapo̱po̱, na n tɔwe̱ abware̱se̱ŋ gywii bamo̱ a bo̱ kɔɔre̱ gyi, na bo̱ gyii kase̱ŋtiŋ‑o. Ma ba aye̱ba ne̱e̱. Kase̱ŋtiŋ ne̱ mo̱ e̱ tɔwe̱!

ref: I want everyone everywhere to lift innocent hands toward heaven and pray, without being angry or arguing with each other.
text: M be̱e̱ mo̱ e̱ kpa fe̱yɛ, to̱ŋ ke̱maa ne̱ anyare̱ e̱ yase̱ asare̱e̱ ba ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱‑ɔ, bo̱ ko̱re̱ na bamo̱ kuŋu si mo̱ŋ de bɔye̱ ko̱, na kaduŋfwii na ikii mo̱ŋ bo̱ bamo̱ e̱ye̱e̱‑rɔ na ke̱bo̱ŋtɔ‑rɔ.

ref: and they should learn by being quiet and paying attention.
text: Saŋ ke̱maa ne̱ ase̱sɛ e̱ kaapo̱ abware̱se̱ŋ‑ɔ, akye̱e̱ waa diŋŋ a bo̱ suye amo̱, na bo̱ bu asɔre̱e̱ agye̱ŋkpɛɛpo̱‑ɔ.

ref: They should be silent and not be allowed to teach or to tell men what to do.
text: Ke̱tɔ se̱ ne̱ mo̱ a tɔwe̱ amo̱‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ, mo̱ŋ sa kpa fe̱yɛ akye̱e̱ kaapo̱ atɔ, bɛɛɛ bo̱ nya anyare̱ se̱ ke̱yaale̱ŋ, amaa bo̱ waa diŋŋ.

ref: and the man Adam wasn't the one who was fooled. It was the woman Eve who was completely fooled and sinned.
text: Saŋ ne̱ Ɔbɔnsam a waa mò̱ e̱ye̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ko̱wɔ, ne̱ ɔɔ ba a ɔ bo̱ pe̱nna bamo̱‑ɔ, n gye̱ ɔnyare̱‑ɔ ne̱ ɔɔ pe̱nna bo̱ waa e̱bɔye̱‑rɔ, amaa ɔkye̱e̱‑ɔ ne̱ ɔɔ waa ane̱ŋ.

ref: It is true that anyone who desires to be a church official wants to be something worthwhile.
text: A gye̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ bamo̱ a tɔwe̱ fe̱yɛ ɔke̱maa ne̱ ɔ kpa fe̱yɛ o kii asɔre̱e̱ ɔbre̱sɛ‑ɔ, ɔ kpa kusuŋ timaa ne̱e̱.

ref: Church officials must be in control of their own families, and they must see that their children are obedient and always respectful.
text: Asɔre̱e̱ ɔbre̱sɛ e̱ gye̱ ɔko̱ ne̱ ɔ taare̱ ɔ de̱e̱re̱ mò̱ ka na mò̱ gyi‑ana se̱ nɛɛnɛɛ, ne̱ mò̱ gyi‑ana i bu mò̱ kpa ke̱maa se̱‑ɔ.

ref: If they don't know how to control their own families, how can they look after God's people?
text: A le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ɔko̱ e̱ ma taare̱ a ɔ de̱e̱re̱ mò̱ fɔŋfɔŋ lɔŋ‑nɔ awuye si, e̱me̱ne̱ ne̱ ɔ waa a ɔ taare̱ de̱e̱re̱ Wuribware̱ a asɔre̱e̱ ase̱sɛ‑ɔ se̱?

ref: They must not be new followers of the Lord. If they are, they might become proud and be doomed along with the devil.
text: A mo̱ŋ bware fe̱yɛ bo̱ taa ɔko̱ ne̱ ɔ mo̱ŋ kii Kristoonyi kyee‑o bo̱ waa asɔre̱e̱ ɔbre̱sɛ. N gye̱ ane̱ŋ, ɔ kaapo̱ mò̱ e̱ye̱e̱, na Wuribware̱ bu mò̱ ke̱pɔ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ oo bu Ɔbɔnsam ke̱pɔ‑ɔ.

ref: Finally, they must be well-respected by people who are not followers. Then they won't be trapped and disgraced by the devil. Church Officers
text: Asɔre̱e̱ ke̱bre̱sɛ bware bo̱ sa ɔko̱ ne̱ kawu si ase̱sɛ pɛɛɛ e̱ bo̱nyaa mò̱‑ɔ ne̱e̱. N gye̱ ane̱ŋ, ɔ le̱e̱ a ɔ le̱e̱ da Ɔbɔnsam a katɛɛ ne̱ ɔɔ swe̱e̱ bo̱ be̱ya mò̱‑ɔ‑rɔ, na ipeere gyi mò̱. Asɔre̱e̱ akyarɔpo̱ ase̱ŋ

ref: And they must have a clear conscience and hold firmly to what God has shown us about our faith.
text: Bo̱ kɔɔre̱ atɔ ne̱ ane̱ asɔre̱e̱ awuye e̱ kɔɔre̱ ane̱ i gyi‑o gyi kase̱ŋtiŋ si, atɔ ne̱ aa kwe̱e̱rɔ, ne̱ mbe̱yɔmɔ Wuribware̱ a lee bo̱ kaapo̱ ane̱‑ɔ.

ref: They must first prove themselves. Then if no one has anything against them, they can serve as officers.
text: Ane̱ŋ a asɔre̱e̱ akyarɔpo̱‑ɔ, fo̱ de̱e̱re̱ bamo̱ ke̱bo̱rɔgyi‑ro pwɛɛ, ne̱ sɛye̱ e̱ ma tii kpa, amo̱ fe̱raa na fo̱ sa bamo̱ kpa a bo̱ waa asɔre̱e̱ akyarɔpo̱.

ref: Women must also be serious. They must not gossip or be heavy drinkers, and they must be faithful in everything they do.
text: Ane̱ŋ dɛɛ ne̱ bamo̱ ka‑ana mɔ nya daa timaa, na bo̱ ma kyii bamo̱ bɛɛko̱‑ana. A bware fe̱yɛ bo̱ nya mfɛɛre̱, na bo̱ gyi kase̱ŋtiŋ ke̱tɔ ke̱maa‑rɔ.

ref: Church officers must be faithful in marriage. They must be in full control of their children and everyone else in their home.
text: A tiri fe̱yɛ asɔre̱e̱ ɔkyarɔpo̱ ke̱maa gye̱ se̱sɛ ne̱ o de ka ko̱ŋko̱ kpeŋ‑o, ne̱ ɔ taare̱ ɔ de̱e̱re̱ mò̱ gyi‑ana na mò̱ lɔŋ‑nɔ awuye si nɛɛnɛɛ‑ɔ.

ref: Those who serve well as officers will earn a good reputation and will be highly respected for their faith in Christ Jesus. The Mystery of Our Religion
text: Ane̱ŋ se̱‑ɔ mò̱ ya waa Wuribware̱ kusuŋ nɛɛnɛɛ, ase̱sɛ e̱ bo̱nyaa mò̱ bwe̱e̱tɔ, na ɔ taare̱ tɔwe̱ Kristoo Yeesuu kuŋu si ase̱ŋ lamaŋ‑nɔ, na kufu mo̱ŋ de mò̱. Kase̱ŋtiŋ dabe̱‑ɔ

ref: I hope to visit you soon. But I am writing these instructions,
text: Mo̱ a de̱ŋ kyo̱rɛɛ wo̱re̱ mɔ bo̱ kyo̱ŋwe̱ fo̱‑ɔ fe̱raa, n de te̱maa fe̱yɛ mo̱ e̱ ba a m bo̱ ŋu fo̱ mbe̱yɔmɔ.

ref: so if I am delayed, you will know how everyone who belongs to God's family ought to behave. After all, the church of the living God is the strong foundation of truth.
text: Ne̱ mo̱ ya kaŋ kyee ne̱e̱ aaa, amo̱ fe̱raa wo̱re̱ mɔ e̱ sa a fo̱ gyii ane̱ŋ ne̱ ane̱ Kristoo awuye ba daa timaa bo̱ kye̱na Wuribware̱ a lɔŋ‑ɔ‑rɔ‑ɔ, kaase̱ e̱ kaapo̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ ne̱ mò̱ wo̱re̱ dooo i de ŋkpa‑ɔ asɔre̱e̱‑ɔ. Asɔre̱e̱ mɔ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ a sa ne̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ‑o ye̱re̱.

ref: Here is the great mystery of our religion: Christ came as a human. The Spirit proved that he pleased God, and he was seen by angels. Christ was preached to the nations. People in this world put their faith in him, and he was taken up to glory.
text: Kase̱ŋtiŋ mɔ ne̱ kaa dɛɛ kwe̱e̱rɔ, ne̱ mbe̱yɔmɔ ane̱ a nu kamo̱ kaase̱‑ɔ kyɔ bwe̱e̱tɔ. Kamo̱ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ, oo lee mò̱ e̱ye̱e̱ fe̱yɛ se̱sɛ dimaadi‑o bo̱ kaapo̱ ane̱. Ne̱ Wuribware̱ a kufwiiŋe timaa‑o a kaapo̱ ane̱ŋ ne̱ ɔɔ pre̱ Wuribware̱‑ɔ. Ne̱ Wuribware̱ mbɔɔ‑ɔ a ŋu mò̱. Ne̱ kaye̱‑rɔ ase̱sɛ a nu mò̱ kuŋu si ase̱ŋ timaa ko̱tɔwe̱, ne̱ baa kɔɔre̱ mò̱ gyi. Ne̱ lalalo̱we̱‑ɔ oo kiŋŋi ya kye̱na mò̱ ke̱dabe̱‑ɔ‑rɔ Wuribware̱ se̱.

ref: God's Spirit clearly says that in the last days many people will turn from their faith. They will be fooled by evil spirits and by teachings that come from demons.
text: To, Wuribware̱ a kufwiiŋe timaa‑o a kaapo̱ ane̱ fe̱yɛ saŋ ko̱ e̱ ba na ase̱sɛ ko̱ kine kase̱ŋtiŋ‑o, na bo̱ gya aye̱ba ne̱ Ɔbɔnsam e̱ kaapo̱‑ɔ se̱.

ref: They will also be fooled by the false claims of liars whose consciences have lost all feeling. These liars
text: Ane̱ŋ a atɔ ke̱kaapo̱‑ɔ a le̱e̱ aye̱bapo̱ na nnɔ ŋnyɔ ŋnyɔ awuye ase̱ ne̱e̱. Ane̱ŋ a ase̱sɛ‑ɔ mfɛɛre̱ a wu fe̱yɛ se̱sɛ kayo̱wɔre̱ to̱ŋ ko̱ ne̱ kaa wu‑o.

ref: will forbid people to marry or to eat certain foods. But God created these foods to be eaten with thankful hearts by his followers who know the truth.
text: Ane̱ŋ a ase̱sɛ‑ɔ e̱ kaapo̱ fe̱yɛ a mo̱ŋ de kpa fe̱yɛ ɔko̱ waare̱e̱, ne̱ bo̱ be̱e̱ ba kisi ateese ko̱ kigyi. Wuribware̱ mɔ a twe̱e̱ ateese mɔ ne̱e̱ a bamo̱ ne̱ ba kɔɔre̱ mò̱ ba gyi, ne̱ bo̱ nyi kase̱ŋtiŋ‑o nya gyi amo̱, na bo̱ sa mò̱ aŋsɛ.

ref: What God has said and your prayer will make it fit to eat. Paul's Advice to Timothy
text: Amo̱se̱ se̱‑ɔ, Wuribware̱ a tɔwe̱ fe̱yɛ, ane̱ ya sa mò̱ aŋsɛ na kusuŋ we̱e̱ ateese ke̱maa se̱, ateese‑o e̱ waa atimaa a sa ane̱ a ane̱ gyi. Ane̱ŋ ne̱ a bware fe̱yɛ Timotii waa‑ɔ

ref: If you teach these things to other followers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus. You will show you have grown up on the teachings about our faith and on the good instructions you have obeyed.
text: Fo̱ ya kaapo̱ fo̱ bɛɛko̱‑ana asɔre̱e̱ agyi, amɔ fo̱ i kii Kristoo Yeesuu ɔkyarɔpo̱ timaa. Na fo̱ bo̱ kaapo̱ fe̱yɛ fo̱ a nu kase̱ŋtiŋ ne̱ ane̱ a kɔɔre̱ gyi, ne̱ fo̱ a gya kamo̱ se̱ le̱e̱ hare̱e̱ saŋ‑ɔ.

ref: Don't have anything to do with worthless, senseless stories. Work hard to be truly religious.
text: Amaa fo̱ ma ba fo̱ mfɛɛre̱ bo̱ dɔŋŋɔ itee ne̱ e̱ maa sa mfɛɛre̱ timaa‑o si. Suye kakye̱na timaa ne̱ ka gyi Wuribware̱ akatɔ‑ɔ.

ref: As the saying goes, “Exercise is good for your body, but religion helps you in every way. It promises life now and forever.” These words are worthwhile and should not be forgotten.
text: Ane̱ŋ a ase̱ŋ‑ɔ gye̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ, amo̱se̱‑ɔ ase̱sɛ pɛɛɛ taa fe̱yɛ a gye̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ, na bo̱ kɔɔre̱ amo̱ gyi.

ref: We have put our hope in the living God, who is the Savior of everyone, but especially of those who have faith. This is why we work and struggle so hard.
text: Ke̱tɔ se̱ ne̱ ane̱ e̱ le̱ŋ ane̱ e̱ye̱e̱ ane̱ i suŋ keŋkeŋ‑o e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ a ba ane̱ te̱maa pɛɛɛ bo̱ dɔŋŋɔ Wuribware̱ ne̱ mò̱ wo̱re̱ dooo i de ŋkpa‑ɔ, ne̱ ɔ gye̱ ɔke̱maa ɔmo̱rɔwe̱po̱‑ɔ se̱. Amaa kase̱ŋtiŋ si fe̱raa, ɔ mo̱rɔwe̱ bamo̱ ne̱ ba kɔɔre̱ mò̱ ba gyi‑o ne̱e̱.

ref: Teach these things and tell everyone to do what you say.
text: Sa bamo̱ mbraa mɔ, na fo̱ kaapo̱ ane̱ŋ a atɔ mɔ.

ref: Until I arrive, be sure to keep on reading the Scriptures in worship, and don't stop preaching and teaching.
text: Pwɛɛ na n dɛɛ ba fo̱ ase̱‑ɔ, nya saŋ a fo̱ bo̱ kare̱ abware̱se̱ŋ wo̱re̱‑ɔ gywii asɔre̱e̱ agyi‑o lamaŋ‑nɔ, na fo̱ tɔwe̱ abware̱se̱ŋ, na fo̱ kaapo̱ bamo̱ Wuribware̱ ase̱ŋ.

ref: Remember these things and think about them, so everyone can see how well you are doing.
text: De̱e̱ fa amo̱‑ɔ mfɛɛre̱, na fo̱ de̱e̱ waa atɔ, na ɔke̱maa ŋu ane̱ŋ ne̱ fo̱ a yɔ se̱ fo̱ ke̱bware̱suŋ‑o‑ro‑o.

ref: Be careful about the way you live and about what you teach. Keep on doing this, and you will save not only yourself, but the people who hear you.
text: Amaa sa fo̱ kakye̱na‑rɔ na ke̱tɔ ke̱maa ne̱ fo̱ e̱ kaapo̱‑ɔ se̱. De̱e̱ kya se̱ gya e̱kpa mɔ se̱ keŋkeŋ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ fo̱ ya waa ane̱ŋ, fo̱ e̱ mo̱rɔwe̱ fo̱ fɔŋfɔŋ e̱ye̱e̱ na bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ gya fo̱ kanɔ se̱‑ɔ.

ref: Don't correct an older man. Encourage him, as you would your own father. Treat younger men as you would your own brother,
text: Mbe̱yɔmɔ, fo̱ ma kaŋ ba akatɔ bo̱ saa anyaŋbre̱sɛ‑ɔ, amaa yuri ase̱ sa se̱ŋsa gywii bamo̱ fe̱yɛ fo̱ se̱‑ana‑ɔ. Waa ayaafɔre̱‑ɔ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ fo̱ e̱ waa fo̱ fɔŋfɔŋ fo̱ daa‑ana‑ɔ dɛɛ.

ref: and treat older women as you would your own mother. Show the same respect to younger women that you would to your sister.
text: Na fo̱ waa akye̱e̱bre̱sɛ‑ɔ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ fo̱ e̱ waa fo̱ nyi‑o dɛɛ, na fo̱ taa kakpo̱nɔ timaa bo̱ kra akye̱e̱pe̱ na mbregyii‑o fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ fo̱ e̱ kra fo̱ pe̱kye̱e̱‑ana‑ɔ dɛɛ.

ref: A widow who is really in need is one who doesn't have any relatives. She has faith in God, and she keeps praying to him night and day, asking for his help.
text: Kpenlekye̱e̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ ne̱ ɔ mo̱ŋ de ɔko̱ ne̱ ɔ de̱e̱re̱ mò̱ se̱‑ɔ taa mò̱ te̱maa bo̱ dɔŋŋɔ Wuribware̱ se̱ ne̱e̱, na ɔ me̱raa se̱ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ mpase̱ na kanye fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ kya mò̱‑rɔ.

ref: A widow who thinks only about having a good time is already dead, even though she is still alive.
text: Amaa kpenlekye̱e̱ ne̱ o te ɔ waa ke̱tɔ ne̱ ɔ kpa‑ɔ e̱ nye̱ra mò̱ e̱ye̱e̱, o du ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mò̱ a wu‑o.

ref: Tell all this to everyone, so they will do the right thing.
text: Sa asɔre̱e̱ agyi‑o mbraa bo̱ le̱e̱ ane̱ŋ a atɔ mɔ se̱, na ɔko̱ ma nya po̱rɔ kpenlekye̱e̱ a agyi‑o na anana‑ɔ amo̱‑ɔ se̱.

ref: People who don't take care of their relatives, and especially their own families, have given up their faith. They are worse than someone who doesn't have faith in the Lord.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ ɔko̱ e̱ ma de̱e̱re̱ mò̱ fɔŋfɔŋ ase̱sɛ se̱, fɔŋfɔŋ mò̱ lɔŋ‑nɔ ase̱sɛ, a du ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mò̱ a kine fe̱yɛ ɔ ma lɛɛ kɔɔre̱ Wuribware̱ a o gyi‑o. Ane̱ŋ a se̱sɛ a e̱bɔye̱‑ɔ gbaa kyɔ mò̱ ne̱ ɔ kyɔ ɔ maa kɔɔre̱ o gyi‑o lee.

ref: Besides, they will become lazy and get into the habit of going from house to house. Next, they will start gossiping and become busybodies, talking about things that are none of their business.
text: Ŋkee daa ne̱ baa nya‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ bo̱ maa lɛɛ suŋ asuŋ ke̱maa, amɔ kulwee ase̱sɛ e̱lɔŋ‑nɔ le̱e̱, na ase̱sɛ kikyii, na bo̱ maa gyi bamo̱ ayaa‑rɔ ase̱ŋ, na ba tɔwe̱ ase̱ŋ ne̱ a mo̱ŋ bware‑o.

ref: I would prefer that young widows get married, have children, and look after their families. Then the enemy won't have any reason to say insulting things about us.
text: Amo̱‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, mo̱ e̱ tɔwe̱ mo̱ i gywii ane̱ŋ a akpenlekye̱e̱ ne̱ bo̱ mo̱ŋ tɛɛ kii akye̱e̱bre̱sɛ‑ɔ fe̱yɛ bo̱ be̱e̱ waare̱e̱, na bo̱ ko̱we̱ ŋyaagyi, na bo̱ de̱e̱re̱ bamo̱ e̱lɔŋ se̱, na bo̱ ma sa a ane̱ ado̱ŋ nya kpa tɔwe̱ bamo̱ kuŋu si ase̱ŋ bɔye̱.

ref: Look what's already happened to some of the young widows! They have turned away to follow Satan.
text: A le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ akpenlekye̱e̱ ko̱ a kyɔ taa bamo̱ e̱ye̱e̱ sa Ɔbɔnsam.

ref: If a woman who is a follower has any widows in her family, she should help them. This will keep the church from having that burden, and then the church can help widows who are really in need. Church Leaders
text: Lalalo̱we̱, ɔkye̱e̱ ne̱ ɔ gye̱ Kristoonyi‑o i de akpenlekye̱e̱ mò̱ ko̱ko̱we̱bɛɛ‑rɔ, amo̱ fe̱raa ɔ kya bamo̱‑rɔ, na bo̱ ma nya taa ke̱kpo̱ne̱ bo̱ dɔŋŋɔ asɔre̱e̱ agyi si. Ɔkye̱e̱‑ɔ ya waa ane̱ŋ fe̱raa, asɔre̱e̱ awuye e̱ taare̱ a bo̱ ŋu de̱e̱re̱ akpenlekye̱e̱ ne̱ bo̱ mo̱ŋ de akrapo̱‑ɔ.

ref: It is just as the Scriptures say, “Don't muzzle an ox when you are using it to grind grain.” You also know the saying, “Workers are worth their pay.”
text: A le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ baa tɔwe̱ abware̱se̱ŋ wo̱re̱‑ɔ‑rɔ fe̱yɛ, “Fo̱ i de naate̱ fo̱ i kyikye yaabraa se̱ fo̱ i lee ayaabraagyi‑o, fo̱ ma kaŋ ŋure mò̱ kanɔ se̱, na ɔ ma nya amo̱ ako̱ wo̱.” Ke̱tɔ ne̱ ke̱ be̱e̱ ki tii si‑o e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ, “Ɔke̱maa ne̱ o suŋ kusuŋ‑o de kakɔka.”

ref: Don't listen to any charge against a church leader, unless at least two or three people bring the same charges.
text: Ɔko̱ ya po̱rɔ ɔbre̱sɛ ke̱se̱ŋ ko̱ se̱ gywii fo̱, fo̱ ma kaŋ nu mpo̱rɔ amo̱, amɔ abɛɛ anyɔ bɛɛɛ asa a po̱rɔ ke̱se̱ŋ amo̱ se̱ pwɛɛ na fo̱ dɛɛ kɔɔre̱ gyi.

ref: But if any of the leaders should keep on sinning, they must be corrected in front of the whole group, as a warning to everyone else.
text: Amaa asɔre̱e̱ abre̱sɛ‑ɔ ɔko̱ e̱ maa se̱ ɔ waa e̱bɔye̱, tɛɛraa mò̱ asɔre̱e̱ agyi‑o akatɔ‑rɔ, na a nya yii bamo̱ ne̱ baa saŋ‑ɔ se̱.

ref: In the presence of God and Christ Jesus and their chosen angels, I order you to follow my instructions! Be fair with everyone, and don't have any favorites.
text: Wuribware̱ na Kristoo Yeesuu na Wuribware̱ mbɔɔ timaa ne̱ oo lee fe̱yɛ mò̱ kamɛɛ‑rɔ awuye‑o ke̱nyare̱‑rɔ ne̱ mo̱ e̱ tɔwe̱ amo̱ mo̱ i gywii fo̱ fe̱yɛ fo̱ gya mbraa mɔ ne̱ mo̱ a tɔwe̱‑ɔ se̱, fo̱ ma kaŋ teŋŋi‑ro, na fo̱ de̱e̱re̱ akatɔ‑rɔ waa ko̱tɔko̱ ke̱kpa se̱.

ref: Don't be too quick to accept people into the service of the Lord by placing your hands on them. Don't sin because others do, but stay close to God.
text: Fo̱ ma kaŋ ko̱kɔse̱ fe̱yɛ fo̱ e̱ ba asare̱e̱ a fo̱ bo̱ dɔŋŋɔ ɔko̱ kuŋu si yure mò̱ ba mò̱ bo̱ kii asɔre̱e̱ abre̱sɛ‑ɔ ɔko̱. N gye̱ ane̱ŋ, ne̱ ane̱ŋ a se̱sɛ‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ ɔbɔye̱waapo̱, ba po̱rɔ fo̱. Amo̱se̱‑ɔ, lee fo̱ e̱ye̱e̱ le̱e̱ e̱bɔye̱ ke̱maa ko̱waa‑rɔ.

ref: Stop drinking only water. Take a little wine to help your stomach trouble and the other illnesses you often have.
text: Ɛhɛɛɛŋ, mo̱ a be̱e̱ nyiŋŋi amo̱‑ɔ se̱. Fo̱ a taare̱ fo̱ e̱ lɔ kame‑ro me̱naŋ me̱naŋ‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, fo̱ ma lɛɛ nuu nkyu wo̱re̱, amaa nuu nta kafwe̱e̱, na n taare̱ kya fo̱ kame‑ro.

ref: It is the same with good deeds. Some are easily seen, but none of them can be hidden.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ ane̱ŋ dɛɛ ne̱ kusuŋ timaa ke̱maa e̱ le̱e̱ ifuri, ne̱ ke̱mo̱ ya kwe̱e̱rɔ gbaa, ke̱ e̱ le̱e̱ kawu.

ref: If you are a slave, you should respect and honor your owner. This will keep people from saying bad things about God and about our teaching.
text: Anya a ke̱be̱gya‑ɔ se̱ fe̱raa, bo̱ bu bamo̱ anyaŋpe̱ kpa ke̱maa se̱, na ɔko̱ ma nya tɔwe̱ ase̱ŋ bɔye̱ bo̱ kye Wuribware̱ ke̱nyare̱ na ane̱ atɔ ke̱kaapo̱‑ɔ.

ref: If any of you slaves have owners who are followers, you should show them respect. After all, they are also followers of Christ, and he loves them. So you should serve and help them the best you can. False Teaching and True Wealth These are the things you must teach and tell the people to do.
text: Anya ne̱ bo̱ bo̱ Kristoo awuye anyaŋpe̱ ke̱sare̱e̱‑rɔ‑ɔ ma kaŋ fa fe̱yɛ bamo̱ aa bamo̱ anyaŋpe̱ a kii Kristoo awuye‑o si‑o, ba ba bamo̱ akatɔ a bo̱ bo̱ saa bamo̱. Ke̱tɔ ne̱ bo̱ waa‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ bo̱ suŋ ane̱ŋ a anyaŋpe̱‑ɔ gbaa nɛɛnɛɛ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ bamo̱ ne̱ ba suŋ ba sa‑ɔ gye̱ Kristoo awuye ne̱ Wuribware̱ e̱ kpa bamo̱ ase̱ŋ‑ɔ ne̱e̱. Kaapo̱ bamo̱, na fo̱ sa a bo̱ nu ane̱ŋ a ase̱ŋ amo̱ kaase̱. Bamo̱ ne̱ ba kaapo̱ e̱ye̱e̱‑ɔ, ne̱ bamo̱ akatɔ a pee atanne̱ se̱‑ɔ ase̱ŋ

ref: and nasty quarrels. They have wicked minds and have missed out on the truth. These people think religion is supposed to make you rich.
text: Bo̱ko̱ mfɛɛre̱ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ ke̱bware̱suŋ gye̱ kpa ko̱ ne̱ ba taare̱ a bo̱ bo̱‑rɔ se̱ bo̱ nya atanne̱‑ɔ ne̱e̱.

ref: And religion does make your life rich, by making you content with what you have.
text: Kase̱ŋtiŋ si fe̱raa, ke̱bware̱suŋ de to̱nɔ, amaa bamo̱ ne̱ bamo̱ akatɔ i gyi atɔ kafwe̱e̱ ne̱ bo̱ kyɔ bo̱ de‑o si‑o e̱ gye̱ ne̱ ba nya to̱nɔ amo̱.

ref: So we should be satisfied just to have food and clothes.
text: Amo̱se̱ se̱‑ɔ, ane̱ i de ateese gyisɛ na atɔ buŋsɛ, a baare sa ane̱.

ref: People who want to be rich fall into all sorts of temptations and traps. They are caught by foolish and harmful desires that drag them down and destroy them.
text: Amaa ɔke̱maa ne̱ ɔ kpa fe̱yɛ o kii atɔ wuye‑o, Ɔbɔnsam e̱ kyɔ mò̱‑rɔ a ɔ ke̱e̱. Na mfɛɛre̱ ke̱‑mo̱ŋ‑de na mfɛɛre̱ bɔye̱ ke̱fa kra mò̱ katɛɛ‑rɔ, na a sa a ŋkee ɔ paŋ ke̱tɔ ke̱maa.

ref: The love of money causes all kinds of trouble. Some people want money so much they have given up their faith and caused themselves a lot of pain. Fighting a Good Fight for the Faith
text: A le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ katanne̱kpa e̱ gye̱ e̱bɔye̱ pɛɛɛ mɔ kuŋu, amo̱ aa e̱bɔye̱ e̱ naa. Bo̱ko̱ a kpa atanne̱ bwe̱e̱tɔ‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, baa yɔwe̱ Kristoo ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi‑o. Amo̱ lalalo̱we̱‑ɔ, bamo̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ maa yuri bamo̱, ne̱ duŋ e̱ te̱ŋŋe̱ bamo̱. Ase̱ŋ ne̱ a gye̱ kɛɛ‑ɔ

ref: Timothy, you belong to God, so keep away from all these evil things. Try your best to please God and to be like him. Be faithful, loving, dependable, and gentle.
text: Amaa fo̱, Timotii, ne̱ fo̱ gye̱ Wuribware̱ se̱sɛ‑ɔ, fo̱ ma gya amo̱‑ɔ se̱, kwaye̱ amo̱. Ke̱tɔ ne̱ fo̱ waa‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ fo̱ le̱ŋ e̱ye̱e̱ waa itimaa, na fo̱ suŋ Wuribware̱, na fo̱ kɔɔre̱ mò̱ gyi, na fo̱ kpa fo̱ bɛɛko̱‑ana, na fo̱ nya kanyite, na fo̱ yuri fo̱ e̱ye̱e̱.

ref: The glorious God is the only Ruler, the King of kings and Lord of lords. At the time that God has already decided, he will send Jesus Christ back again.
text: Yeesuu ke̱ba amo̱‑ɔ, Wuribware̱ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ ɔ tɔwe̱ fe̱yɛ saŋ a fo̱ fe̱yɛ ɔ ba pwɛɛ na ɔ dɛɛ ba, Wuribware̱ ne̱ ɔ gye̱ ŋyure pɛɛɛ kuŋu‑o, owure ne̱ ke̱yaale̱ŋ pɛɛɛ bo̱ mò̱ ke̱sare̱e̱‑rɔ‑ɔ, ne̱ ɔ gye̱ awure pɛɛɛ‑rɔ owure‑o na anyaŋpe̱ pɛɛɛ‑rɔ nyaŋpe̱‑ɔ.

ref: Only God lives forever! And he lives in light that no one can come near. No human has ever seen God or ever can see him. God will be honored, and his power will last forever. Amen.
text: Mò̱ wo̱re̱ kpeŋ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ ɔ maa wu. O te ke̱laŋŋe̱rɔ‑rɔ ne̱e̱, ne̱ ke̱tɔ a laŋŋe̱‑rɔ ke̱ e̱ to̱re̱, ɔko̱ maa taare̱ a ɔ de̱e̱re̱ mò̱. Ne̱ ɔko̱ mo̱ŋ tɛɛ ŋu mò̱, ane̱ŋ dɛɛ ne̱ ɔko̱ maa taare̱ a o ŋu mò̱. Ane̱ bo̱nyaa mò̱, mò̱ e̱ gye̱ ɔdabe̱ ne̱ ɔ bo̱ le̱ŋ nsu pɛɛɛ. Amɛye̱.

ref: Warn the rich people of this world not to be proud or to trust in wealth that is easily lost. Tell them to have faith in God, who is rich and blesses us with everything we need to enjoy life.
text: Tɔwe̱ gywii atɔ awuye fe̱yɛ bo̱ ma kaŋ kaapo̱ bamo̱ e̱ye̱e̱, na bo̱ ma ba e̱ye̱e̱ bo̱ dɔŋŋɔ atɔ se̱, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ atɔ e̱ fo̱. Amaa bo̱ ba te̱maa bo̱ dɔŋŋɔ Wuribware̱ se̱, mò̱ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ o buŋŋi kakpo̱nɔ‑rɔ ɔ sa ane̱ ke̱tɔ ke̱maa, na ane̱ akatɔ nya gyi.

ref: Instruct them to do as many good deeds as they can and to help everyone. Remind the rich to be generous and share what they have.
text: Be̱e̱ tɔwe̱ gywii bamo̱ fe̱yɛ bo̱ waa itimaa, na bo̱ sa a bamo̱ ke̱dame̱naŋsɛ fo̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ bamo̱ atɔ ta‑ɔ dɛɛ, na bo̱ buŋŋi bamo̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ‑rɔ ke atɔ.

ref: Timothy, guard what God has placed in your care! Don't pay any attention to godless and stupid talk that sounds smart but really isn't.
text: Timotii, de̱e̱re̱ ke̱tɔ ne̱ Wuribware̱ a taa bo̱ waa fo̱ ke̱sare̱e̱‑rɔ‑ɔ se̱ nɛɛnɛɛ. Na fo̱ kwaye̱ e̱se̱ŋsa na ikii na atɔ ke̱kaapo̱ ne̱ bo̱ko̱ e̱ te̱e̱ fe̱yɛ kanyiase̱ŋ‑ɔ. A le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ a maa kaapo̱ kanyiase̱ŋ ko̱ pɛɛɛ, ne̱ a be̱e̱ a mo̱ŋ le̱e̱ Wuribware̱ ase̱.

ref: Some people have even lost their faith by believing this talk. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
text: Ane̱ŋ a ase̱sɛ‑ɔ yɛ bamo̱ fe̱raa, bo̱ de kanyiase̱ŋ amo̱, amaa baa waa ane̱ŋ ne̱ baa fo̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ‑o na ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi a e̱kpa‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ. Wuribware̱ yure fo̱.

ref: Night and day I mention you in my prayers. I am always grateful for you, as I pray to the God my ancestors and I have served with a clear conscience.
text: Saŋ ke̱maa ne̱ mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ mpase̱ na kanye‑o, mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ mo̱ e̱ sa fo̱, na fo̱ se̱, mo̱ e̱ sa Wuribware̱ aŋsɛ. Saŋ ke̱maa n de kakpo̱nɔ ko̱ŋko̱ mo̱ i suŋ Wuribware̱, fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ n nana‑ana a waa‑ɔ dɛɛ.

ref: I remember how you cried, and I want to see you, because this would make me truly happy.
text: Mo̱ a nyiŋŋi si ane̱ŋ ne̱ fo̱ a su nsaŋ ne̱ ane̱ a brawe̱ abɛɛ se̱‑ɔ. Ane̱ŋ se̱‑ɔ mo̱ e̱ kpa fe̱yɛ m be̱e̱ ŋu fo̱, na mo̱ akatɔ be̱e̱ nya gyi.

ref: I also remember the genuine faith of your mother Eunice. Your grandmother Lois had the same sort of faith, and I am sure you have it as well.
text: Mo̱ a be̱e̱ nyiŋŋi ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi ne̱ fo̱ nana kye̱e̱sɛ Lowis na fo̱ nyi Yunis a kɔɔre̱ Wuribware̱ gyi‑o si, ne̱ mo̱ a nyiŋŋi ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi kase̱ŋtiŋ ne̱ ŋ nyi fe̱yɛ fo̱ de‑o si.

ref: So I ask you to make full use of the gift God gave you when I placed my hands on you. Use it well.
text: Ane̱ŋ se̱‑ɔ, mo̱ i nyiŋŋi fo̱ se̱ fe̱yɛ saŋ‑ɔ mo̱ a ba asare̱e̱ bo̱ dɔŋŋɔ fo̱ kuŋu si yure fo̱, ne̱ Wuribware̱ a sa fo̱ aketɔ ko̱, na fo̱ taare̱ waa mò̱ kusuŋ. Amo̱se̱‑ɔ, fo̱ ma kine aketɔ amo̱, na fo̱ ma sa a kufu nya fo̱.

ref: God saved us and chose us to be his holy people. We did nothing to deserve this, but God planned it because he is so kind. Even before time began God planned for Christ Jesus to show kindness to us.
text: A le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ ɔɔ mo̱rɔwe̱ ane̱, ne̱ ɔɔ te̱e̱ ane̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ bo̱ kye̱na nɛɛnɛɛ sa mò̱. N gye̱ sa ne̱ ane̱ a waa ke̱tɔ timaa ko̱ sa mò̱ ne̱e̱ ne̱ ɔɔ waa amo̱‑ɔ sa ane̱, amaa ɔɔ kyɔ fa amo̱ mfɛɛre̱ ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ɔ mo̱rɔwe̱ ane̱. Kase̱ŋtiŋ si pwɛɛ ne̱ ɔɔ dɛɛ twe̱e̱ kaye̱ mɔ gbaa‑o, Kristoo Yeesuu si ne̱ ɔɔ ye̱re̱ bo̱ mo̱rɔwe̱ ane̱.

ref: Now Christ Jesus has come to offer us God's gift of undeserved grace. Christ our Savior defeated death and brought us the good news. It shines like a light and offers life that never ends.
text: Ane̱ dɛɛ ane̱ mo̱ŋ nyi amo̱‑ɔ, amɔ bo̱ fo̱ saŋ ne̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Kristoo Yeesuu a ba kaye̱ mɔ‑rɔ bo̱ lee amo̱ kaase̱ bo̱ kaapo̱ ane̱‑ɔ. Kristoo e̱ gye̱ ne̱ ɔɔ kɔ gyi lowi si, ne̱ ɔɔ ye̱re̱ ase̱ŋ timaa ke̱kaapo̱ se̱ bo̱ lee ŋkpa na kukyure ne̱ a mo̱ŋ de kɛɛ‑ɔ bo̱ kaapo̱ ane̱.

ref: This is why I am suffering now. But I am not ashamed! I know the one I have faith in, and I am sure he can guard until the last day what he has trusted me with.
text: Ke̱tɔ se̱ ne̱ mo̱ i gyi awo̱re̱fɔɔ‑ɔ ne̱e̱, amo̱‑ɔ pɛɛɛ gbaa ipeere mo̱ŋ de mo̱. A le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ŋ nyi mò̱ ne̱ mo̱ a kɔɔre̱ mò̱ gyi‑o, ne̱ ŋ nyi fe̱yɛ ɔ taare̱ a ɔ de̱e̱re̱ ke̱tɔ ne̱ ɔɔ bo̱ waa mo̱ ke̱sare̱e̱‑rɔ‑ɔ se̱ ya bo̱ fo̱ saŋ ne̱ Kristoo be̱e̱ ɔ ba‑ɔ.

ref: Now follow the example of the correct teaching I gave you, and let the faith and love of Christ Jesus be your model.
text: Fo̱, Timotii, fe̱raa, kra kase̱ŋtiŋ ase̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ a waa bo̱ kaapo̱ fo̱ fe̱yɛ fo̱ waa‑ɔ‑rɔ keŋkeŋ. Na fo̱ ma kaŋ kine ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi na ke̱kpa ne̱ Kristoo a bo̱ sa ane̱‑ɔ.

ref: You have been trusted with a wonderful treasure. Guard it with the help of the Holy Spirit, who lives within us.
text: Amaa sa a Wuribware̱ a kufwiiŋe timaa‑o ne̱ o te ane̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ‑rɔ‑ɔ de̱e̱re̱ atɔ timaa ne̱ ɔɔ taa bo̱ bɔɔrɔ fo̱‑ɔ se̱.

ref: You know that everyone in Asia has turned against me, especially Phygelus and Hermogenes.
text: Fo̱ nyi fe̱yɛ bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ bo̱ Asiya swe̱e̱re̱ se̱‑ɔ pɛɛɛ a se̱re̱ yɔwe̱ mo̱. Figeelus na Hɛɛmɔgɛnɛs tii bamo̱ se̱.

ref: I pray that the Lord will be kind to the family of Onesiphorus. He often cheered me up and wasn't ashamed of me when I was put in jail.
text: Amaa Onisiforus fe̱raa, mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ Wuribware̱ fe̱yɛ ɔ mo̱rɔwe̱ mò̱ ase̱sɛ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mò̱ ya nare̱ mo̱ ase̱ sa mo̱ kakpo̱nɔkya iluwi bwe̱e̱tɔ. Ipeere mo̱ŋ nya mò̱ bo̱ le̱e̱ ane̱ŋ ne̱ baa tii mo̱‑ɔ se̱.

ref: Then after he arrived in Rome, he searched everywhere until he found me.
text: Ane̱ŋ se̱‑ɔ, mò̱ a de̱ŋ bo̱ fo̱ Roma maŋ‑nɔ‑ɔ, ne̱ oo pee akatɔ buwi bo̱ ŋu mo̱.

ref: I pray that the Lord Jesus will ask God to show mercy to Onesiphorus on the day of judgment. You know how much he helped me in Ephesus.
text: Fo̱ nyi dame̱naŋsɛ atɔ de̱maŋte̱ ne̱ ɔɔ waa sa mo̱ Ifisus maŋ‑nɔ‑ɔ. Mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ fe̱yɛ saŋ ne̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu i gyi ase̱sɛ pɛɛɛ ase̱ŋ‑ɔ, o ŋu mò̱ e̱wɛɛ.

ref: Timothy, my child, you must let Christ Jesus make you strong by his gift of undeserved grace.
text: Mo̱ gyi, fo̱ fe̱raa sa a Yeesuu Kristoo ba mò̱ ŋyure‑o bo̱ sa fo̱ ke̱yaale̱ŋ.

ref: You have often heard me teach. Now I want you to tell these same things to followers who can be trusted to tell others.
text: Atɔ ne̱ fo̱ a nu mo̱ e̱ tɔwe̱ amo̱ lamaŋ akatɔ‑rɔ‑ɔ, fo̱ taa amo̱ ase̱ŋ ko̱tɔwe̱ dɛɛ bo̱ bɔɔrɔ ase̱sɛ ne̱ fo̱ e̱ kɔɔre̱ bamo̱ fo̱ i gyi‑o, na bamo̱ mɔ bo̱ nya nya gyii amo̱ ko̱tɔwe̱ taa ya tɔwe̱ gywii bo̱ko̱.

ref: As a good soldier of Christ Jesus you must endure your share of suffering.
text: Amaa waa siraa fe̱yɛ fo̱ i ŋu ase̱ŋ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ i ŋu‑o dɛɛ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ fo̱ gye̱ Kristoo Yeesuu soogyaanyi timaa ne̱e̱.

ref: Soldiers on duty don't work at outside jobs. They try only to please their commanding officer.
text: Soogyaanyi maa yɔ ke̱naa‑rɔ‑ɔ ɔ nyɔŋ ɔ ke̱e̱ kamɛɛ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ɔ kpa a ɔ kɔ na mò̱ ɔgye̱ŋkpɛɛpo̱ akatɔ gyi mò̱ se̱.

ref: And farmers who work hard are the first to eat what grows in their field.
text: Ane̱ŋ dɛɛ ne̱ ɔdɔɔpo̱ ne̱ ɔ mo̱ŋ bo̱ wo̱rɔgya‑ɔ adɔɔteese i wuree baare, na ɔ nya gyi.

ref: If you keep in mind what I have told you, the Lord will help you understand completely.
text: Fa ke̱tɔ ne̱ mo̱ e̱ tɔwe̱ mo̱ i gywii fo̱‑ɔ mfɛɛre̱, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ e̱ sa a fo̱ nu amo̱‑rɔ pɛɛɛ nɛɛnɛɛ.

ref: Keep your mind on Jesus Christ! He was from the family of David and was raised from death, just as my good news says.
text: Fo̱ ma taŋ Yeesuu Kristoo ase̱ŋ se̱, fe̱yɛ ɔɔ le̱e̱ Owure Deefid a ke̱nana‑ɔ‑rɔ ne̱e̱, ne̱ mò̱ a wu‑o, ne̱ Wuribware̱ a kyiŋŋi mò̱ le̱e̱ lowi‑ro. Amo̱ e̱ gye̱ mò̱ kuŋu si ase̱ŋ timaa ne̱ mo̱ e̱ tɔwe̱‑ɔ.

ref: And because of this message, I am locked up in jail and treated like a criminal. But God's good news isn't locked in jail,
text: Ase̱ŋ timaa mɔ ke̱kaapo̱ se̱ ne̱ mo̱ i gyi awo̱re̱fɔɔ mɔ mbe̱yɔmɔ. Ne̱ baa kperi amo̱ se̱ da mo̱ e̱kpe̱e̱, tii mo̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ a gye̱ e̱bɔye̱ ɔwaapo̱‑ɔ. Amaa bo̱ maa taare̱ a bo̱ da Wuribware̱ ase̱ŋ e̱kpe̱e̱.

ref: and so I am willing to put up with anything. Then God's special people will be saved and given eternal glory because they belong to Christ Jesus.
text: Amo̱se̱ se̱ ne̱ mo̱ i nyite mo̱ i gyi awo̱re̱fɔɔ de̱maŋte̱ mo̱ e̱ sa bamo̱ ne̱ Wuribware̱ a lee fe̱yɛ bo̱ gye̱ mò̱ gyi‑ana‑ɔ, na Kristoo Yeesuu nya mo̱rɔwe̱ bamo̱, sa bamo̱ ke̱dabe̱ na wuraa Wuribware̱ se̱, na a mo̱ŋ de kɛɛ.

ref: Here is a true message: “If we died with Christ, we will live with him.
text: Kiliŋ mɔ ne̱ ba waa‑ɔ gye̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ, “Ane̱ ya kperi mò̱ se̱ wu, amo̱ fe̱raa ane̱ e̱ kye̱na mò̱ ase̱.

ref: If we don't give up, we will rule with him. If we deny that we know him, he will deny that he knows us.
text: Ane̱ ya nya kanyite gyi awo̱re̱fɔɔ, amo̱ fe̱raa ane̱ mɔ ane̱ i kii awure mò̱ ase̱. Ne̱ ane̱ ya kine mò̱ fe̱raa, mò̱‑ɔ mɔ i kine ane̱.

ref: Don't let anyone forget these things. And with God as your witness, you must warn them not to argue about words. These arguments don't help anyone. In fact, they ruin everyone who listens to them.
text: Amo̱se̱ se̱‑ɔ de̱e̱ nyiŋŋi mo̱ne̱ asɔre̱e̱ agyi ase̱ŋ mɔ se̱, na fo̱ yii bamo̱ amo̱ se̱ tɔwe̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ i ŋu atɔ ke̱maa ne̱ se̱sɛ e̱ waa‑ɔ. Yii bamo̱ se̱ fe̱yɛ bo̱ ma kaŋ kye̱na kwaa ba gyiiri ikii ba kpa ase̱ŋkpare̱gyi kaase̱ a bo̱ nu. Ane̱ŋ a atɔ mɔ mo̱ŋ de to̱nɔ ke̱maa, ne̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ si a nye̱ra bamo̱ ne̱ ba nu amo̱‑ɔ.

ref: Do your best to win God's approval as a worker who doesn't need to be ashamed and who teaches only the true message.
text: Le̱ŋ e̱ye̱e̱ keŋkeŋ suŋ fo̱ kusuŋ, na Wuribware̱ mɔ akatɔ gyi ke̱tɔ ne̱ fo̱ e̱ waa‑ɔ se̱, na ane̱ŋ a kusuŋ ne̱ fo̱ a waa fo̱ e̱ sa mò̱‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, fo̱ ma gyi ipeere. Wuribware̱ ase̱ŋ gye̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ, amo̱se̱‑ɔ kaapo̱ amo̱ kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

ref: That sort of talk is like a sore that won't heal. And Hymenaeus and Philetus have been talking this way
text: Ane̱ŋ a atɔ ke̱kaapo̱ bɔye̱ amo̱ du ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ lɔ ne̱ o gyo ɔ kɔɔte̱‑ɔ. Anyare̱ anyɔ ko̱ ne̱ ba kaapo̱ ane̱ŋ a atɔ‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ Himiniyus na Filetus.

ref: by teaching that the dead have already been raised to life. This is far from the truth, and it is destroying the faith of some people.
text: Baa yɔwe̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ a e̱kpa‑ɔ, ne̱ ŋkee ba kaapo̱ fe̱yɛ ase̱sɛ kikyiŋŋi le̱e̱ lowi‑ro a kyɔ ba kyo̱ŋ. Ane̱ŋ a ase̱ŋ mɔ se̱‑ɔ, baa sa ne̱ ase̱sɛ ko̱ a yɔwe̱ ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi.

ref: But the foundation God has laid is solid. On it is written, “The Lord knows who his people are. So everyone who worships the Lord must turn away from evil.”
text: Amaa Wuribware̱ a da mò̱ ase̱ŋ‑ɔ talii ne̱e̱ bo̱ ye̱ra kpuŋ, ne̱ ɔɔ kyo̱rɛɛ bo̱ be̱ya fe̱yɛ, “Ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ nyi bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ gye̱ mò̱ lee‑o,” ne̱ “Ɔke̱maa ne̱ ɔ tɔwe̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ e̱ bo̱ mò̱‑ɔ, amo̱ fe̱raa, ɔ yɔwe̱ mò̱ e̱bɔye̱ ko̱waa.”

ref: This is also how it is with people. The ones who stop doing evil and make themselves pure will become special. Their lives will be holy and pleasing to their Master, and they will be able to do all kinds of good deeds.
text: Ane̱ŋ se̱‑ɔ se̱sɛ bo̱ro̱bo̱rɔɔ ya lee mò̱ e̱ye̱e̱ le̱e̱ e̱bɔye̱‑rɔ, o kii fe̱yɛ ke̱tɔ ne̱ bo̱ de atɔ timaa‑o ba waa‑rɔ‑ɔ, na o kii ɔkpe̱yaa, o de ke̱tɔ waasɛ bo̱ sa lɔŋ wuye‑o.

ref: Run from temptations that capture young people. Always do the right thing. Be faithful, loving, and easy to get along with. Worship with people whose hearts are pure.
text: Amo̱se̱ se̱‑ɔ, Timotii, kwaye̱ ayaafɔre̱ a ayo̱rɔwe̱tɔ bɔye̱‑ɔ. Na fo̱ gya itimaa na kaye̱e̱yuri e̱kpa se̱, na fo̱ kra fo̱ ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi‑o‑ro keŋkeŋ. Fo̱ aa ase̱sɛ ne̱ ba kpa abɛɛ, ne̱ bo̱ de kakpo̱nɔfwiiri ba su ba kpa Wuribware̱ ke̱kya‑rɔ‑ɔ a de̱e̱ nare̱.

ref: Be humble when you correct people who oppose you. Maybe God will lead them to turn to him and learn the truth.
text: O yuri ase̱ lɔŋŋɔ mò̱ apo̱rɔpo̱ ne̱ bo̱ ye̱re̱ bo̱ kye mò̱‑ɔ bo̱ ye̱ra e̱kpa timaa si, na Wuribware̱ ya sure, bo̱ nu bamo̱ e̱ye̱e̱, gyii kase̱ŋtiŋ‑o.

ref: They have been trapped by the devil, and he makes them obey him, but God may help them escape.
text: Na ŋkee bo̱ gyii ase̱ŋ, na bo̱ nya nya bamo̱ e̱ye̱e̱ le̱e̱ Ɔbɔnsam ke̱sare̱e̱‑rɔ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mò̱ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ ɔ da bamo̱ katɛɛ‑rɔ, ba bamo̱ bo̱ kii anya ne̱ ba waa ke̱tɔ ne̱ ɔ kpa‑ɔ.

ref: You can be certain that in the last days there will be some very hard times.
text: Mo̱ gyi Timotii, ŋu fe̱yɛ saŋ ne̱ kaye̱ ya tɔ‑rɔ e̱gye̱ kɛɛ‑ɔ, kakye̱na‑rɔ e̱ waa le̱ŋ fɛɛ.

ref: heartless, and hateful. Their words will be cruel, and they will have no self-control or pity. These people will hate everything good.
text: Se̱sɛ maa lɛɛ lee kame‑ro a ɔ kpa mò̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ, ane̱ŋ dɛɛ ne̱ ɔko̱ maa ŋu ɔko̱ e̱wɛɛ. Tɔkyii na ke̱nyare̱nye̱ra na e̱kɔ ke̱kpa na daa bɔye̱ dooo e̱ gye̱ ne̱ a ba saŋ amo̱. Ŋkee ba kisi ke̱tɔ ke̱maa ne̱ ki bware‑o.

ref: They will be sneaky, reckless, and puffed up with pride. Instead of loving God, they will love pleasure.
text: Na bo̱ gyi kidiburo bo̱ de ase̱sɛ aŋu ba da abɛɛ, na bo̱ waa kuŋurole̱ŋ na akatɔle̱ŋ ba bu bamo̱ e̱ye̱e̱ bo̱ kyo̱ŋ bamo̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ‑ana. Bamo̱ akatɔ i gyi kaye̱‑rɔ atɔ se̱ fɛɛ bo̱ kyo̱ŋ Wuribware̱.

ref: Even though they will make a show of being religious, their religion won't be real. Don't have anything to do with such people.
text: Na ane̱ŋ a ase̱sɛ‑ɔ e̱ waa akatɔ se̱ fe̱yɛ bamo̱ a gya ke̱bware̱suŋ‑o si nɛɛnɛɛ‑ɔ. Amaa bamo̱ kakye̱na‑rɔ e̱ kaapo̱ fe̱yɛ bo̱ mo̱ŋ de Wuribware̱ a ke̱yaale̱ŋ‑ɔ. Ane̱ŋ a ase̱sɛ mɔ‑ɔ, lee fo̱ e̱ye̱e̱ le̱e̱ bamo̱‑rɔ, kwaye̱ bamo̱.

ref: These women always want to learn something new, but they never can discover the truth.
text: Ane̱ŋ a akye̱e̱ mɔ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ ba pee akatɔ saŋ ke̱maa ba suye atɔ‑ɔ, amaa bamo̱ mɔ bo̱ maa taare̱ a bo̱ ŋu kase̱ŋtiŋ‑o kaase̱ gyii kamo̱ daa.

ref: But they won't get very far with their foolishness. Soon everyone will know the truth about them, just as Jannes and Jambres were found out. Paul's Last Instructions to Timothy
text: Ane̱ŋ se̱‑ɔ, ke̱tɔ ke̱maa ne̱ ba waa‑ɔ maa kya se̱ a ke̱ bo̱ yɔ ane̱ŋ sa bamo̱, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ bamo̱ kaye̱ba‑ɔ e̱ le̱e̱ ifuri, na ɔke̱maa ŋu fe̱yɛ bo̱ mo̱ŋ nyi ase̱ŋ, fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ baa ŋu Yanɛs na Yambras lee‑o. De̱e̱ kaapo̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ ke̱kaapo̱

ref: Timothy, you know what I teach and how I live. You know what I want to do and what I believe. You have seen how patient and loving I am, and how in the past I put up with
text: Amaa fo̱, Timotii, fe̱raa, fo̱ nyi mo̱ atɔ ke̱kaapo̱, ne̱ fo̱ a gya mo̱ se̱ ŋu ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ kakye̱na‑rɔ du‑o, ŋu ke̱tɔ ne̱ n gye̱‑ɔ. Fo̱ a ŋu ane̱ŋ ne̱ n de Yeesuu ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi‑o‑ro‑o, ne̱ fo̱ a ŋu mo̱ kanyite na ke̱kpa ne̱ mo̱ e̱ kpa ase̱sɛ ase̱ŋ‑ɔ. Ne̱ fo̱ a ŋu awo̱re̱fɔɔ de̱maŋte̱ ne̱ mo̱ a gyi‑o na bo̱rɔkraa pɛɛɛ ne̱ baa bo̱ waa mo̱‑ɔ.

ref: trouble and suffering in the cities of Antioch, Iconium, and Lystra. Yet the Lord rescued me from all those terrible troubles.
text: Ne̱ fo̱ a be̱e̱ ŋu ane̱ŋ ne̱ mo̱ a gyi awo̱re̱fɔɔ Ante̱yɔke̱ya na Ikoniyum na Lisitra e̱maŋ‑nɔ‑ɔ. Ane̱ŋ a kase̱ŋŋu suyo mɔ ne̱ mo̱ a nyite kamo̱‑ɔ, Wuribware̱ a lee mo̱ le̱e̱ kamo̱ pɛɛɛ‑rɔ.

ref: In fact, anyone who belongs to Christ Jesus and wants to live right will have trouble from others.
text: Kase̱ŋtiŋ si fe̱raa ɔke̱maa ne̱ ɔ kpa a ɔ gya Kristoo Yeesuu si, na ɔ taare̱ kye̱na waa Wuribware̱ ke̱pre̱‑ɔ fe̱raa i ŋu ase̱ŋ, na ɔ nya kikisi ase̱sɛ ase̱.

ref: But evil people who pretend to be what they are not will become worse than ever, as they fool others and are fooled themselves.
text: E̱bɔye̱ awaapo̱ na aye̱bapo̱ e̱ de̱e̱ le̱e̱ bɔye̱‑rɔ ya lwee mfe̱ŋ ne̱ a mo̱ŋ bɔ‑ɔ‑rɔ, na bo̱ de̱e̱ ba ase̱sɛ aye̱ba, na bo̱ko̱ mɔ ba bamo̱ aye̱ba.

ref: Keep on being faithful to what you were taught and to what you believed. After all, you know who taught you these things.
text: Amaa fo̱ fe̱raa, fo̱ ma kaŋ yɔwe̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ ne̱ fo̱ a kɔɔre̱ gyi‑o‑ro na kamo̱ e̱kpa timaa ne̱ fo̱ a suye‑o. Na fo̱ nyiŋŋi bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ dɛɛ bo̱ gye̱ fo̱ akaapo̱po̱ timaa‑o si.

ref: Since childhood, you have known the Holy Scriptures that are able to make you wise enough to have faith in Christ Jesus and be saved.
text: Na fo̱ nyiŋŋi si fe̱yɛ nsaŋ ne̱ fo̱ gye̱ keegyi‑o, fo̱ kyɔ fo̱ nyi abware̱se̱ŋ wo̱re̱‑ɔ‑rɔ ase̱ŋ. Abware̱se̱ŋ wo̱re̱ amo̱ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ ɔ kaapo̱ fo̱ ane̱ŋ ne̱ fo̱ e̱ kɔɔre̱ Kristoo Yeesuu a fo̱ gyi‑o, na ane̱ŋ ne̱ ɔ taare̱ a ɔ mo̱rɔwe̱ fo̱‑ɔ.

ref: When Christ Jesus comes as king, he will be the judge of everyone, whether they are living or dead. So with God and Christ as witnesses, I command you
text: Ŋkee fe̱raa n de Wuribware̱ na Kristoo Yeesuu ne̱ mò̱ ya ba kaye̱ mɔ‑rɔ a ɔ bo̱ gyi kuwure, na o gyi bamo̱ ne̱ baa wu‑o na bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ ke̱e̱‑ɔ ase̱ŋ, mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ fo̱ le̱ŋle̱ŋle̱ŋ fe̱yɛ

ref: to preach God's message. Do it willingly, even if it isn't the popular thing to do. You must correct people and point out their sins. But also cheer them up, and when you instruct them, always be patient.
text: fo̱ le̱ŋ e̱ye̱e̱ de̱e̱ pee akatɔ tɔwe̱ abware̱se̱ŋ‑ɔ saŋ ke̱maa. Ye̱re̱‑rɔ keŋkeŋ tɔwe̱ amo̱, fo̱ ma se̱re̱ kufu. A mo̱ŋ de fe̱yɛ saŋ amo̱‑rɔ bware, bɛɛɛ ɔ mo̱ŋ bware, kya se̱ tɔwe̱ amo̱ bo̱ tɛɛraa bamo̱ lɔŋŋɔ bamo̱ bo̱ ye̱ra kpa timaa si, na fo̱ waa bamo̱ wɔre̱. Amaa fo̱ a kaapo̱ bamo̱ abware̱se̱ŋ‑ɔ, waa kanyite, yuri ase̱, ba amo̱ bo̱ be̱ra bamo̱.

ref: They will turn from the truth and eagerly listen to senseless stories.
text: Kase̱ŋtiŋ‑o ase̱ŋ maa lɛɛ lwee bamo̱ ke̱se̱bɔ‑rɔ, na bo̱ kine kamo̱ ke̱gyase̱, kɔɔre̱ aye̱ba itee gyi.

ref: But you must stay calm and be willing to suffer. You must work hard, telling the good news and to do your job well.
text: Amaa fo̱, Timotii, fe̱raa, de̱e̱ kra fo̱ e̱ye̱e̱ nɛɛnɛɛ kpa ke̱maa se̱. Waa siraa nyite gyi awo̱re̱fɔɔ. Waa kusuŋ ne̱ ase̱ŋ timaa‑o ɔtɔwe̱po̱ e̱ waa‑ɔ, na fo̱ waa asuŋ pɛɛɛ ne̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ a te̱e̱ fo̱ fe̱yɛ fo̱ bo̱ waa‑ɔ, na fo̱ ma yɔwe̱.

ref: Now the time has come for me to die. My life is like a drink offering being poured out on the altar.
text: M fe̱raa, mo̱ lowi saŋ a tɔ‑rɔ. Kase̱ŋtiŋ si mo̱ ŋkpa du ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ nta ne̱ bo̱ de ba twiiri we̱e̱ kabo̱ ne̱ bo̱ de bo̱ lɔŋŋɔ Wuribware̱‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ.

ref: Come to see me as soon as you can.
text: Timotii, fo̱ ma kyo̱kyɔɔ ke̱yaa, mo̱ e̱ kpa fe̱yɛ fo̱ da e̱ye̱e̱ se̱ ba mo̱ ase̱ me̱naŋ,

ref: Demas loves the things of this world so much that he left me and went to Thessalonica. Crescens has gone to Galatia, and Titus has gone to Dalmatia.
text: a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ, De̱e̱mas a kpa kaye̱ mɔ‑rɔ atɔ bwe̱e̱tɔ‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, ɔɔ se̱re̱ yɔwe̱ mo̱ o yii Tisalonikaa maŋ‑nɔ, ne̱ Krɛse̱kɛns mɔ yii Galatiya swe̱e̱re̱ se̱, ne̱ Tiitus mɔ yii Dalamatiya swe̱e̱re̱ se̱.

ref: Only Luke has stayed with me. Mark can be very helpful to me, so please find him and bring him with you.
text: Amɔ Lukas wo̱re̱ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ mo̱ aa mò̱ bo̱ mfe̱e̱. Fo̱ e̱ ba, fo̱ aa Maak ba, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mò̱ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ ɔ taare̱ a ɔ kya mo̱‑rɔ mo̱ kusuŋ ko̱waa‑rɔ.

ref: I sent Tychicus to Ephesus.
text: Tikikus fe̱raa, mo̱ a suŋ mò̱ bo̱ kyo̱ŋwe̱ Ifisus maŋ‑nɔ.

ref: When you come, bring the coat I left at Troas with Carpus. Don't forget to bring the scrolls, especially the ones made of leather.
text: Fo̱ e̱ ba, na fo̱ kɔɔre̱ mo̱ waagya ne̱ mo̱ a yɔwe̱ bo̱ sii Kaapus aye̱ Trowas maŋ‑nɔ‑ɔ baa. Na fo̱ be̱e̱ taa mo̱ e̱wo̱re̱ baa. E̱mo̱ ne̱ baa ba kabo̱ wo̱re̱ bo̱ waa‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ ne̱ e̱mo̱ ase̱ŋ tiri mo̱ bwe̱e̱tɔ.

ref: Alexander, the metalworker, has hurt me in many ways. But the Lord will pay him back for what he has done.
text: Alɛsanda ne̱ ɔ gye̱ Ifisusnyi, ne̱ ɔ gye̱ danyaŋ bwaye̱po̱‑ɔ a waa mo̱ bɔye̱ bwe̱e̱tɔ. Ane̱ŋ se̱‑ɔ, ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu e̱ ka mò̱ ko̱kɔ bo̱ le̱e̱ ke̱tɔ ne̱ ɔɔ waa‑ɔ se̱.

ref: Alexander opposes what we preach, so you had better watch out for him.
text: Fo̱ gbaa de̱e̱ sa mò̱ se̱, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mò̱ ya tii ane̱ kpa keŋkeŋ fe̱yɛ ane̱ ma tɔwe̱ abware̱se̱ŋ‑ɔ.

ref: When I was first put on trial, no one helped me. In fact, everyone deserted me. I hope it won't be held against them.
text: Ke̱gye̱ŋkpɛɛsɛ ne̱ baa baa mo̱ iwurekpa, na ŋ ko̱so̱ ye̱re̱ lee mo̱ apo̱rɔpo̱ a mpo̱rɔ‑ɔ kanɔ‑ɔ, ne̱ mo̱ŋ nya ye̱re̱rɔpo̱ ko̱ŋko̱ gbaa, bamo̱ pɛɛɛ a kpaŋ mo̱ se̱. Mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ Wuribware̱ fe̱yɛ ɔ ma kaŋ po̱rɔ bamo̱ amo̱‑ɔ se̱.

ref: But the Lord stood beside me. He gave me the strength to tell his full message, so that all Gentiles would hear it. And I was kept safe from hungry lions.
text: Amaa ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu a ye̱re̱ mo̱‑rɔ, ne̱ ɔɔ sa mo̱ ke̱yaale̱ŋ fe̱yɛ n tɔwe̱ abware̱se̱ŋ kyɛɛkyɛɛ gywii bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ mo̱ŋ gye̱ Yudaa awuye, ne̱ bo̱ bo̱ mfe̱ŋ ba nu mo̱ ase̱ŋ‑ɔ. Ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ ya kɔɔre̱ mo̱ le̱e̱ lowi‑ro.

ref: The Lord will always keep me from being harmed by evil, and he will bring me safely into his heavenly kingdom. Praise him forever and ever! Amen. Final Greetings
text: Ɔ be̱e̱ o lee mo̱, na ase̱ŋ bɔye̱ ke̱maa ne̱ a ba mo̱ se̱‑ɔ kwaye̱ mo̱, na ɔ yaa mo̱ so̱so̱ mfe̱ŋ ne̱ o gyi kuwure‑o ŋkpa na alaŋfiya‑ro. Wuribware̱ nya ke̱dabe̱ na wuraa nsu pɛɛɛ. Amɛye̱.

ref: Give my greetings to Priscilla and Aquila and to the family of Onesiphorus.
text: Mo̱ e̱ ka Priska na mò̱ kuri Akwila kanɔ dame̱naŋsɛ. Ne̱ m be̱e̱ mo̱ e̱ ka Onisiforus ako̱we̱bɛɛ kanɔ.

ref: Erastus stayed at Corinth. Trophimus was sick when I left him at Miletus.
text: Irasitus a sii Korintoo maŋ‑nɔ, amaa mo̱ a yɔwe̱ Trofimus bo̱ sii Mileetus maŋ‑nɔ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ɔ lɔ ne̱e̱.

ref: Do your best to come before winter. Eubulus, Pudens, Linus, and Claudia send you their greetings, and so do the rest of the Lord's followers.
text: Waa me̱naŋ ba pwɛɛ na afwii dɛɛ taye̱. Yubulus na Pudɛns na Linus na ɔkye̱e̱ Kilawudiya na ane̱ abɛɛko̱ Kristoo awuye pɛɛɛ e̱ ka fo̱ kanɔ.

ref: I pray that the Lord will bless your life and will be kind to you.
text: Ke̱tɔ ne̱ ki tii te̱bɔ‑ɔ gye̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu gya fo̱ kra kamɛɛ, na o yure fo̱ aa asɔre̱e̱ agyi‑o pɛɛɛ.

ref: Instead, they must be friendly to strangers and enjoy doing good things. They must also be sensible, fair, pure, and self-controlled.
text: Lee ɔko̱ ne̱ ɔ kra afɔ mò̱ aye̱ nɛɛnɛɛ, ne̱ ɔ kpa itimaa ko̱waa, ne̱ o bu mò̱ e̱ye̱e̱, ne̱ ɔ gye̱ nyiŋkpasɛ timaa ne̱ mò̱ kame‑ro mo̱ŋ de iyisi‑o, ne̱ o nyi mò̱ e̱ye̱e̱ e̱kra nɛɛnɛɛ‑ɔ.

ref: They must stick to the true message they were taught, so their good teaching can help others and correct everyone who opposes it.
text: A bware̱ fe̱yɛ ɔ ye̱re̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ ne̱ ane̱ a kaapo̱ mo̱ne̱‑ɔ‑rɔ keŋkeŋ, na ɔ nya ba kamo̱ ke̱kaapo̱ bo̱ sa ase̱sɛ bo̱ko̱ wɔre̱, na ɔ kaapo̱ bamo̱ ne̱ ba gyiiri kase̱ŋtiŋ‑o ikii‑o fe̱yɛ baa fo̱ kpa.

ref: There are many who don't respect authority, and they fool others by talking nonsense. This is especially true of some Jewish followers.
text: Ke̱tɔ se̱ ne̱ mo̱ e̱ tɔwe̱ amo̱‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ ase̱sɛ bwe̱e̱tɔ bo̱‑rɔ ne̱ bo̱ maa bu asɔre̱e̱ abre̱sɛ‑ɔ, ne̱ bo̱ de se̱ŋsa ne̱ ɔ mo̱ŋ de ke̱se̱ŋkpare̱gyi‑o ba pe̱nna bo̱ko̱. Mo̱ e̱ tɔwe̱ Yudaa awuye ko̱ ne̱ bo̱ gye̱ Kristoo awuye‑o ase̱ŋ ne̱e̱.

ref: It is like one of their own prophets once said, “The people of Crete always tell lies. They are greedy and lazy like wild animals.”
text: Kriitanyi ko̱ ne̱ ɔ gye̱ bamo̱ fɔŋfɔŋ laagyipo̱ ko̱, ne̱ ɔɔ dɛɛ kye̱na‑ɔ a tɔwe̱ bamo̱ ase̱ŋ, ɔ yɛ, Kriita awuye gye̱ aye̱bapo̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ, bo̱ de daa bɔye̱ fɛɛ, ne̱ bo̱ gye̱ awo̱rɔgyapo̱ na ateesekpapo̱ ke̱baŋse̱.

ref: This surely is a true saying. And you should be hard on such people, so you can help them grow stronger in their faith.
text: Bamo̱ kuŋu si ase̱ŋ amo̱ ne̱ ɔɔ tɔwe̱‑ɔ gye̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ. Amo̱se̱‑ɔ waa me̱naŋ tɛɛraa bamo̱ a bo̱ yɔwe̱ ane̱ŋ a daa‑ɔ. Bo̱ gya kase̱ŋtiŋ‑o si, kɔɔre̱ kamo̱ gyi,

ref: Don't pay any attention to any of those senseless Jewish stories and human commands. These are made up by people who won't obey the truth.
text: na bo̱ ma be̱ŋŋaa Yudaa awuye amo̱ na bamo̱ itee na aye̱ba ne̱ ba kaapo̱‑ɔ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ a ase̱sɛ‑ɔ a kine ke̱gya Wuribware̱ a kase̱ŋtiŋ a e̱kpa‑ɔ se̱.

ref: Such people claim to know God, but their actions prove they really don't. They are disgusting. They won't obey God, and they are too worthless to do anything good.
text: Bo̱ yɛ bo̱ nyi Wuribware̱, amaa ane̱ŋ ne̱ bo̱ te bo̱ bɔ‑ɔ e̱ kaapo̱ fe̱yɛ ba pe̱nna ne̱e̱, baa kine mò̱. Bamo̱ ase̱ŋ mo̱ŋ bo̱ Wuribware̱ kɔne̱ kafo̱ŋfwe̱e̱ se̱. Bo̱ de ke̱se̱bɔrɔle̱ŋ fɛɛ, bo̱ mo̱ŋ gya Wuribware̱ a e̱kpa‑ɔ se̱, ane̱ŋ se̱‑ɔ, a mo̱ŋ de kpa fe̱yɛ fo̱ taa kusuŋ dame̱naŋsɛ sa bamo̱ a bo̱ waa.

ref: Tell the older men to have self-control and to be serious and sensible. Their faith, love, and patience must never fail.
text: Kaapo̱ anyaŋbre̱sɛ‑ɔ ane̱ŋ ne̱ ba kra bamo̱ e̱ye̱e̱, na ase̱sɛ nya bu bamo̱‑ɔ. Sa a bo̱ nya ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi kase̱ŋtiŋ‑o, na bamo̱ ke̱kpa waa ko̱kyɔ, na bo̱ nyite awo̱re̱fɔɔ ke̱maa.

ref: Tell the older women to behave as those who love the Lord should. They must not gossip about others or be slaves of wine. They must teach what is proper,
text: Ane̱ŋ dɛɛ ne̱ fo̱ de̱e̱ kaapo̱ akye̱e̱bre̱sɛ‑ɔ ane̱ŋ ne̱ bo̱ kye̱na kakye̱na kpe̱yaa‑ɔ. Bo̱ ma kyii ɔko̱ te̱ŋ mò̱ kanɔ, na bo̱ be̱e̱ bo̱ ma waa atabwe̱e̱po̱.

ref: Each of the younger women must be sensible and kind, as well as a good homemaker, who puts her own husband first. Then no one can say insulting things about God's message.
text: na bo̱ kaapo̱ bamo̱ ane̱ŋ ne̱ bo̱ gyii e̱ye̱e̱ e̱kra nɛɛnɛɛ, na bo̱ ma waa kanyare̱kpa, na ane̱ŋ ne̱ ba kii aka timaa‑o, na bo̱ bu bamo̱ akuri, na bo̱ de̱e̱ waa ke̱dame̱naŋsɛ, na bamo̱ akatɔ pee bamo̱ lɔŋ‑nɔ asuŋ si. N gye̱ ane̱ŋ, ase̱sɛ ko̱ e̱ nya kpa a bo̱ sa se̱ŋsa bo̱ bo̱ kye Wuribware̱ a ase̱ŋ‑ɔ.

ref: Tell the young men to have self-control in everything.
text: Ane̱ŋ dɛɛ ne̱ fo̱ de̱e̱ tɔwe̱ gywii ayaafɔre̱‑ɔ, na bo̱ yuri e̱ye̱e̱ de̱e̱ bu atɔ kpa ke̱maa se̱.

ref: Use clean language that no one can criticize. Do this, and your enemies will be too ashamed to say anything against you.
text: Ke̱bɔye̱ ko̱ e̱ mo̱ŋ le̱e̱ fo̱ se̱ŋsa sasɛ ke̱maa‑rɔ, amo̱ fe̱raa ɔko̱ maa taare̱ a ɔ po̱rɔ fo̱ ko̱ko̱ se̱. Ane̱ŋ‑ɔ ipeere e̱ nya fo̱ ado̱ŋ. Bo̱ maa taare̱ a bo̱ nya ko̱ko̱ ye̱re̱ se̱ bo̱ po̱rɔ fo̱.

ref: or steal from them. They must be completely honest and trustworthy. Then everyone will show great respect for what is taught about God our Savior. God's Kindness and the New Life
text: Ŋkee bo̱ ma kaŋ ywii, na a sa a bamo̱ nyaŋpe̱‑ana kɔɔre̱ bamo̱ gyi ke̱tɔ ke̱maa‑rɔ. Bamo̱ ya waa mfaanɛɛ, ne̱ bamo̱ nyaŋpe̱‑ana i ŋu fe̱yɛ ane̱ ke̱kaapo̱ ane̱ ɔmo̱rɔwe̱po̱ Wuribware̱ a ase̱ŋ‑ɔ bo̱ daŋ. Ke̱tɔ se̱ ne̱ Wuribware̱ a suŋ Kristoo bo̱ kyo̱ŋwe̱ fe̱yɛ ɔ bo̱ kɔɔre̱ ane̱‑ɔ

ref: We are filled with hope, as we wait for the glorious return of our great God and Savior Jesus Christ.
text: Ane̱ te ane̱ de te̱maa ane̱ gywii kakatɔgyi kake amo̱ ne̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ na ɔmo̱rɔwe̱po̱ dabe̱, Yeesuu Kristoo, i kiŋŋi a ɔ ba ke̱laŋŋe̱rɔ na mò̱ ke̱dabe̱ na ke̱yaale̱ŋ‑ɔ‑rɔ.

ref: He gave himself to rescue us from everything evil and to make our hearts pure. He wanted us to be his own people and to be eager to do right.
text: Yeesuu Kristoo mɔ dɛɛ ya ba mò̱ fɔŋfɔŋ kayo̱wɔre̱ bo̱ lɔŋŋɔ ane̱ aa Wuribware̱ ke̱bo̱ŋtɔ‑rɔ. Mfaanɛɛ ne̱ ɔɔ lee ane̱ le̱e̱ kakye̱na bɔye̱‑rɔ, sa ne̱ ane̱ a kii mò̱ fɔŋfɔŋ ase̱sɛ. Ne̱ ŋkee ɔ kpa fe̱yɛ ɔ sa a ane̱ ŋkpo̱nɔ fwiiri, na ane̱ akatɔ pee de̱e̱ waa ke̱dame̱naŋsɛ.

ref: Remind your people to obey the rulers and authorities and not to be rebellious. They must always be ready to do something helpful
text: To, nyiŋŋi Kristoo awuye ne̱ bo̱ bo̱ mfe̱ŋ‑ɔ se̱ fe̱yɛ bo̱ bu abane̱ na ke̱bre̱sɛ na agye̱ŋkpɛɛpo̱, na bo̱ de̱e̱ suŋ kusuŋ timaa ke̱maa ne̱ ɔke̱maa ne̱ o de bamo̱ se̱ ke̱yaale̱ŋ‑ɔ e̱ kpa fe̱yɛ bo̱ waa‑ɔ.

ref: We used to be stupid, disobedient, and foolish, as well as slaves of all sorts of desires and pleasures. We were evil and jealous. Everyone hated us, and we hated everyone.
text: Ane̱ gbaa ane̱ dɛɛ ane̱ mo̱ŋ nyi ase̱ŋ, ne̱ ane̱ maa bu atɔ, ne̱ bo̱ko̱ a pe̱nna ane̱ bo̱ gya e̱bɔye̱ e̱kpa se̱. Ne̱ ane̱ a gyi ane̱ e̱ye̱e̱, ne̱ kayo̱rɔwe̱ bɔye̱ e̱wo̱re̱se̱ e̱wo̱re̱se̱ na mfɛɛre̱ bɔye̱ dooo a bo̱rɔ ane̱ aŋu‑ro. Ane̱ a ka ko̱kwe̱e̱ kisi bo̱ko̱, ne̱ bo̱ko̱ mɔ a kisi ane̱.

ref: He saved us because of his mercy, and not because of any good things we have done. God washed us by the power of the Holy Spirit. He gave us new birth and a fresh beginning.
text: N gye̱ sa ne̱ ane̱ a waa atɔ timaa ko̱ se̱ ne̱e̱ ne̱ ɔɔ mo̱rɔwe̱ ane̱, amaa ane̱ŋ ne̱ oo ŋu ane̱ e̱wɛɛ kpa ane̱ ase̱ŋ‑ɔ se̱ ne̱ ɔɔ waa ane̱ŋ, ne̱ ɔɔ ba mò̱ kufwiiŋe timaa‑o bo̱ kpɛɛ iyisi ne̱ e̱ dɔŋ ane̱ se̱‑ɔ, be̱e̱ bo̱ ko̱we̱ ane̱, waa ane̱ ase̱sɛ po̱pwɛɛ.

ref: God sent Jesus Christ our Savior to give us his Spirit.
text: Ke̱tɔ ne̱ ane̱ ɔmo̱rɔwe̱po̱ Yeesuu Kristoo a waa‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, ne̱ Wuribware̱ a sa ane̱ mò̱ kufwiiŋe timaa‑o bwe̱e̱tɔ.

ref: Jesus treated us much better than we deserve. He made us acceptable to God and gave us the hope of eternal life.
text: Oo ŋu ane̱ e̱wɛɛ ne̱e̱, ne̱ ɔɔ mo̱rɔwe̱ ane̱, ne̱ ane̱ mo̱ŋ lɛɛ ane̱ gye̱ abɔye̱waapo̱, na ane̱ nya kii mò̱ ako̱we̱bɛɛ ane̱ de te̱maa fe̱yɛ ane̱ i gyi mò̱ kapo̱tɛɛ ne̱ ka gye̱ ŋkpa na kukyure ne̱ a mo̱ŋ de kɛɛ‑ɔ.

ref: This message is certainly true. These teachings are useful and helpful for everyone. I want you to insist that the people follow them, so that all who have faith in God will be sure to do good deeds.
text: Abre̱sɛ a tɔwe̱ fe̱yɛ, “Mfe̱ŋ ne̱ a tiri bwaye̱po̱‑ɔ, mfe̱ŋ ne̱ ɔ daye̱‑ɔ.” Bo̱ maa pe̱nna. Amo̱se̱ se̱‑ɔ pee akatɔ kaapo̱ atɔ mɔ pɛɛɛ ne̱ mo̱ a tɔwe̱‑ɔ kpo̱ra‑rɔ, na bamo̱ ne̱ ba kɔɔre̱ Wuribware̱ ba gyi‑o mfɛɛre̱ nya ba amo̱ se̱ nɛɛnɛɛ, na bo̱ nya ba akatɔ bo̱ dɔŋŋɔ itimaa ko̱waa se̱. Awaasɛ timaa bware fɛɛ, ne̱ amo̱ ko̱waa de to̱nɔ bo̱ sa ɔke̱maa.

ref: But don't have anything to do with stupid arguments about ancestors. And stay away from disagreements and quarrels about the Law of Moses. Such arguments are useless and senseless.
text: Ane̱ŋ se̱‑ɔ kwaye̱ ase̱ŋ bo̱ro̱bo̱rɔɔ ne̱ ba tɔwe̱ amo̱ ba yɔ akatɔ‑rɔ ba lwii kamɛɛ. Ba gyiiri Yudaa awuye mbraa‑ɔ se̱ ikii na bamo̱ ke̱nana‑rɔ ade̱daase̱ŋ so̱swe̱e̱ so̱swe̱e̱‑ɔ ikii. Lee fo̱ kanɔ le̱e̱ ane̱ŋ a ikii‑o‑ro, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ e̱ mo̱ŋ bware, ne̱ e̱ mo̱ŋ de to̱nɔ ko̱.

ref: You know their minds are twisted, and their own sins show how guilty they are. Personal Instructions and Greetings
text: Na fo̱ ŋu fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ a se̱sɛ‑ɔ kyɔ o de daa bɔye̱ ne̱e̱. Ne̱ mò̱ fɔŋfɔŋ e̱bɔye̱ a bu mò̱ e̱ye̱e̱ ke̱pɔ fe̱yɛ ɔ gye̱ ɔbɔye̱waapo̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ. Ase̱ŋ ne̱ Pɔɔl a tɔwe̱ bo̱ gye̱ kɛɛ‑ɔ

ref: I plan to send Artemas or Tychicus to you. After he arrives, please try your best to meet me at Nicopolis. I have decided to spend the winter there.
text: Mo̱ i suŋ Aatamas bɛɛɛ Tikikus fo̱ ase̱. Ne̱ se̱sɛ amo̱ ya fo̱ fo̱ ase̱, na fo̱ waa me̱naŋ gyaŋŋaa mo̱ Nikopolis maŋ‑nɔ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ a waa mfɛɛre̱ fe̱yɛ, ke̱kyaare̱ ya fo̱, mfe̱ŋ mo̱ e̱ ya kye̱na.

ref: When Zenas the lawyer and Apollos get ready to leave, help them as much as you can, so they won't have need of anything.
text: Le̱ŋ e̱ye̱e̱ na kanɔ ŋke̱maa se̱ fo̱ taare̱ kya Seenas lɔɔyaa‑ɔ na Apolos‑ro, na bo̱ kya bamo̱ kpa se̱. Na fo̱ kya bamo̱‑rɔ a bo̱ nya ke̱tɔ ke̱maa ne̱ ki tiri bo̱ sa bamo̱ kpa‑ɔ kutu‑ro‑o.

ref: Greetings to you from everyone here. Greet all of our friends who share in our faith. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
text: Bamo̱ ne̱ bo̱ bo̱ mo̱ ase̱‑ɔ pɛɛɛ e̱ ka fo̱ kanɔ. Ka ane̱ bɛɛko̱‑ana Kristoo awuye kanɔ. Mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ yure mo̱ne̱ pɛɛɛ.

ref: I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Philemon's Love and Faith
text: Mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ane̱ se̱ Wuribware̱ na ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu Kristoo fe̱yɛ bo̱ sa mo̱ne̱ ŋyure na kaye̱e̱yuri. Filemɔŋ a ke̱kpa na ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi ne̱ o de‑o

ref: Philemon, each time I mention you in my prayers, I thank God.
text: Filemɔŋ, saŋ ke̱maa ne̱ mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱‑ɔ, mo̱ i nyiŋŋi fo̱ se̱, ne̱ mo̱ e̱ sa Wuribware̱ aŋsɛ saŋ ke̱maa,

ref: I hear about your faith in our Lord Jesus and about your love for all God's people.
text: a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ a nu ane̱ŋ ne̱ fo̱ e̱ kpa Wuribware̱ ase̱sɛ pɛɛɛ ase̱ŋ‑ɔ, na ane̱ŋ ne̱ fo̱ maa se̱ fo̱ e̱ kɔɔre̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu fo̱ i gyi keŋkeŋ‑o.

ref: As you share your faith with others, I pray they may come to know all the blessings Christ has given us.
text: Mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ wo̱rɔgya ma kaŋ nya fo̱, na fo̱ nya taare̱ de̱e̱ tɔwe̱ fo̱ Kristoo ko̱kɔɔre̱gyi‑o ase̱ŋ gywii bo̱ko̱, na a sa a fo̱‑ɔ fo̱ gyii atɔ timaa pɛɛɛ ne̱ ane̱ a nya le̱e̱ Kristoo ase̱‑ɔ lo̱we̱.

ref: My friend, your love has made me happy and has greatly encouraged me. It has also cheered the hearts of God's people. Paul Speaks to Philemon about Onesimus
text: Mo̱ ko̱so̱bɛɛ, ke̱kpa ne̱ fo̱ e̱ kpa Wuribware̱ ase̱sɛ pɛɛɛ‑ɔ a sa ne̱ mo̱ akatɔ a gyi fɛɛ, ne̱ wɔre̱ a nya mo̱ bwe̱e̱tɔ, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ fo̱ ya sa ne̱ bamo̱ mme‑ro a yuri bamo̱. Onisimus ase̱ŋ

ref: I would like to keep him here with me, where he could take your place in helping me while I am here in prison for preaching the good news.
text: Kase̱ŋtiŋ si, weetee mo̱ e̱ kpa fe̱yɛ ŋ kra mò̱ bo̱ sii mo̱ ase̱ mfe̱e̱, na ɔ nya ye̱re̱ fo̱ ayaa‑rɔ kya mo̱‑rɔ tiikpa mfe̱e̱.

ref: But I won't do anything unless you agree to it first. I want your act of kindness to come from your heart, and not be something you feel forced to do.
text: Ma kpa fe̱yɛ ŋ kra mò̱ bo̱ sii, na fo̱ mo̱ŋ nyi amo̱ ase̱ŋ. Amo̱se̱‑ɔ ma ye̱re̱ fo̱ ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ fo̱ kya mo̱‑rɔ. Amaa mo̱ e̱ kpa ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ke̱tɔ ne̱ fo̱ e̱ waa fo̱ e̱ sa mo̱‑ɔ, fo̱ da fo̱ kakpo̱nɔ se̱ waa.

ref: but not as a slave. Onesimus is much more than a slave. To me he is a dear friend, but to you he is even more, both as a person and as a follower of the Lord.
text: Amaa mbe̱yɔmɔ fo̱ maa lɛɛ kɔɔre̱ mò̱ kra fe̱yɛ ke̱nya ne̱ ɔ dɛɛ ɔ gye̱‑ɔ. Ŋkee fe̱raa ɔ bɔ ke̱nya. Kra mò̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ne̱ pɛɛɛ a bo̱ Kristoo a ko̱ko̱we̱bɛɛ‑ɔ‑rɔ. Ɔ gye̱ se̱sɛ timaa bwe̱e̱tɔ mo̱ ase̱. Mò̱ ya ba fo̱ ase̱, o kii ke̱nya timaa na ko̱we̱bɛɛ timaa ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ a ko̱ko̱we̱bɛɛ‑ɔ‑rɔ.

ref: If you consider me a friend because of Christ, then welcome Onesimus as you would welcome me.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ fo̱ i nyi fe̱yɛ mo̱ aa fo̱ e̱ waa kusuŋ ko̱ŋko̱ ane̱ e̱ sa Kristoo ne̱e̱, amo̱ fe̱raa kɔɔre̱ mò̱ kra nɛɛnɛɛ fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ fo̱ e̱ kra mo̱ nɛɛnɛɛ‑ɔ.

ref: With my own hand I write: I, PAUL, WILL PAY YOU BACK. But don't forget you owe me your life.
text: Ŋu fe̱yɛ mo̱ fɔŋfɔŋ ke̱sare̱e̱ ne̱ mo̱ a bo̱ kyo̱rɛɛ ase̱ŋkpare̱gyi mɔ. Amaa fo̱ ma taŋ se̱ fe̱yɛ fo̱ fɔŋfɔŋ de mo̱ ko̱kɔ ko̱, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ se̱ ne̱ fo̱‑ɔ fo̱ a nya fo̱ e̱ye̱e̱ le̱e̱ Ɔbɔnsam ke̱sare̱e̱‑rɔ.

ref: Epaphras is also here in jail for being a follower of Christ Jesus. He sends his greetings,
text: Ipafras ne̱, bo̱ le̱e̱ ane̱ŋ ne̱ mò̱ gbaa gya Kristoo Yeesuu si‑o si, baa tii mo̱ aa mò̱‑ɔ e̱ ka fo̱ kanɔ.

ref: and so do Mark, Aristarchus, Demas, and Luke, who work together with me.
text: Maak na Aristaakus na De̱e̱mas na Lukas ne̱ bo̱ gye̱ mo̱ bɛɛko̱‑ana Kristoo kusuŋ awaapo̱‑ɔ gbaa e̱ ka fo̱ kanɔ dame̱naŋsɛ.

ref: I pray that the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
text: Ŋkee mo̱ e̱ ko̱re̱ ke̱bware̱ko̱re̱ fe̱yɛ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu Kristoo yure mo̱ne̱.

ref: Long ago in many ways and at many times God's prophets spoke his message to our ancestors.
text: De̱daa‑ɔ, iluwi bwe̱e̱tɔ na e̱kpa bwe̱e̱tɔ se̱, ne̱ Wuribware̱ a sa se̱ŋsa gywii ane̱ ade̱daapo̱‑ɔ, mò̱ akyaamɛɛ‑ɔ se̱ ne̱ ɔɔ bo̱ bo̱rɔ.

ref: God's Son has all the brightness of God's own glory and is like him in every way. By his own mighty word, he holds the universe together. After the Son had washed away our sins, he sat down at the right side of the glorious God in heaven.
text: Wuribware̱ a ke̱laŋŋe̱rɔ dabe̱‑ɔ bɔ mò̱ se̱ ne̱e̱ ke̱ e̱ laŋŋe̱‑rɔ. Ɔɔ le̱e̱ Wuribware̱ ke̱tɔ ke̱maa‑rɔ. Mò̱ ase̱ŋ dabe̱‑ɔ ne̱ o de ɔ sa ne̱ atɔ pɛɛɛ mɔ e̱ yɔ se̱ kyɛɛkyɛɛ. Ɔɔ kpɛɛ ase̱sɛ iyisi. Ne̱ ŋkee o yii so̱so̱, mfe̱ŋ ne̱ ɔɔ kye̱na Nyiŋkpe̱ŋ‑ɔ‑kyɔ-bamo̱-pɛɛɛ-ke̱dabe̱ kigyisesare̱e̱ se̱, ne̱ mò̱ aa mò̱ i gyi kuwure.”

ref: He had become much greater than the angels, and the name he was given is far greater than any of theirs. God's Son Is Greater than Angels
text: Amo̱se̱ ne̱ ane̱ i ŋu fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ Wuribware̱ a sa mò̱ gyi‑o ke̱nyare̱ dabe̱ ne̱ ko̱ kyɔ mò̱ mbɔɔ‑ɔ lee‑o, ane̱ŋ dɛɛ ne̱ ɔɔ sa mò̱ gyi‑o ke̱dabe̱ kyo̱ŋ mò̱ mbɔɔ‑ɔ.

ref: God has never said to any of the angels, “You are my Son, because today I have become your Father!” Neither has God said to any of them, “I will be his Father, and he will be my Son!”
text: Amo̱se̱ ne̱ abware̱se̱ŋ wo̱re̱‑ɔ‑rɔ, Wuribware̱ a tɔwe̱ mò̱ gyi‑o wo̱re̱ kpeŋ kuŋu si ase̱ŋ fe̱yɛ, “Ndɔɔ mo̱ a lee fo̱ bo̱ kaapo̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ gyi e̱ gye̱ fo̱. Ne̱ mo̱‑ɔ, fo̱ se̱ e̱ gye̱ mo̱.” N gye̱ mò̱ mbɔɔ‑ɔ ɔko̱ ase̱ŋ ne̱ ɔɔ tɔwe̱ ane̱ŋ. Ne̱ ɔɔ be̱e̱ tɔwe̱ mò̱ fɔŋfɔŋ mò̱ gyi amo̱ kuŋu si ase̱ŋ abware̱se̱ŋ wo̱re̱‑ɔ‑rɔ to̱ŋ ko̱ fe̱yɛ, “Ɔ te̱e̱ mo̱ fe̱yɛ mò̱ se̱, na mo̱‑ɔ mɔ te̱e̱ mò̱ fe̱yɛ mo̱ gyi.”

ref: When God brings his first-born Son into the world, he commands all of his angels to worship him.
text: Amaa saŋ ne̱ Wuribware̱ e̱ kpa fe̱yɛ ɔ baa mò̱ gyi‑o kaye̱‑rɔ‑ɔ, ɔ yɛ, “Wuribware̱ a mbɔɔ‑ɔ, mo̱nꞌ bo̱ suŋ mò̱.”

ref: And when God speaks about the angels, he says, “I change my angels into wind and my servants into flaming fire.”
text: Amaa mò̱ mbɔɔ‑ɔ kuŋu si ase̱ŋ, ɔ yɛ, “Ɔ sa ne̱ mò̱ mbɔɔ‑ɔ i kii fe̱yɛ afwii, na mò̱ ayaafɔre̱ fe̱yɛ de̱e̱kpa agyabreŋ.”

ref: But God says about his Son, “You are God, and you will rule as King forever! Your royal power brings about justice.
text: Abware̱se̱ŋ wo̱re̱‑ɔ‑rɔ, a bo̱‑rɔ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ a tɔwe̱ gywii mò̱ gyi‑o fe̱yɛ, “O Wuribware̱, kuwure ne̱ fo̱ i gyi‑o, ke̱ mo̱ŋ de kɛɛ. Fo̱ kuwureyii‑o e̱ kaapo̱ fe̱yɛ kase̱ŋtiŋ ne̱ fo̱ de fo̱ e̱ ke̱e̱ fo̱ ase̱sɛ se̱.

ref: You loved justice and hated evil, and so I, your God, have chosen you. I appointed you and made you happier than any of your friends.”
text: Fo̱ maa kpa e̱bɔye̱, amɔ itimaa wo̱re̱ dooo. Amo̱se̱ ne̱ fo̱ nyaŋpe̱ Wuribware̱ a sa ne̱ fo̱ kuwure‑o ke̱nyare̱ a de̱e̱ kyo̱ŋ fo̱ abɛɛko̱ lee‑o, ne̱ oo yure fo̱, sa ne̱ fo̱ akatɔ a gyi kyo̱ŋ bamo̱ pɛɛɛ.”

ref: The Scriptures also say, “In the beginning, Lord, you were the one who laid the foundation of the earth and created the heavens.
text: Wuribware̱ a be̱e̱ tɔwe̱ gywii mò̱ gyi‑o waa mò̱ wo̱re̱‑ɔ‑rɔ fe̱yɛ, “Atɔ pɛɛɛ ke̱le̱e̱kaase̱‑ɔ, fo̱ ya twe̱e̱ kaye̱ na kamo̱‑rɔ ke̱tɔ ke̱maa. Fo̱ asare̱e̱ ne̱ fo̱ a bo̱ waa so̱so̱ na mò̱ ke̱tɔ ke̱maa.

ref: They will all disappear and wear out like clothes, but you will last forever.
text: Amo̱ pɛɛɛ mɔ i kpuri fo̱ŋfo̱ŋ fo̱ŋfo̱ŋ, amaa fo̱ fe̱raa fo̱ i sii. Amo̱ pɛɛɛ mɔ i wu a nye̱ra, fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ waagya i wu‑o.

ref: You will roll them up like a robe and change them like a garment. But you are always the same, and you will live forever.”
text: Fo̱ e̱ bɔɔ amo̱ pɛɛɛ fe̱yɛ waagya ne̱ fo̱ i kyurowi, na fo̱ be̱e̱ taa ɔko̱ buŋ‑o. Amaa fo̱ fe̱raa, fo̱ e̱ gye̱ fo̱. Ane̱ŋ ne̱ fo̱ du‑o dɛɛ ne̱ fo̱ du. Fo̱ maa kyurowi kake ŋko̱ se̱, fo̱ bo̱‑rɔ bo̱ yɔ nsu pɛɛɛ.”

ref: God never said to any of the angels, “Sit at my right side until I make your enemies into a footstool for you!”
text: Ne̱ baa be̱e̱ kyo̱rɛɛ waa abware̱se̱ŋ wo̱re̱‑ɔ‑rɔ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ yɛ, “Kye̱na mo̱ kigyise si mfe̱e̱ na n sa a fo̱ ado̱ŋ pɛɛɛ mɔ ba fo̱ kaase̱.” Amo̱‑ɔ pɛɛɛ ne̱ Wuribware̱ a tɔwe̱‑ɔ mo̱ŋ gye̱ mò̱ mbɔɔ‑ɔ kuŋu si ase̱ŋ, amaa mò̱ fɔŋfɔŋ mò̱ gyi‑o.

ref: We must give our full attention to what we were told, so we won't drift away.
text: Amo̱se̱‑ɔ, Wuribware̱ mò̱ gyi‑o a tɛɛ ɔ kyɔ Wuribware̱ a mbɔɔ‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, amo̱ fe̱raa ane̱ pee akatɔ gya mò̱ ke̱kaapo̱ ne̱ ane̱ a nu‑o si dame̱naŋsɛ, na ane̱ ma nya fo̱ kpa.

ref: The message spoken by angels proved to be true, and all who disobeyed or rejected it were punished as they deserved.
text: De̱daa‑ɔ, Wuribware̱ a mbɔɔ‑ɔ se̱ ne̱ Wuribware̱ a bo̱rɔ bo̱ sa mò̱ mbraa‑ɔ, ne̱ m maa taare̱ a n kyurowi. Amo̱se̱‑ɔ, ɔke̱maa ne̱ ɔ mo̱ŋ gya mmo̱ se̱‑ɔ a nya mò̱ katɔmaabu‑o kakɔka.

ref: So if we refuse this great way of being saved, how can we hope to escape? The Lord himself was the first to tell about it, and people who heard the message proved to us that it was true.
text: Amo̱ a waa ane̱ŋ‑ɔ se̱‑ɔ, ne̱ ane̱ ne̱ ane̱ te ndɔɔ‑ɔ ya kine ase̱ŋ timaa ne̱ a kaapo̱ ane̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ e̱ mo̱rɔwe̱ ane̱‑ɔ, e̱me̱ne̱ e̱ waa ne̱ ɔ maa gyiiri ane̱ ke̱se̱bɔ? Abware̱se̱ŋ mɔ ne̱ a kaapo̱ ane̱ŋ ne̱ Wuribware̱ e̱ kpa a ɔ mo̱rɔwe̱ ane̱‑ɔ ne̱ ane̱ nyaŋpe̱ Yeesuu a gye̱ ŋkpɛɛ tɔwe̱. Ne̱ bamo̱ ne̱ bamo̱ fɔŋfɔŋ a nu mò̱ a tɔwe̱‑ɔ a be̱e̱ tɔwe̱‑rɔ gywii ane̱.

ref: God himself showed that his message was true by working all kinds of powerful miracles and wonders. He also gave his Holy Spirit to anyone he chose to. The One Who Leads Us To Be Saved
text: Bamo̱ a tɔwe̱ ase̱ŋ timaa mɔ‑ɔ, ne̱ Wuribware̱ a ye̱re̱ bamo̱‑rɔ waa akpe̱ŋe̱ye̱e̱tɔ e̱wo̱re̱se̱ e̱wo̱re̱se̱ bo̱ kaapo̱ fe̱yɛ bamo̱ ke̱kaapo̱‑ɔ e̱ gye̱ kase̱ŋtiŋ. Ŋkee ne̱ ɔɔ bo̱rɔ mò̱ kufwiiŋe timaa‑o si sa mò̱ se̱sɛ ke̱maa na mò̱ aketɔ ane̱ŋ ne̱ Wuribware̱ e̱ kpa‑ɔ. Ke̱tɔ se̱ ne̱ Yeesuu a kii se̱sɛ dimaadi‑o

ref: Somewhere in the Scriptures someone says to God, “What makes you care about us humans? Why are you concerned for weaklings such as we?
text: Fe̱yɛ ane̱ŋ ne̱ baa kyo̱rɛɛ waa abware̱se̱ŋ wo̱re̱‑ɔ‑rɔ to̱ŋ ko̱‑ɔ, “O Wuribware̱, nsɛ e̱ gye̱ dimaadi, ne̱ mò̱ ase̱ŋ tiri fo̱‑ɔ ne̱e̱? Dimaadi mò̱ gyi e̱ gye̱ nsɛ, ne̱ fo̱ ke̱e̱ mò̱ se̱?

ref: You made us lower than the angels for a while. Yet you have crowned us with glory and honor.
text: Ne̱ fo̱ a kyo̱ŋ amo̱ se̱, sa ne̱ kafwe̱e̱ ne̱ fo̱ mbɔɔ‑ɔ kyɔ mò̱, ne̱ fo̱ a bo̱nyaa mò̱, sa mò̱ ke̱dabe̱ na wuraa.

ref: And you have put everything under our power!” God has put everything under our power and has not left anything out of our power. But we still don't see it all under our control.
text: Ne̱ fo̱ a sa ne̱ o gyi atɔ pɛɛɛ kuwure, ne̱ ke̱mo̱ ke̱ke̱maa bo̱ mò̱ kaase̱.” Mbe̱yɔmɔ, mò̱ a tɛɛ tɔwe̱ fe̱yɛ ɔɔ taa atɔ pɛɛɛ bo̱ waa se̱sɛ a kuwure‑o kaase̱‑ɔ, a kaapo̱ ne̱e̱ fe̱yɛ ke̱tɔ ke̱maa ne̱ ɔɔ taa bo̱ waa ke̱mo̱ kaase̱. Amaa ndɔɔ a kaye̱ mɔ fe̱raa, ane̱ mo̱ŋ lɛɛ ŋu ke̱tɔ ke̱maa fe̱yɛ ke̱ bo̱ se̱sɛ a kuwure‑o kaase̱.

ref: What we do see is Jesus, who for a little while was made lower than the angels. Because of God's gift of undeserved grace, Jesus died for everyone. And now that Jesus has suffered and died, he is crowned with glory and honor!
text: Amaa ke̱tɔ ne̱ ane̱ a ŋu‑o e̱ gye̱ fe̱yɛ Yeesuu kwe̱e̱ ane̱ dimaadi ne̱ baa saŋ‑ɔ‑rɔ, bo̱ le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ Wuribware̱ a sa ne̱ saŋ kafwe̱e̱ ne̱ Yeesuu a kye̱na fe̱yɛ se̱sɛ dimaadi kaye̱ mɔ‑rɔ‑ɔ, mò̱ mbɔɔ‑ɔ a kyo̱ŋ mò̱ ke̱dabe̱. Amaa kamɛɛ‑rɔ ne̱ ɔɔ sa mò̱ ke̱dabe̱ na wuraa na bo̱nyaa so̱so̱. Yeesuu a nya ane̱ŋ a ke̱dabe̱ na wuraa‑o, a le̱e̱ fe̱yɛ oo gyi awo̱re̱fɔɔ wu sa ɔke̱maa. Bo̱ le̱e̱ ane̱ŋ ne̱ Wuribware̱ a su ase̱sɛ se̱‑ɔ, ne̱ Yeesuu a wu ane̱ŋ a lowi‑o.
